[**July 4, 1776:** The American colonies officially separated from Great Britain when the Second Continental Congress unanimously adopted the Declaration of Independence. The anniversary of this historic event is marked by Independence Day, which became a federal holiday in 1870. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=02a73e3cbfcd4bb58263bf5ef4124c79&_e=JhUkDm7fOsvrK8o5VhgUemJYyG5xz0Z0X_eTAn-1WQKToZA7-_izaPk93xXR2XwtLstwh0-NvFuGcRPPjFv8uKJztJCKlX80GZTGr93zpavl-WYtzyavYYAxQVqwG_M1FuWAikHRGrPZ0W4FICfps1z88TsWOSCnPJzcTT-ulZ3y-Uur2QUxRy_EVwUybJnNvsIYk4s25_YSWM-9JTN0xl2gDOKj-D8-EbrfSwIr9Gml5gwmZSDKjbhXc7UjvLIC) **Source -[loc.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=02a73e3cbfcd4bb58263bf5ef4124c79&_e=JhUkDm7fOsvrK8o5VhgUemJYyG5xz0Z0X_eTAn-1WQKToZA7-_izaPk93xXR2XwtLstwh0-NvFuGcRPPjFv8uF_wHHHUyFmPX0gbO-fcXw0z9jfb-dKRUdRh4zJd-sODn6WqfNkPhzAaJqN0Qg0wXpl3rOv1L7Z9HjV5fWyXMUokq7qx2ikpv7oj0V--3-xOrhSrJizMoYeHTsi42PLrzSFPVCWqse_O_TGpXBMD8gNfPPOXNtWvS2SUxEZBbEiw)**

[**July 4, 1826:** On the 50th anniversary of American Independence, two former U.S. Presidents and signers of the Declaration of Independence, John Adams and Thomas Jefferson, passed away. Jefferson died first at the age of 83 at his home in Monticello, Virginia, and several hours later, Adams died at the age of 90 in Quincy, Massachusetts. According to reports, Adams’ last words were, “Jefferson still lives.” ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=02a73e3cbfcd4bb58263bf5ef4124c79&_e=JhUkDm7fOsvrK8o5VhgUemJYyG5xz0Z0X_eTAn-1WQLBrlZvCdpeD24P4EFnwoPGjmaJ1VbF9FXjJcnltOEAMsIM94kPUolNfWEXxkOu78NdwJRRJ9ivzQDtN9U90n0Vpk9njyZiX144GcXwgl_YXawP-6Ntn32WdQVBYLUubiXaQKPT0zFXv21vj7-GPMSLWpP5VIT9F_vRvTACvHEpOG_Wj7plcq83YPw2mmy8Uun9LfIwbhy1hhb8PiXc05k-) **Source -[loc.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=02a73e3cbfcd4bb58263bf5ef4124c79&_e=JhUkDm7fOsvrK8o5VhgUemJYyG5xz0Z0X_eTAn-1WQLBrlZvCdpeD24P4EFnwoPGjmaJ1VbF9FXjJcnltOEAMsIM94kPUolNfWEXxkOu78M77RTVktboFDHfTlpbRGyeGXdFSWaw2-n5Kjo0ic4hNuebVRiterTRBQk08ErBY58pcobyE8Nt3sUROnKwTz2ZzOoIoQDH9mFZFoktaO-SxMX68N0rqyuZezmP9vwgQJNcziAD3FNJs0hIxzm6bvbx)**

[**July 4, 1864:** The Statue of Liberty was gifted to the American people by France. The colossal statue was presented to Levi Morton, the American minister to France at the time and future Vice President, in a ceremony in Paris. Later the statue was disassembled and transported to America. The statue was meant to commemorate the friendship between the French and American people, but now represents American liberty and is viewed as a welcoming site to immigrants. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=02a73e3cbfcd4bb58263bf5ef4124c79&_e=JhUkDm7fOsvrK8o5VhgUemJYyG5xz0Z0X_eTAn-1WQJ4yzvb2jq5yCFeidIXGzFJyvl5jVifIu4CO-tWRkP5k5DftrIBB9UQEpT5DpQ_x9FSa8bvWU5v4K3WzEcLxwaGKs4roIjosvFbeJFAjHTM8jEOESgwnQgiruzCHOp6x5GUS1OPfdDF2W_ckqFz5WHg8wnjufI4xjtfG2ijxnujtzbrq1szyxQmOmRIsb5YBQ5ollMHTveF8MMoogNyfnhg) **Source -[britannica.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=02a73e3cbfcd4bb58263bf5ef4124c79&_e=JhUkDm7fOsvrK8o5VhgUemJYyG5xz0Z0X_eTAn-1WQJ4yzvb2jq5yCFeidIXGzFJyvl5jVifIu4CO-tWRkP5k5DftrIBB9UQEpT5DpQ_x9GJ0tyEhJPo79IdPFrkUPiNmPSxMRAQvc75UwNTPst3iThKpCG8W_5TyxtqapqIH2fWkV1EotuMdpSs0iyUYa1gF-hrGAspXA0q6t6bUaJA24R7rZDcxgVKbTLUZcrYSMkcZw0NO9D4n5fc4fD2x5A2)**

Celebrate AMERICA today | Fellow American,

We received special authorization to activate a SPECIAL [**Independence Day BLITZ**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a2cd01bc31394fafb4b4721cf1bfff64&_e=003N9loXgnGrbgbaa0qE-cB6GRnTmqH5peKjUebGKpnNsyGMGipRcao2OR43HnRqiw7O4OvaGt4nV8sgaARchvgz5YSR03YQ7o2HggItS3-NplCFSK9wxbs96EzvuW0bhwpoRYfkxUN5jr0T2YX3A1HlV_pDTQomfmCqMeNWvLDQOL-HbBjw7paYDcdcWyr_oqj4ga7OpUWbrECzk-mAcjZgCWGNGcUavfaaKveFYaEq5jWYQZ_znwmsGRRNWjGIO2Wew0J5RwaINtufwTyaL5Kvb_yZakHbzgJ-AvmsTQxjyuW9oyNfhR-nEmS_DxT1J20fiJ9qq8P_TTTIOVLVq0D1sBD1HNMgNC35t9FJiM7BYkLfczZ4MZwwbs_dezpM3eNedKpiWtwPQ9Waqmta8RtFE5Yw-8l1w-XQRHLBv0CDmxd7w1FIqeBTP8zN6Ax6cNSEkY2Y1rC7OPTIj-Tqaw%3D%3D) to celebrate the BEST country in the WORLD, Fellow American.

**Today is THE DAY to show everyone how proud, patriotic, and lucky we are to be AMERICANS.** Some members of the extreme Left have tried to downplay the FOUNDING of AMERICA, but we know **__PATRIOTS LIKE YOU love our country.__**

[Renew your Medicaid or CHIP coverage](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z21pg5m0qnt4pfbrim4slovvs9mjqq0nombh14tg_rp22sh2s8i66o70slj66o72c1h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnk9g64pj7k1jmf831cuh7actl6tqq9ttle9qqbd9h6ir38d5h6mjr4td662qb0td66upnacjk6sqjf8h5u)
As COVID-19 becomes less of a threat, states will restart yearly Medicaid and Children's Health Insurance Program (CHIP) eligibility reviews. This means your state will use the information they have to decide if you or your family member(s) still qualify for Medicaid or CHIP coverage. If your state needs more information from you to make a coverage decision, they'll send you a renewal letter in the mail. Most children can still be covered through the Children's Health Insurance Program.
[See It Here](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdqaqkppq3f4msa6ubb0a1e3rpmhj3tfpt359vag_rp22sh2s8i66o70slj66o72c1h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnk9g64pj7k1jmf831cuh7actl6tqq9ttle9qqbd9h6ir38d5h6mjr4td662qb0td66upnacjk6sqjf8h5u)

It was six months from the date patriots upon first hearing a reading of the Declaration of Independence stormed down Manhattan Island to it

| | Happy Independence Day!
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | It was six months from the date patriots upon first hearing a reading of the Declaration of Independence stormed down Manhattan Island to its southernmost tip, Bowling Green, tore down a lead equestrian statue of George III, and melted the statue into mini-balls that the Continentals used against the British Army. That euphoric moment turned into a cataclysm for the Continentals. Across the shore of the Delaware River Washington’s army had retreated after a series of defeats. Winter had set in and the Delaware was choked with ice blocks, making British pursuit all but impossible. At this moment of despair with his army reduced to some 2,400 ill clad and ill-equipped troops (many of whom suffered from dysentery), and following earnest prayer in search for an answer, George Washington chose to do the unthinkable, cross the Delaware at night and stage a surprise raid on one of the most well trained and ruthless mercenary armies in the world, the Hessians. Washington would risk everything in a daring Christmas raid on the Hessian forces camped at Trenton. It would be a horrific battle but in the end the raid would net his army 22 Hessians killed, 92 wounded, and 918 captured: a sorely needed victory to prove to the world, and in particular France, that the patriot cause was winnable. The victory at Trenton is but one of many shining moments in battle after battle to secure the blessings of liberty. The American people have proved that the fight for liberty against the forces of tyranny is of inestimable worth, is blessed by the Divine, and is essential to ensure that the greatest bastion of freedom the world has ever known, our constitutional republic, never perishes. Happy Independence Day everyone! God Bless you all, and God Bless the United States of America.
---

clean_body: It was six months from the date patriots upon first hearing a reading of the Declaration of Independence stormed down Manhattan Island to it | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | Happy Independence Day! | | | | | | | It was six months from the date patriots upon first hearing a reading of the Declaration of Independence stormed down Manhattan Island to its southernmost tip, Bowling Green, tore down a lead equestrian statue of George III, and melted the statue into mini-balls that the Continentals used against the British Army. That euphoric moment turned into a cataclysm for the Continentals. Across the shore of the Delaware River Washington’s army had retreated after a series of defeats. Winter had set in and the Delaware was choked with ice blocks, making British pursuit all but impossible. At this moment of despair with his army reduced to some 2,400 ill clad and ill-equipped troops (many of whom suffered from dysentery), and following earnest prayer in search for an answer, George Washington chose to do the unthinkable, cross the Delaware at night and stage a surprise raid on one of the most well trained and ruthless mercenary armies in the world, the Hessians. Washington would risk everything in a daring Christmas raid on the Hessian forces camped at Trenton. It would be a horrific battle but in the end the raid would net his army 22 Hessians killed, 92 wounded, and 918 captured: a sorely needed victory to prove to the world, and in particular France, that the patriot cause was winnable. The victory at Trenton is but one of many shining moments in battle after battle to secure the blessings of liberty. The American people have proved that the fight for liberty against the forces of tyranny is of inestimable worth, is blessed by the Divine, and is essential to ensure that the greatest bastion of freedom the world has ever known, our constitutional republic, never perishes. Happy Independence Day everyone! God Bless you all, and God Bless the United States of America. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PRESS RELEASE Veteran constitutional and administrative attorney Jonathan Emord announced today he is a candidate for the U.S. Senate in 2024. | | | Get our latest updates | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . name: Will Hurd
subject: Happy 4th!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HURD FOR AMERICA](https://hurdwwillhurd
body:
| | | Happy Independence Day, folks! I love this country. What it stands for. What we fight for. And how bright our future is. This is one of my favorite holidays because folks are able to table their differences and celebrate our great nation and the freedoms we enjoy. So no matter how you celebrate: fireworks, BBQ, spending time in the outdoors – whatever it is – let's take this time to remember that there's more that unites us than divides us and we're better together. Have a great 4th of July! Sincerely,**Will Hurd** _Candidate for President & Former Congressman_

body:

| | Now, I know what you might be thinking, so YES... I am the “Clear Eyes” guy. **And NO, you can’t win my money.** But I can probably help protect yours — because remember: **Boring is better.** Take the Great Recession of 2008, for example: Stock prices plummeted, and “boring ol’ Gold” was up nearly 3X and “even more boring silver” was almost 6X higher by 2011. That means while most 401k’s turned into 201k’s... Every $400K you had in Gold would’ve jumped to nearly $1.2 million... And every $400K in silver would’ve rocketed to almost $2.4 MILLION. But that's just one example — because I believe we’re on the edge of a new gold rush — a new opportunity to protect your wealth, and possibly watch your retirement turn into a “gold mine.”

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Request for a Hand Count of Early Voting Ballots and Full Forensic Audit of the Early Voting Machines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
From the Desk of Senator Amanda Chase
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o4YUwkZQhANglmOH6mrULtbCb1J9brxMITlZhUN_w0wzsjqlusNt0oQzY8_4HaZCp0xCJyk7bmzmNm1Le6XE43zzpJN2feir6C8n_FZEmaVs1v8tkd2XrTi-UzxKBFjMht6ptz23EvXcvUPARubfrGqfsxkzawuvitnELEkuIKg=&c=uecJs4hQi6vKkqo1jOqun_GRtd60IV2beFk4AJnCwKoJX0YNdKIGKQ==&ch=DHPBrnN9-shP_qZzcJ7BoJjHeQnf1f4FpL3jB7nVdaNG_KeRgPX3QQ==)
---
---
| |
---
| | |
---|---
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
July 5, 2023

Press Contact:
Chris Farmer
chris@chaseforva.com
804 912 6007

Scheduling Press Interview:
Debbie Gwynn
debbie@chaseforva.com
804 393 2715

OFFICIAL NOTIFICATION

Request for a Hand Count of Absentee Ballots and Full Forensic Audit of Voting Equipment
Used in Early Voting in
Senate District 12

Virginia State Board of Elections Commisioner, Susan Beals
Chairman of the Board, Dr. John O'Bannon
Vice-Chairman of the Board. Rosalyn R. Dance
Secretary of the Board, Georgia Alvis-Long
Member, Donald W. Merricks
Member, Matthew Weinstain

Commissioner Beals and members of the Virginia State Board of Elections,

The stated mission of the Virginia State Board of Elections is to promote and support accurate, fair, open and secure elections for the citizens of the Commonwealth. Yet, in the Republican Primary for Senate District 12, which includes both Chesterfield and Colonial Heights, and in which in-person early voting began on Friday, May 5, we documented and publicized a significant breach in that trust which I would like to call to your attention.

This breach was documented on Monday, May 15 by my campaign in a press release and yet no corrective action was taken.

When Election Day ballots were counted, we won with a 2 percentage point lead. It was only when the absentee ballots, which were counted on the voting computers in question, that we came up 375 votes short out of 21,701 total votes cast.

Had our concerns expressed on May 15 been addressed in a timely manner, we would not be questioning the count. However, those concerns went unaddressed and now that's where we've come up short by only 375 votes, we are asking for reasonable redress to our concerns.

The breach occurred when ethics attorney and newly elected GOP Chairwoman Leslie Haley chose Lauren Fulcher, who is not only the Campaign Manager of the Glen Sturtevant Campaign but also his highest donor, to serve as the sole Republican representative to be the observer of the voting computers that would be used during the 45 day in-person early voting.

This is a clear conflict of interest and a complete lack of judgment on the part of Chesterfield GOP Chairwoman Leslie Haley, Sturtevant Campaign Manager Lauren Fulcher and Candidate Glen Sturtevant. The Chesterfield County Registrar's Office should have ensured proper representation of all campaigns once Lauren Fulcher's name was identified as the Campaign Manager of the Sturtevant campaign. But that did not happen.

At first GOP Chair Leslie Haley emailed the name Lauren Fuller to the Chesterfield Registrar's Office, but after being pressed by the registrar's office, corrected the name to Lauren Fulcher. This email exchange between Mrs. Haley and the Chesterfield Registrar's Office is all documented and included in this email.

The Sturtevant campaign was the only campaign given notice or provided with an opportunity to review this certification of the early voting computers. Our campaign did not receive notification of the opportunity to be present for the testing of the early voting computers. This is a violation of the 2022 Virginia State Board of Elections Handbook as documented in Chapter 4 page 7 highlighted in the F.A.Q. and referencing Code of Virginia 24.2-632.

It was only during the certification of the voting computers to be used on Election Day, June 20, that my campaign received notification from Chesterfield GOP Chair Leslie Haley stating that we had until 5pm on Friday to submit our list of names of campaign representatives to be present for the Election Day voting computer testing.

When my representatives whose names were submitted as requested to the GOP Chair by the Friday at 5pm deadline, they were denied access that following Monday when my campaign representatives showed up the morning of the certification of the regular voting computers. It was only after getting legal counsel involved that one of our representatives was allowed to observe.

While the Code of Virginia only specifically addresses party representation in general elections, the 2022 Virginia State Board of Elections Handbook Chapter 4, does address the necessity of equal representation and notification to individual campaigns and can be applied in party held primaries in which campaign representatives not party representatives are more appropriate and applicable .

These actions were clearly improper. The Virginia Department of Elections Handbook makes it clear that all candidates are to be provided equal notice and opportunity to participate in the testing. For example, the handbook states that "[i]f the general registrar permits [a] requesting candidate to attend the testing, he/she must, as soon as reasonably possible, contact all other candidates for that office to provide an equal opportunity." Va. Dep't of Elections Handbook, Chapter 4 (July 2022), p. 7. The handbook further states that "[t]he general registrar must provide equal notice to all candidates or their representatives if they choose to" notify any candidates. Id. In short, the Department of Elections has confirmed the principle that a fair and honest election requires that all candidates be provided with an equal opportunity to observe the testing process.
Unfortunately, while the Handbook requires equal access for all candidates, the current version of the governing statute leaves it on the honor system for the local party leadership to provide such access. In contrast to nonpartisan local elections, where Virginia Code Section 24.2-633 expressly requires all candidates to be notified, the statute says that in a primary election, only the chair of the local party committee must be notified. This enables the committee chair to cherry-pick which candidate or candidates to notify and which candidates to exclude from the testing process.
Such cherry-picking is exactly what happened here: When the registrar notified Chesterfield County Republican Chair Leslie Haley, Ms. Haley only provided notice of the testing to Glenn Sturtevant's campaign manager, Lauren Fulcher, and concealed the testing from the other candidates.

As the Chairwoman of the National Election Integrity Caucus, I know how our elections across the country are being compromised and knew what questions to ask.

On May 5, I asked the right question of the Chesterfield Deputy Registrar.

Who was the Republican representative chosen to certify the voting computers that would be used during the in person 45 day early voting season? The answer? Lauren Fuller, later corrected as Lauren Fulcher.

It was that answer that led to my discovery of what the newly elected and Sturtevant endorsed Chesterfield GOP Chair Leslie Haley had done.

The Virginia State Board of Elections Handbook requires that if one campaign is present, all campaigns shall be invited to the early voting certification. Why wasn't the Handbook followed?

Today I am asking for a hand count of all ballots cast during the 45 day early voting period and that all campaigns be invited to observe. These would be the ballots counted on the voting computers in which Lauren Fulcher was the only campaign representative present.

My observer advised that when the post election canvas occurred and a voting computer would jam that the ballots would fall out of the machines. He noticed that some of the ballot were earmarked or folded so that they were not readable by the voting computers. Were these ballots counted by the computers?

My campaign is also asking for a full forensic audit of the early voting computers by a neutral party expert with an IT background, and not a vendor.

The 2022 Virginia State Board of Elections Handbook was written for a reason, to provide guidance and best practices to ensure all voters and candidates alike can be assured that "win or lose," the election was fair and transparent.

We must ensure confidence in our elections as it is the foundation of our Constitutional Republic. Bad actors must be held accountable.

For God and Country,
|
---
|
---
| Virginia Senator, Senate District 11 Republican Candidate for Senate, District 12

clean_body: From the Desk of Senator Amanda Chase | | | | == | | | | | ---|--- FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE July 5, 2023 Press Contact: Chris Farmer chris@chaseforva.com 804 912 6007 Scheduling Press Interview: Debbie Gwynn debbie@chaseforva.com 804 393 2715 OFFICIAL NOTIFICATION Request for a Hand Count of Absentee Ballots and Full Forensic Audit of Voting Equipment Used in Early Voting in Senate District 12 Virginia State Board of Elections Commisioner, Susan Beals Chairman of the Board, Dr. John O'Bannon Vice-Chairman of the Board. Rosalyn R. Dance Secretary of the Board, Georgia Alvis-Long Member, Donald W. Merricks Member, Matthew Weinstain Commissioner Beals and members of the Virginia State Board of Elections, The stated mission of the Virginia State Board of Elections is to promote and support accurate, fair, open and secure elections for the citizens of the Commonwealth. Yet, in the Republican Primary for Senate District 12, which includes both Chesterfield and Colonial Heights, and in which in-person early voting began on Friday, May 5, we documented and publicized a significant breach in that trust which I would like to call to your attention. This breach was documented on Monday, May 15 by my campaign in a press release and yet no corrective action was taken. When Election Day ballots were counted, we won with a 2 percentage point lead. It was only when the absentee ballots, which were counted on the voting computers in question, that we came up 375 votes short out of 21,701 total votes cast. Had our concerns expressed on May 15 been addressed in a timely manner, we would not be questioning the count. However, those concerns went unaddressed and now that's where we've come up short by only 375 votes, we are asking for reasonable redress to our concerns. The breach occurred when ethics attorney and newly elected GOP Chairwoman Leslie Haley chose Lauren Fulcher, who is not only the Campaign Manager of the Glen Sturtevant Campaign but also his highest donor, to serve as the sole Republican representative to be the observer of the voting computers that would be used during the 45 day in-person early voting. This is a clear conflict of interest and a complete lack of judgment on the part of Chesterfield GOP Chairwoman Leslie Haley, Sturtevant Campaign Manager Lauren Fulcher and Candidate Glen Sturtevant. The Chesterfield County Registrar's Office should have ensured proper representation of all campaigns once Lauren Fulcher's name was identified as the Campaign Manager of the Sturtevant campaign. But that did not happen. At first GOP Chair Leslie Haley emailed the name Lauren Fuller to the Chesterfield Registrar's Office, but after being pressed by the registrar's office, corrected the name to Lauren Fulcher. This email exchange between Mrs. Haley and the Chesterfield Registrar's Office is all documented and included in this email. The Sturtevant campaign was the only campaign given notice or provided with an opportunity to review this certification of the early voting computers. Our campaign did not receive notification of the opportunity to be present for the testing of the early voting computers. This is a violation of the 2022 Virginia State Board of Elections Handbook as documented in Chapter 4 page 7 highlighted in the F.A.Q. and referencing Code of Virginia 24.2-632. It was only during the certification of the voting computers to be used on Election Day, June 20, that my campaign received notification from Chesterfield GOP Chair Leslie Haley stating that we had until 5pm on Friday to submit our list of names of campaign representatives to be present for the Election Day voting computer testing. When my representatives whose names were submitted as requested to the GOP Chair by the Friday at 5pm deadline, they were denied access that following Monday when my campaign representatives showed up the morning of the certification of the regular voting computers. It was only after getting legal counsel involved that one of our representatives was allowed to observe. While the Code of Virginia only specifically addresses party representation in general elections, the 2022 Virginia State Board of Elections Handbook Chapter 4, does address the necessity of equal representation and notification to individual campaigns and can be applied in party held primaries in which campaign representatives not party representatives are more appropriate and applicable . These actions were clearly improper. The Virginia Department of Elections Handbook makes it clear that all candidates are to be provided equal notice and opportunity to participate in the testing. For example, the handbook states that "[i]f the general registrar permits [a] requesting candidate to attend the testing, he/she must, as soon as reasonably possible, contact all other candidates for that office to provide an equal opportunity." Va. Dep't of Elections Handbook, Chapter 4 (July 2022), p. 7. The handbook further states that "[t]he general registrar must provide equal notice to all candidates or their representatives if they choose to" notify any candidates. Id. In short, the Department of Elections has confirmed the principle that a fair and honest election requires that all candidates be provided with an equal opportunity to observe the testing process. Unfortunately, while the Handbook requires equal access for all candidates, the current version of the governing statute leaves it on the honor system for the local party leadership to provide such access. In contrast to nonpartisan local elections, where Virginia Code Section 24.2-633 expressly requires all candidates to be notified, the statute says that in a primary election, only the chair of the local party committee must be notified. This enables the committee chair to cherry-pick which candidate or candidates to notify and which candidates to exclude from the testing process. Such cherry-picking is exactly what happened here: When the registrar notified Chesterfield County Republican Chair Leslie Haley, Ms. Haley only provided notice of the testing to Glenn Sturtevant's campaign manager, Lauren Fulcher, and concealed the testing from the other candidates. As the Chairwoman of the National Election Integrity Caucus, I know how our elections across the country are being compromised and knew what questions to ask. On May 5, I asked the right question of the Chesterfield Deputy Registrar. Who was the Republican representative chosen to certify the voting computers that would be used during the in person 45 day early voting season? The answer? Lauren Fuller, later corrected as Lauren Fulcher. It was that answer that led to my discovery of what the newly elected and Sturtevant endorsed Chesterfield GOP Chair Leslie Haley had done. The Virginia State Board of Elections Handbook requires that if one campaign is present, all campaigns shall be invited to the early voting certification. Why wasn't the Handbook followed? Today I am asking for a hand count of all ballots cast during the 45 day early voting period and that all campaigns be invited to observe. These would be the ballots counted on the voting computers in which Lauren Fulcher was the only campaign representative present. My observer advised that when the post election canvas occurred and a voting computer would jam that the ballots would fall out of the machines. He noticed that some of the ballot were earmarked or folded so that they were not readable by the voting computers. Were these ballots counted by the computers? My campaign is also asking for a full forensic audit of the early voting computers by a neutral party expert with an IT background, and not a vendor. The 2022 Virginia State Board of Elections Handbook was written for a reason, to provide guidance and best practices to ensure all voters and candidates alike can be assured that "win or lose," the election was fair and transparent. We must ensure confidence in our elections as it is the foundation of our Constitutional Republic. Bad actors must be held accountable. For God and Country, | | | Virginia Senator, Senate District 11 Republican Candidate for Senate, District 12 | | | | | | | | | == | | == | | == | | | | | | | | | | == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | | | | Senator Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811, Midlothian, VA 23112 | | == Sent by mailto:amanda@chaseforva.com powered by == ==

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWeCBdZDvN

ACI - Religious Liberty Survey

I am fearful that legal persecution will intensify
against Americans holding to faith-based values

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWeCBdZDvN

Fellow
American,

There is
a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me
worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the
Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and
signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only
intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Are you
concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our
founding-Religious Liberty?

In
addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act, numerous
examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v.
BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL
RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few
examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to
faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to
their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act,
brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal
Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and
organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex
marriage failed.

This has
the potential to only intensify legal persecution against
individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to
faith-based values.

The
American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to
preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation
for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty,
Community, and Life.

Whether
it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield
after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a
cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I
am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?

Please
share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning
religious liberty in America.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61993868:WeCBdZDvN:m:3:2532013465:ED31C6E68325D547B84B4DA9B1A25A02:r

Thank you
for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Peter, American Pride is dwindling across this country. Folks say they’re embarrassed to be American. Military recruitment levels are lower than ever. We know there are patriots out there who still believe that America is the greatest country in the world and are proud to call themselves Americans. https://click.team.takebackpennsylvania.com/?qs=6f8b4ccd948b51cc8e3beda033e62bcb701f46a10195ba9bd89d3c659663506625027a4712061aecc036fc4b1f1942e031007cd32ceced01a74a2913d937312a Are you one of them, Peter? https://click.team.takebackpennsylvania.com/?qs=6f8b4ccd948b51cc8e3beda033e62bcb701f46a10195ba9bd89d3c659663506625027a4712061aecc036fc4b1f1942e031007cd32ceced01a74a2913d937312a I’M PROUD TO BE AMERICAN! I served my country and was proud to do so. Being at West Point and deploying in the Gulf War was one of the best times in my life, and I wouldn’t trade those experiences for anything. There’s nothing like serving a mission for the greater good of your country. So few things even come close to that feeling. To see American Pride hitting all-time lows has been disheartening, but I believe that we can still renew the American spirit. The American story has always been that we’re pushed to the brink – the American Revolution, WWII, the Cold War – but we always bring ourselves back. However, I always say… “Decline’s not inevitable, but neither is renewal.” Dominating empires and great countries aren’t destined to fail or lose power. A lot of them have, but it’s not inevitable. However, renewing a country’s greatness isn’t inevitable either. We have to put in the work to make it better ourselves. No one’s coming to save us – we have to do it ourselves. By renewing the American spirit and believing in the power of America, we can restore pride and greatness in our country. Today, I’m hoping you’ll take a minute of your time to show that you’re proud to be an American by signing below: https://click.team.takebackpennsylvania.com/?qs=6f8b4ccd948b51cc8e3beda033e62bcb701f46a10195ba9bd89d3c659663506625027a4712061aecc036fc4b1f1942e031007cd32ceced01a74a2913d937312a I’M PROUD TO BE AMERICAN! Thank you for believing in America, Dave McCormick Combat Veteran Job Creator Political Outsider https://click.team.takebackpennsylvania.com/?qs=6f8b4ccd948b51cc6e97b2e133003616afd027c205b2ee097e20a8bb9ec0c34db10f933a847bffeacbb5b33fe06cd4d8fe7dca00a1b16e659e7ed154e4708bb1 Personal Note from Dave McCormick: My book, Superpower in Peril: A Battle Plan to Renew America, is about what we should do next to begin renewing our country. My book outlines the steps to make this plan a reality, including educating our people, confronting China, and securing America. https://click.team.takebackpennsylvania.com/?qs=6f8b4ccd948b51cc6e97b2e133003616afd027c205b2ee097e20a8bb9ec0c34db10f933a847bffeacbb5b33fe06cd4d8fe7dca00a1b16e659e7ed154e4708bb1 If you’d like to read more about what a former paratrooper and business leader thinks about what we need to get our country back, I hope you’ll claim a signed copy today! https://click.team.takebackpennsylvania.com/?qs=6f8b4ccd948b51cc6e97b2e133003616afd027c205b2ee097e20a8bb9ec0c34db10f933a847bffeacbb5b33fe06cd4d8fe7dca00a1b16e659e7ed154e4708bb1 CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY https://click.team.takebackpennsylvania.com/?qs=6f8b4ccd948b51cc3cb49167af0b2e748a4f926e1a0d276328ae5d6f4f03afa34d28a493bf532c9abe90e8177d7483b8ff893d9896d6253a1cbaacdcce572a5c Pennsylvania is the most important battleground state in our country, which is why Democrats are keen to flip Pennsylvania permanently BLUE. The only way to save Pennsylvania is at the grassroots level. We have to start electing quality Republican leaders at the state level if we want to get the state – and our country – back on track. https://click.team.takebackpennsylvania.com/?qs=6f8b4ccd948b51cc3cb49167af0b2e748a4f926e1a0d276328ae5d6f4f03afa34d28a493bf532c9abe90e8177d7483b8ff893d9896d6253a1cbaacdcce572a5c We can’t renew America if conservatives cede the battleground state of Pennsylvania. name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: Will you help us win one of the most important races of 2024?
body:
We can take this House seat
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4395e74c-fac5-4b2d-ac90-1af6c037efa4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [__](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0280246-6688-4525-bb9b-ad95e7da487a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hey, it’s Al Franken. [I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Blue Amp Action and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdadd9611-283b-4834-8ffa-e9e353edf39a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too! Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence. In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law. Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that funded the police! Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations. [Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T00574fcd-7cfd-4106-9f5b-946cade5f42f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T87690011-aadb-45fc-b2b9-bc8a3f231690/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them. Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know. And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation. [So, what do you say? Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tecf1128e-5b15-4b68-b644-d96ef3f53df3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This is important to me. And to our nation. Thanks, Al [P.S. I always add a P.S to these letters to make another ask. It’s a cheap tactic but for some reason it works! DONATE HERE.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T901297ee-63a2-4d82-9c6f-bb51a82f04b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94c333f9-6432-4cd8-b906-9d3abd155f4c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/yyz_em_90do_alfrankenforjoshriley23070514?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=b331c249-3efe-42e2-958b-e21c0e50ab76&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=b331c249-3efe-42e2-958b-e21c0e50ab76&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: If you agree with just one of these principles...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Somewhere along the way, America forgot it was founded on truth. The politicians and media don't want you to be reminded of thes
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpvcbh3cc6smuki0b3c52tpgnca8meg8i2mg01j0_rp22sh2s8i66o70slhm4o32c3h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uioj8s5jmlqb6pr16ljm7cj0ejgn4s9jeoqe2pr4supjfdbh6orj3djgemprbdtnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphmcsqj8dtie9j38o5jchjr1db5e8iv0)

| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqofp0is8gp5kfa6486jv6dol8ejooea53b7164g_rp22sh2s8i66o70slhm4o32c3h2bs)

Friend,

**TRUTH.** There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them:
|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history. | [** CHIP IN IF YOU BELIEVE IN THE TRUTH **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z228o8385qh72kq42v1dsheo5m0ke7qlaoqo8qtg_rp22sh2s8i66o70slhm4o32c3h2bs)
---

America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. **Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing.**

If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, _**[I need you on my team.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zr8mhtbd0h7ueu0cp0vk1pl6n3knfr93dnhfsg6o_rp22sh2s8i66o70slhm4o32c3h2bs)**_

This is about more than a campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. **[Will you join me today by chipping in $1 or more?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2znu6a1kl6sdd33mgcnn9mr81jkvokhg8h09ce990_rp22sh2s8i66o70slhm4o32c3h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvkk2jhtuf5rhdmjm6si46qm40svu30pufk7d2pg_rp22sh2s8i66o70slhm4o32c3h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** STAND WITH THE TRUTH **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zg03pt0i2j3n08b5ielul3au3ap0f9d1j4sqa3i8_rp22sh2s8i66o70slhm4o32c3h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.
[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zln1h8cmeun1fju489llgj2318otv04abecr104g_rp22sh2s8i66o70slhm4o32c3h2bs)

The nuclear family is the greatest form of governance known to mankind. Capitalism lifts people up from poverty. There are three branches of the U.S. government, not four. The U.S. Constitution is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history. | America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing. If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, This is about more than a campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Concfwdutions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable concfwdutions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal concfwdution limits. Concfwdutions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. name: The Flyover
subject: New Car Prices Soar, Cocaine Found at White House, and a Rare Pink Grasshopper Sighting
body:
Meta Platforms, owner of Facebook and Instagram, plans to launch a rival to Twitter called "Threads." The move brings billionaire owners Mark Zuckerberg and Elon Musk into direct business competition.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)
---

| | |
# WEDNESDAY, JULY 5, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** It's summer beach season, and today we mark the 77th anniversary, at a Parisian swimming pool, of the [first bikini swimsuit.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszzFvhCAUwPFPA5uGew9QB4Yubte1o0F5nK9FuSDV3Ldv2rnzP_knv4_7dPeceH-8-41cjXnyS-WTJtU1pgGcQAYXiYBQkrvZvjfGKotydaRVwIDQq8EGa2-4zFqbaCDYJRiYJTtQgKpTRg0GsGuHwehZR9-jJcJ-FlpR4JpL-5l5ryvF9MonlXbJm0xurfV5CHwTMAoYr-tqfUrfhX6zgPGoubwEjJHLUZuZv3jnhk4qzZYDJVlceF6cEh-2E1o9Ns_p71z_df4EAAD__5nHVGo) It's named for the nuclear tests at the Bikini Atoll because its French designer sought a similar explosive reaction. In today's edition, we're discussing the most expensive new-car market in history, an evacuation of the White House when a mysterious powder was found in the West Wing, and a garden sighting of the rare hot-pink grasshopper.

Have any suggestions? [Please send us a note](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover)**** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading _The Flyover_ , [sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8GtljnO8B4YKhUeUvXjhbgI6bCIXJprP591cye39OT3ud1vvpc8v324Td2LdXZx5afPMNw0RekGeXiEjMySXa9sVZrA4bk6jj0BN4GRB49JB0jWB17IFQqKOtldghIMICGUSMN3ThqFVTylgwz2SAU8JJb3buvmu9t5VR-65P3LtZNFre29hD0JnASOB3HcWL9M5p-2iboXYHc3fI4cin52wxCwW3zubxi7XTtLwAA__9CIk6y) and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? [Click here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71uwyAUQOGngS3W9eXHMDB0YUu6VOpogbnUtE6oHGSUt6-6ez860vd5na-hbOXxdQt3ci3XOSytHDSDuqC9oJiRJ5eJkAQnN2qjhEajRr46kzXKkAhj0piUjTGbOOUIi5VkreLFIaAAhXYEOYIeIE5GqCAkqQlkEEwCpdLqPnzX8mgr5e1VD9qHpd755tbWfp9MvDH0DH3vfchhoVjrz3_A0H-s5LfX-0H7jfqToee7S-EoiUk4ObZz4F8AAAD__8ycUlk).

|
---
## Meta Targets Twitter With New App
Meta Platforms, owner of Facebook and Instagram, plans to [launch a rival to Twitter](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uhDAQhJ_G7vbkszE_hYs0dJc2JVpgOW9iMDKrQ_f20V3aNCONRppP-r5uww058Xb_xJWCLHnASfhBg2nAg3WD1XNYiCw5TeFat633tamdjmEcG1ddcZ4cUdO5rnNULZ5qfx2tNzhqDtZYZxrjTeetay5d56uxWrB1NZFrR1UZmllyuXxn3iTSkp75QeUy5VWnEEX2Q7kPZXtle4kUOaXXpmwf80obnYeyPe7vAKEpbjnl-_OvryQIfMBBApJB8IcgbyAni1CBkyUCQuEHJsB9hwlTohkkFsL5daxLmPeTU-KjblRl7ivym6_lX1O_AQAA___id2vs) called "Threads." The move brings billionaire owners Mark Zuckerberg and Elon Musk into direct business competition.

Meta will allow new Threads users to [bring their followers ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtygzAQAL9GdGLk0wMoVKShc9qUzAEHUiIQI85m_PcZp069xe7s1324Y0xxXz9xI89LHnDi-KRBNdJK0ANUs1-IgHRF_uba1lqnnK6C74yd1YRjp7V21GpscFHd6ACMuzk3V9GDAq0aZVVnQTd111kzmgVb7Yh0OwqjaI6cS_2d486BlvTKTyr1lLcq-cB8nEJ_COgF9Nd11YUeTOV8cwE90xT2nPL6EtBvxCgTPvYpSL4iMxWZ4g9JPA7JoRDOp3z3SNVIZQT0VfHzccWU4ukaYdS6YUx_av53xG8AAAD__wrpXnU)from Instagram with them. Instagram has billions of users compared to 250 million on Twitter, so Meta can potentially swamp Twitter in terms of sheer size.

A listing for the Threads app already appears in the Apple App Store, billed as a "text-based conversation app," and it's expected to be ready to download as soon as tomorrow.
## New Car Prices Soar to Record Highs
Car makers are increasingly targeting the luxury market, leaving [just 8% of new vehicles](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L3unDAQBPCnMd2ivV3MR-EiDd2lTYkMrI-NDD5h69C9fUTqfzPNTxqN5s9zenqNerx--11cCWnyS9GPTNiBBeKJqtUFERKuxD3avre2xZarzT3mYK0EYSG2bNF2xDQEmQkHuxBV6giJsUOLgyXu6mGwzdwE33Mrwv1sGpRVSzrrv0mPskmI3_SRs17SXkW3lfLOhn8ZGg2N13XVyzEvNxoa72pDI3Z30O3bF7RkOMSf8Qu6v1POOkeBkiDosYKHxZ8Q0glRcoay-QMYERHqreyxOt36vjRGzW1nGnztXuP_KeXHY_4FAAD___qIYgw) costing less than $30,000. That's down from 38% before the pandemic.

Kiplinger's identifies only ten new car models [at the $25,000 price point](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D-P4yAUBPBPgzss8jD-U1Bc4y7XXmkReMTvggEBG-9--1U27dYzI_00_67b1VCgeP9rDtTNp83YRk_cxMQVB7lB57RHBJQd6ss4z0qNYpTdrm_zMtuLGoyyXsoLSDSTnxXKyTnnADrSIECKSSixKJBTvyxquA3ezHJElPONDQIdtVT6_4li29GHr_TE0tt0dEHvreXK5B8GK4P1PM_-QfllfTcYrBlLTdEE7imaaJHBWveUM8U7gzXiya0plZuC_EgFOX5mjJWeyD8qulfIcyGLlT8QM3flve2KdvmkEKiOExvE_TAUflDt14u-AwAA__-N6WsT), as new high-tech vehicles soar to $60,000 and up. Experts call it a "war of features" and point to the higher profit margins luxury vehicles offer the industry.

Bottom line: "It's the least affordable car market in history," said Pat Ryan, CEO of car-shopping app Co-Pilot.
## Hot Dog Eating Champion Wins Again
Joey "Jaws" Chestnut ate 62 hot dogs in 10 minutes--nearly 19,000 calories--to win his eighth straight Mustard Belt at the 2023 Nathan's Hot Dog Eating Contest on Coney Island. clean_body: Meta Platforms, owner of Facebook and Instagram, plans to launch a rival to Twitter called "Threads." The move brings billionaire owners Mark Zuckerberg and Elon Musk into direct business competition. | | | | | | WEDNESDAY, JULY 5, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! It's summer beach season, and today we mark the 77th anniversary, at a Parisian swimming pool, of the It's named for the nuclear tests at the Bikini Atoll because its French designer sought a similar explosive reaction. In today's edition, we're discussing the most expensive new-car market in history, an evacuation of the White House when a mysterious powder was found in the West Wing, and a garden sighting of the rare hot-pink grasshopper. Have any suggestions? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . | Meta Targets Twitter With New App Meta Platforms, owner of Facebook and Instagram, plans to called "Threads." The move brings billionaire owners Mark Zuckerberg and Elon Musk into direct business competition. Meta will allow new Threads users to Instagram with them. Instagram has billions of users compared to 250 million on Twitter, so Meta can potentially swamp Twitter in terms of sheer size. A listing for the Threads app already appears in the Apple App Store, billed as a "text-based conversation app," and it's expected to be ready to download as soon as tomorrow. New Car Prices Soar to Record Highs Car makers are increasingly targeting the luxury market, leaving costing less than $30,000. That's down from 38% before the pandemic. Kiplinger's identifies only ten new car models , as new high-tech vehicles soar to $60,000 and up. Experts call it a "war of features" and point to the higher profit margins luxury vehicles offer the industry. Bottom line: "It's the least affordable car market in history," said Pat Ryan, CEO of car-shopping app Co-Pilot. Hot Dog Eating Champion Wins Again Joey "Jaws" Chestnut ate 62 hot dogs in 10 minutes--nearly 19,000 calories--to win his eighth straight Mustard Belt at the 2023 Nathan's Hot Dog Eating Contest on Coney Island. () Chestnut is the acknowledged , breaking the world record in 2021 by gobbling 76. He's won the 50-year-old Nathan's contest 16 times. Earlier Tuesday, won the woman's championship, eating 39 hot dogs in 10 minutes--one short of her total last year. Ron DeSantis' super PAC admitted the campaign is trailing badly and faces an uphill battle against Donald Trump. The official, Steve Cortes, called Trump the "runaway frontrunner" for now. ()➤House Democrats introduced a bill to enact 18-year term limits for Supreme Court justices. Two-thirds of Americans favor term limits, according to a new AP-Norc poll, but the bill is seen as having little chance of passage. ()➤ The White House was briefly evacuated after the Secret Service discovered a suspicious powder--later identified as cocaine--in an area open to tours. President Biden was at Camp David at the time. ()➤ San Diego opened the first of two new "safe sleeping" areas designed to move homeless people off the city streets. The new tent campsite sits behind a barbed-wire fence and holds about 135 tents. () A Message From Your Captain Hello Flyover readers! Our crew of editors works extremely hard to deliver great, informative content to you daily. It's a challenging job that often stretches into the late hours of the night. Many of you have asked how you can thank them beyond just a note of encouragement. For you, we've set up a , if you'd like to say thank you. We totally understand that there are many who cannot afford to tip the crew - and The Flyover will always be free - but even a $5.00 tip to buy them a cup of coffee will go a long way. Special shoutout to Dean of OH and Timothy of WI for their already. THANK YOU! ❤️ In addition, thank you to the hundreds who have written us encouraging notes. You're the reason we created the Flyover and what keeps us going! \- The Captain ✈️ ➤ Atlanta**Braves outfielder Ronald Acuña Jr. became the first baseball player ever to record 20 home runs, 50 RBIs, and 40 stolen bases before the All-Star break. He stole his 39th and 40th bases Monday against the Minnesota Twins. ()➤ Two PGA Tour officials agreed to testify before a U.S. Senate panel next week investigating the tour's merger with Saudi-backed LIV Golf, but LIV officials declined, citing scheduling conflicts. ()➤ Chicago police issued citations for negligent driving to a man who snuck his Corvette onto the deserted NASCAR street circuit after this weekend's Cup race, hoping to get in a few laps on his own. Columbus, Ohio, ranks No. 1. Los Angeles and New York are among the worst, due to their high cost of living. () ➤ A federal judge restricted the Biden administration from communicating with social media platforms about content restrictions. The temporary injunction came in response to a lawsuit filed by Republican attorneys general. ()➤Astronomers say they've observed the early universe running in extreme slow motion, where time seems to flow five times slower. The scientists used quasars as "clocks" to measure time's passage. ()➤ A photographer spotted a pink grasshopper in his garden, a genetic mutant that is extremely rare. Pink grasshoppers are easy for predators to see, so they typically don't survive for long. () ➤A gunman wearing a bulletproof vest opened fire in a Philadelphia neighborhood Monday, killing five people and wounding two boys. Police captured the man and say the shootings appear random. ()➤****Eight rollercoaster riders were stuck upside down for three hours when their Fire Ball ride abruptly stopped. First responders eventually freed the group from the ride at a small county festival in Wisconsin. ()➤ **Grillo 's Pickles is suing rival Patriot Pickles, claiming the company stole its 100-year-old recipe to sell pickles at Whole Foods. The two companies had been partners before the relationship went from sweet to sour. His tax plans are directly aimed at your retirement investments.

And if you DON'T want to see your retirement income potentially take a double-digit tax hit...

You've got to move your money.

BEFORE he changes the laws.

Look, **Joe Biden has already said he 's making raising taxes a top priority**.

So make protecting what's yours a top priority, too.

Right now -- but potentially not for much longer -- a unique IRS loophole lets you move your IRA, 401(k), pension, TSP, or savings account into certain tax-advantaged investments that could protect you from Creepy Joe's greedy, grasping hands.

**You can move your money 100% tax- and penalty-free, too. For now.**

All the details are laid out for you in this FREE GUIDE to protecting your wealth and retirement savings.

name: Tim Scott
subject: I'm about to say something really controversial [WATCH VIDEO]
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
If you agree with me, will you show your support by chipping in $5, $25, or even $50?

| |
---
| | | I'm about to say something really controversial in Joe Biden's America.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62915838:6PSiaEINn:m:1:3299561967:85B7B1D5BCB2420ECB020959A60E1F86:r "WATCH MY VIDEO")

---
| | | [WATCH MY VIDEO - STAND WITH ME](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62915838:6PSiaEINn:m:1:3299561967:85B7B1D5BCB2420ECB020959A60E1F86:r "WATCH MY VIDEO - STAND WITH ME")
---

_If you 're able-bodied, you work.
If you take out a loan, you pay it back.
And if you commit a violent crime, you go to jail.
And if you're a man, you should play sports against men._
_America needs more victors and less victims._
I'm Tim Scott and I approve this message because these aren't just conservative values, they're American values. And as President, I will defend them.

**I 'm sharing this message in a TV ad! I need your help reaching more people in Iowa with this content so that we can WIN.**

**_[If you agree with me, will you show your support by chipping in today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62915838:6PSiaEINn:m:1:3299561967:85B7B1D5BCB2420ECB020959A60E1F86:r "If you agree with
me, will you show your support by chipping in $5, $25, or even $50?")_**

---
| | | [STAND WITH ME](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62915838:6PSiaEINn:m:1:3299561967:85B7B1D5BCB2420ECB020959A60E1F86:r "STAND WITH ME")
---

Thank you,

Tim Scott

---
* * *
---
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62915839:6PSiaEINn:m:1:3299561967:85B7B1D5BCB2420ECB020959A60E1F86:r "TIM SCOTT IS RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES - TELL
TIM HE'S GOT YOUR SUPPORT!")
---

I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62915839:6PSiaEINn:m:1:3299561967:85B7B1D5BCB2420ECB020959A60E1F86:r "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62915839:6PSiaEINn:m:1:3299561967:85B7B1D5BCB2420ECB020959A60E1F86:r "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE")
---

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

**This isn 't going to be easy.** I'll need your help to win.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62915839:6PSiaEINn:m:1:3299561967:85B7B1D5BCB2420ECB020959A60E1F86:r "I NEED YOUR HELP TO WIN!")
---

**_[Can you chip in to help me win?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62915839:6PSiaEINn:m:1:3299561967:85B7B1D5BCB2420ECB020959A60E1F86:r "Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?")_**

This campaign relies on very generous gifts from people just like you. Trust me, I know that times are tough in Joe Biden's America, so even if it's just $5 I would be so grateful.

Thank you for your support!

-Tim

name: CW24
subject: Welcome to Dr. Cornel West’s campaign for truth, justice and love
body:
Thank you for joining us on this journey with Dr. Cornel West

| [ ](http://www.cornelwest24.org/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=070523_welcometocw24&n=1)
---
Peter - Welcome to Dr. Cornel West’s campaign for President - a campaign for truth, justice and love. We are so grateful to you for joining us on this journey! Today we announce the completion of the campaign’s transition to the Green Party, with the Federal Election Commission requirements for this transition finally fulfilled. Now we begin building the people-powered rebellion — a movement already well underway across the nation. In doing so, we continue Dr. West’s lifelong work, drawing together social movements, independents, labor groups and non-corporate political parties free from the stranglehold of billionaires, bankers and party bosses. In the next few weeks we will be contacting all who’ve signed up to volunteer. For those who haven’t jumped in, we invite you to [join us on outreach, ballot access, phone banking, social media or hosting an event](https://www.cornelwest24.org/volunteer?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=070523_welcometocw24&n=2). As a small donor campaign, [we are powered by whatever you can throw into the hat](https://www.cornelwest24.org/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=070523_welcometocw24&n=3). For those who’ve already contributed we are grateful for your continuing support. This enables our fight to put Dr. West on the ballot for every voter across the nation, and to bring his message of renewal to a nation at the breaking point. As Dr. West puts it: _“We can end poverty, endless war, cop cities, mass incarceration and ecological collapse, and provide housing, health care, reproductive rights, reparations, education and thriving wages for all. People have had enough of organized greed, institutionalized hatred, and_ _normalized_ _indifference to the lives of poor and working people of all colors. Americans are abandoning the political parties that have brought us to this crisis, and demanding a politics of, by and for the people - a politics of courage to transform these bleak times.__Let’s reintroduce America to the best of itself, and demand the world of justice, truth and love we all deserve. Let’s do it together.”_ We look forward to the journey ahead! In love and struggle, Team Cornel West See today's press release [HERE](https://www.cornelwest24.org/press_release_070523?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=070523_welcometocw24&n=4)
[](http://www.cornelwest24.org/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=070523_welcometocw24&n=5)[http://www.cornelwest24.org/](http://www.cornelwest24.org/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=070523_welcometocw24&n=6)
Cornel West for President · PO Box 796711, Dallas, TX 75379, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.cornelwest24.org/unsubscribe?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=070523_welcometocw24&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.cornelwest24.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=070523_welcometocw24&n=8), software for leaders.

name: American Defense News
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0qkvgpt6lgkks8emrg81d59r902bptut3jp034g_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm4o76chh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z03tpa12kjheomrlpbbojn558nj6cdgk902hg8to_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm4o76chh2bs) [NO](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z55plho3e6vccjtgf8bumar05chdfnm1922fp56g_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm4o76chh2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu0aol4uujm3hme1lkkd3j5bq6rnju105t7jqhug_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm4o76chh2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z03k3df6bpv67a4lvj2joera76luhlht33j70si0_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm4o76chh2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztbp912spg16d99s4sfn086fhqnvulg8r2g972n8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljmcpj6cth2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm3mqist2ivedvppohqut50kb3omikbmi9o5uff0_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljmcpj6cth2bs) [NO](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3b8hmp6qe7684epnl92c64l953adiedv514210g_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljmcpj6cth2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zj89pbgf6lndqhprq070ml2ugvcksd1cno5hmr0o_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljmcpj6cth2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn61db11gic1ji09n5m71onkucq0fo12bjq9drsg_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljmcpj6cth2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z85874pqqhe5pf338o5974029n8jicctock0li0o_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljmcpj6cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p36chh61p324no)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zq6dkicqh2q2vpb4h49i1c304t5tmtt6abgvepd8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljmcpj6cth2bs)_

name: Scott Parkinson
subject: Tim Kaine's Hillary roots run deep

body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/c0705112e93ebb0e/922ed0f9618dbeb7c3d6b838967d376c/42903)
---
Dear Peter, **Hillary Clinton has clearly left her mark on Tim Kaine.** News broke recently that**Senator Kaine has purchased a luxury waterfront condo** from a lawyer at a **multi-billion dollar energy developer** that’s been **aggressively pushing for a massive Green New Deal wind project** in our state of Virginia. This comes after the news that Senator Kaine has **accepted nearly $100,000 in campaign contributions from the same company.** He’s also **worked hard to secure federal funding for the company** , Dominion Energy, by pushing regulators to fast-track the permitting process. This is a **_textbook Hillary Clinton move._** The American people are learning more and more every day that Senator Kaine is engaged in **potentially corrupt behavior.** **This is why we need to vote Tim Kaine out.** We’ve already more than halfway through 2023, and we will need financial resources if we’re going to be able to Fire Tim Kaine. When a career politician loses his way, it typically involves an abuse of power and a quid pro quo. Rather than serving his constituents, **Tim Kaine appears to be only serving himself.** Let’s **put an end to the Hillary-style corruption** in Washington. [Let’s fire Tim Kaine.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/638ea676cdd05cb5dc9f99905c540ea9/42903/c0705112e93ebb0e/b8301d233fa10880c3d6b838967d376c/42903)
