name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going to stand for that.
#

Peter -
I can trace my drive to achieve success to the first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.
Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going to stand for that.
Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs to name two. **
Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress.
The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht, the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals.
As I think about what’s next -- how to stand up to Senator Sinema -- what I learned growing up and during my time in the Marines is that I can’t do it alone.
I’ll need your help if we’re going to be ready against Sinema's mega donors, or for Kari Lake to enter the race. Because if we’re not, we’ll get swallowed up fast. So please:
[**Can you use this link to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford today? It all adds up when we’re all chipping in. And truthfully, that’s the only way we have a chance to win: together.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230705-1-7&t=1&akid=790%2E734936%2Ei5oyJt)

The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to sleep in would be amazed to see me today.

I’ll need your help if we’re going to be ready against Sinema's mega donors, or for Kari Lake to enter the race. Because if we’re not, we’ll get swallowed up fast. So please: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | | | | | | | ** The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to sleep in would be amazed to see me today. And I think the Marine that came home from Iraq would be proud, as well. Thanks Ruben Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

name: American Action News
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl0rd7pl9s6rasknl8gsl55rglk4lhbt52dj1dl8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm2or2cph2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zja44k3b1a92dmq1v69to8vmgamt11bdbfvv2hk0_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm2or2cph2bs) [NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z469r4knbgmkk2ur69pdnoc2qpqj7a08asmluqbo_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm2or2cph2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z29k18q0iblif0uicdsdii73shk71tfl5f3tgqm8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm2or2cph2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6taq0g61etomfve0go0trrj1bu9bbp1qa0ho12g_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm2or2cph2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlqj7071ba1tebj5bj7rto4stkinucq8qq310798_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni68pj4c9ie4oh1k8gn48n24hhm1o75ctgm6oj6c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zca8c15qardmr3mvard2jtgj8vhr1s535gdmoqf8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm2or2cph2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7mbrp4n30ven53aei661oo6kr2s0s6lgerejrl0_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm2or2cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Colin Allred
subject: Why Texas Is So Important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter: This race is bigger than defeating Ted Cruz. Our
Democratic Senate majority and the White House are on the line in 2024.

The future of our democracy and so many of our fundamental rights, from
voting to reproductive freedom, depend on Democrats winning.
Unfortunately, the 2024 Senate map strongly favors Republicans.

But here's the thing: Experts at CNN and FiveThirtyEight are calling Texas
our BEST pickup opportunity – and if we can flip this seat, Democrats are
virtually guaranteed to defend the Senate!

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18987?t=1001&akid=3369%2E346206%2EBfvqut ]Please, split a donation of $25 or more between my campaign and Charles
Booker before our midnight deadline to help Colin Allred beat Ted Cruz,
flip Texas blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority! →

Our chances have never looked better to flip Texas: This team raised more
in our first 24 hours than Ted Cruz raised in the first three months of
the year, causing Inside Elections to update their official Texas ranking
from "Solid Republican" to "Battleground." People are calling this the
political fight of Ted Cruz's life.

That’s why Mitch McConnell, GOP mega donors and shady special interests
are going to spend whatever it takes to save Ted Cruz and defeat Colin.

But we've got to keep up our momentum, friend, and that's where you come
in. We have an ambitious $150,000 daily fundraising goal because in a
battleground race, money could be the difference between winning and
losing. Right now, we're falling short, and we're counting on you to help
close the gap.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18987?t=1002&akid=3369%2E346206%2EBfvqut ]Please, will you split a donation of $25 or more between our campaign
and Charles Booker to help us defeat Ted Cruz? Every dollar matters in our
fight to flip Texas blue and protect the Senate – and the future of our
democracy – from Cruz and his allies →

Thank you for being a critical part of this grassroots team.

Team Allred

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230705-3369-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3369_346206_Bfvqut&akid=3369%2E346206%2EBfvqut

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3369%2E346206%2EBfvqut

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

body:

| |

---
| | | Friend, Joe Biden is in court RIGHT NOW to authorize Chinese nationals to buy up American land.
**[Sign our official petition to BAN Chinese land buys>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfb78btjlljkrt5884dpar9ah7g7bf725npkuk18_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljmapb1c9h2bs "Sign our official petition to BAN Chinese land buys")**

So can we count on your support before midnight? Your signature is very, VERY important.

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztsl3rofhvo4t7k0rkklo3bjb3bte7irbsioojro_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm6ob2cth2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgqe51pbgmn07dkju8d52hd9onili5pga89r4av8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm6ob2cth2bs) [NO](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfmpdj0f3ufbhvbp6aed2gec7vjkelf8ovc2uh4o_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm6ob2cth2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z27j1demfgs044pejse2l5g10k2hiigu42t6rn48_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm6ob2cth2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zispfqtcmqq1851cb8tdflgp26ikqjg16h0tmbbo_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm6ob2cth2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbfcnt45a9rlavaukgj9e13fudjcj78c16pgp6ko_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p36chj68or246h22sh2s8i66o70sljm6ob2cth2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3ubt946i7p96f8vckuvqjnodidprligejkhiing_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm6ob2cth2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zipu1nh04gcu9v96q5h99psdeltiaafifm6agom0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or0s3imeor1c9jm49fg)

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to undermine the separation of powers at the heart of limited government. I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order. That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court." Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty. Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away--the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA 1600 Daily 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

clean_body: = = Shawn Wilson here, Peter. I am reaching out to you because we're facing a crucial challenge that only your support can help us overcome. As my campaign gains momentum month after month, we're now facing a make-or-break moment – our upcoming filing deadline on the 7th. This milestone is absolutely critical for our campaign's success in taking the lead in this race. To be competitive and come out on top, we need to raise $5,000 before our filing deadline. Believe me, Peter, when I say this is incredibly important. With Election Day rapidly approaching, time is running out to make the moves that will truly make a difference. That's why your support is crucial. I'm reaching out personally to ask for your help. No matter the amount, every contribution brings us closer to achieving our goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you for being part of this journey. Shawn Wilson | | = | = = Wilson for Louisiana P.O. Box 4572 Baton Rouge, LA 70821 Paid for by Wilson for Louisiana

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Biden isn’t wasting any time
body:
His ad claims it’s all about freedom, but his actions show the opposite.

| [ ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvdljbr4ooruiqr3jfs6gcf16f823g2ptffvgdv8_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm9p36cjh2bs)
---
Friend,

Five seconds.

That's how long it took President Biden to endorse abortion in his latest campaign ad. It's what he's running on. It's what he stands for: Taxpayer-funded abortion on demand up to birth.

His ad claims it's all about freedom, but his actions show the opposite.

Since coming into office, the Biden administration has worked to:
* Illegally force American taxpayers to fund abortion with their hard-earned dollars.
* Ignore violent threats and attacks on pro-life organizations and individuals.
* Trample on the rights of parents and healthcare providers.

Just six days after being sworn in, Biden signed an executive order to repeal the Global Protect Life policy--forcing American taxpayers to fund groups promoting abortion overseas. But he didn't stop there.

Within months, he rolled back President Trump's Protect Life Rule, funneling taxpayer dollars to abortion businesses through Title X. And he forced Americans to fund abortion in his Covid-19 relief package!

On top of all this, the Biden administration has been weaponizing the DOJ against the pro-life community. They put a target on anyone how dares to tell the truth that abortion takes the life of an innocent child--all while ignoring violence against peaceful pro-life organizations and individuals.

This is not only outrageous--it's dangerous.

But that hasn't stopped President Biden from going all-in on a radical pro-abortion agenda to fire up his base going into 2024. He is determined to rewrite all the rules--including the U.S. Constitution--to get his way.

That's why I'm emailing you today.

SBA Pro-Life America is fighting back against the Biden administration and its radical abortion agenda every single day. Our team is working around the clock to advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns. And we are fighting to end abortion by electing national leaders who advocate for laws that save lives--with a special calling to promote pro-life women leaders.

**[But in order to do this critical work, we need your help.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z76kvlarssmkvp3rabvmg7tlvshmahjck7g51s58_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm9p36cjh2bs)**

Your gift today will allow us to expand our policy research efforts to further educate lawmakers across the country. And it will help us to grow our voter education initiative to ensure that pro-life Americans know the truth about where the Biden administration and other pro-abortion leaders stand on abortion.

You can make your gift right now using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stand-up-to-biden-harris](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm4eqv3mmjncco2ifnekamlrmsh35elq8eonckmo_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm9p36cjh2bs)**

But please remember that time is of the essence. As President Biden ramps up his campaign efforts, we must be prepared to counter him every step of the way.

That's why your gift is urgently needed now.

Make your gift today to fight back against the Biden administration using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stand-up-to-biden-harris](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj9028ktrtjph6hmbff7taifbb93ls4iqifli678_rp22sh2s8i66o70sljm9p36cjh2bs)**

By doing so, you will help advance a culture of life that protects unborn children and their mothers from abortion.

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

Pro Life Update
---

And it will help us to grow our voter education initiative to ensure that pro-life Americans know the truth about where the Biden administration and other pro-abortion leaders stand on abortion. You can make your gift right now using this secure link: But please remember that time is of the essence. As President Biden ramps up his campaign efforts, we must be prepared to counter him every step of the way. That's why your gift is urgently needed now. Make your gift today to fight back against the Biden administration using this secure link: ** By doing so, you will help advance a culture of life that protects unborn children and their mothers from abortion. For LIFE , Marjorie Dannenfelser President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. name: Vance Press Team
subject: Hillbilly on the Hill | July 5, 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=79c9b3a486c0473ab0d4decd8aeb6ff1&_e=OPVkSgKEDFP6xojtvcB0abh5CwG9c5-Y2ELZgG8U6RxyHZIP7tveea9FPxjJ2SUlVXjACUEYsDRBFchXm1mhJP-7PfYK29KBPe6HPhxYR3dHoL2aNGWNIifYK5gFTrCwGO7VRL2m7C5CZZ-Ti4y0mu5jjEMF3o_aaLue4xtjnu7VI7CKmnI6n0VflQ9U8ym_)
---
Happy 4th of July!

We can't believe it's already been 6 months since Senator Vance swore his Oath of Office to serve the Great State of Ohio in Washington.

We are grateful for your continued support and hope you enjoy this roundup of Senator Vance's latest happenings as much as we do. [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=79c9b3a486c0473ab0d4decd8aeb6ff1&_e=OPVkSgKEDFP6xojtvcB0aRDiZD5nt5rX-yIabK6ODUOJLTG4fa6bAE0HwUnW7kf26zau_LiSwb6ILQ3d2s0v3LgZ9eXw5hI3Xi4CKwSsejgIzzjake6T9G526m2994jLLqtSUo7iEy-mvY9s0zPL2xKmHa-oSRijb6FjwYrH2wlqV9JRRDvhT16VecWRJKYvNrTy0--nusk38SdcPrfZUpnSi_IccOTiJeb9uSi7I5UfQX4gp9_EeQTs3xJSQhU5oDu-TLISpfxogQbiYgX3pg%3D%3D) **' VANCE'S LONG-TERM PROJECT IS BUILDING A MORE POPULIST RIGHT'** ([Semafor](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=79c9b3a486c0473ab0d4decd8aeb6ff1&_e=OPVkSgKEDFP6xojtvcB0aRDiZD5nt5rX-yIabK6ODUOJLTG4fa6bAE0HwUnW7kf26zau_LiSwb6ILQ3d2s0v3LgZ9eXw5hI3Xi4CKwSsejgIzzjake6T9G526m2994jL2JndBVqFftKUNelwJzXeooykV30EGRJ481Ilhz2FUsjidCtr0VT5l99YSF-TKRE1BCf5XqdPgqV2t35mtO4I0Hy6D6GbDpBEPDhAnUh29ttUwYtjazwHtA0ovTtrFpfMAbIti9zVxhAxFKCC0VyfiA%3D%3D))-- On Tuesday morning, Ohio Sen. J.D. Vance rolled out the latest of his bipartisan bills -- a team-up with Wisconsin Sen. Tammy Baldwin that would require tech developed by taxpayer dollars to be built in America.

Hours later, Vance announced that he'd slow down nearly all Department of Justice confirmations to protest the prosecution of Donald Trump, who he said was "merely the latest victim" of an administration "that cares more about politics than law enforcement."

Six months into his Senate career, Vance has surprised Democrats with his eagerness to co-sponsor legislation and sell it to his conservative base. In an interview with Semafor, Vance said he was working to harmonize "the very justified MAGA impulse that conservatives never fight" with the "middle-of-the-road impulse that this town isn't doing anything."

Read the entire _Semafor_ piece [here.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=79c9b3a486c0473ab0d4decd8aeb6ff1&_e=OPVkSgKEDFP6xojtvcB0aRDiZD5nt5rX-yIabK6ODUOJLTG4fa6bAE0HwUnW7kf26zau_LiSwb6ILQ3d2s0v3LgZ9eXw5hI3Xi4CKwSsejgIzzjake6T9G526m2994jLf2Ol0nHUNVhOGryVSVdvxSX9PK0y5hUU3uUHaiHUvM03Ip4pq5idR0llArOHX7r6oWDXceJ25iOV-diG-pxGoSzxibEKv0oDdrrgoxDrGyFbvQRh7q5fCs_lDrVjbstue-Wfcdm1THh2_dxlqMl7WA%3D%3D) [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=79c9b3a486c0473ab0d4decd8aeb6ff1&_e=OPVkSgKEDFP6xojtvcB0aTOh-FT7I3ti5jsW-d8XthQnR8AiBX64U8Q8VGzWvomL5V8l6YbUIC1Lq6X6YuB8xz195mr4YalJYKBCHVd_2UKXsVWWdIQIJxdFBjk0Ue7lX0Em7y2F96ubj7NuUaslpJKtYFBq7_tW3ewii09AGnUEOGYtd5anEpMAAw5hwcR9O1w5FdlOyp6HWxT-kYVe8hobe2dHUfHuYn6xSjuqaxUxjlSE-yW-VuwI6POZAXYmmf2N7FsTIXNLc-Ht3J5rHOL5i09aZX40eWKmV3HZmfjeNNvN2YYsmbqrFRXg1-0xhpuFBHtQkGoxMeU_MFnbsw%3D%3D) **' TAXPAYER-FUNDED INNOVATIONS SHOULD BENEFIT AMERICAN WORKERS AND INDUSTRY, NOT OUR FOREIGN ADVERSARIES'** ([Fox News](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=79c9b3a486c0473ab0d4decd8aeb6ff1&_e=OPVkSgKEDFP6xojtvcB0aTOh-FT7I3ti5jsW-d8XthQnR8AiBX64U8Q8VGzWvomL5V8l6YbUIC1Lq6X6YuB8xz195mr4YalJYKBCHVd_2UKXsVWWdIQIJxdFBjk0Ue7lX0Em7y2F96ubj7NuUaslpJKtYFBq7_tW3ewii09AGnXtzL_iD99jTgBeYuu5BQTyhrXkOC7OPSycKog8gE9EuZ_JRIi_cgG3Ge10hquYTGCsxJno2m0Hv7HgNVbKeBgxDdsBZA93OL0B-8H2qhm6iLcCpXZcU0QsAu0SuEckZLELQapXJp9F008Wl1gxZRpwrF5CDnj2uO3aNzLEcf_LnQ%3D%3D)) -- A bipartisan effort in the Senate is underway to ban China and other hostile countries from manufacturing any American taxpayer-funded technologies.

On Tuesday, Sens. Tammy Baldwin, D-Wis., and JD Vance, R-Ohio, introduced the Invent Here, Make Here Act of 2023 which requires all federal agencies that commercialize taxpayer-funded research to invent new products to license only to American manufacturers.

"Taxpayer-funded innovations should benefit American workers and industry, not our foreign adversaries. For far too long, we've allowed American breakthroughs to be offshored to nations like China and Russia - this legislation will bring those abuses to an end," Vance said. "It's common sense: products developed with American taxpayer dollars should be manufactured by American workers on American soil."

Read the whole _Fox News_ article [here](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=79c9b3a486c0473ab0d4decd8aeb6ff1&_e=OPVkSgKEDFP6xojtvcB0aTOh-FT7I3ti5jsW-d8XthQnR8AiBX64U8Q8VGzWvomL5V8l6YbUIC1Lq6X6YuB8xz195mr4YalJYKBCHVd_2UKXsVWWdIQIJxdFBjk0Ue7lX0Em7y2F96ubj7NuUaslpJKtYFBq7_tW3ewii09AGnWsZy3IhyLo_20qjlfWOSGGbs4DsQDR9s6MHpBFBGV-_J1qc1J3kzCQvdkBMYW-MDEhiIhBIBuMIWIciyV4kthohHNH9NB6FGmkDN4BT7flkZYeZ1uaDmHrEpdplsK0xQMOkvtBvC3MxtJGSwZo9zuz9MqZINYRyEp0sJzaCj9kvw%3D%3D). [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=79c9b3a486c0473ab0d4decd8aeb6ff1&_e=OPVkSgKEDFP6xojtvcB0aTOh-FT7I3ti5jsW-d8XthQnR8AiBX64U8Q8VGzWvomL5V8l6YbUIC1Lq6X6YuB8xz195mr4YalJYKBCHVd_2UKXsVWWdIQIJxdFBjk0Ue7lX0Em7y2F96ubj7NuUaslpJKtYFBq7_tW3ewii09AGnUPkilco3bRsArXHt7pLSKoyA2idRIOwWORmAayBFAnrhOL7Ns9JnVm6LH2WABSunVo-Ocfw68Mrx1hp1-pGn9gVK6Gf_3YoQpL-DIfP29NWsrWpp8GB9R3Gyyp0ROlptRTpByREI1C7mEhKn1OYtqchnOOdVXaUw2pMRpD8_1P3w%3D%3D) J.D. Vance's (R-OH) amendment to prevent megabank consolidations has advanced out of the Senate Banking Committee.

The Recovering Executive Compensation from Unaccountable Practices (RECOUP) Act addresses executive accountability following recent bank failures by strengthening certain existing authorities regarding senior executives. The bill also requires banks to adopt forward-looking, corporate governance and accountability standards to promote responsible management and provides clawback authority in the event of a bank failure.

**Vance said of the measure:**

"One of the things that we learned from the SVB [Silicon Valley Bank] crisis and much of the fallout is that the big banks have a lower cost of capital. But if that leads to concentration and if we don't do anything to stop it, we're going to wake up in a country that has three or four massive banks and no small and regional banks for our financial system.

"That's a disaster for our country. It's a disaster for our small businesses and our consumers. We should do more to try to preserve the regional banking system of our country. I think it's good for our people, it's good for our country, and we don't want to be like Europe, where they just have two or three massive national banks and no other alternatives for their consumers."

clean_body: | Happy 4th of July! We can't believe it's already been 6 months since Senator Vance swore his Oath of Office to serve the Great State of Ohio in Washington. We are grateful for your continued support and hope you enjoy this roundup of Senator Vance's latest happenings as much as we do. ' VANCE'S LONG-TERM PROJECT IS BUILDING A MORE POPULIST RIGHT' ()-- On Tuesday morning, Ohio Sen. J.D. Vance rolled out the latest of his bipartisan bills -- a team-up with Wisconsin Sen. Tammy Baldwin that would require tech developed by taxpayer dollars to be built in America. Hours later, Vance announced that he'd slow down nearly all Department of Justice confirmations to protest the prosecution of Donald Trump, who he said was "merely the latest victim" of an administration "that cares more about politics than law enforcement." Six months into his Senate career, Vance has surprised Democrats with his eagerness to co-sponsor legislation and sell it to his conservative base. In an interview with Semafor, Vance said he was working to harmonize "the very justified MAGA impulse that conservatives never fight" with the "middle-of-the-road impulse that this town isn't doing anything." Read the entire Semafor piece ' TAXPAYER-FUNDED INNOVATIONS SHOULD BENEFIT AMERICAN WORKERS AND INDUSTRY, NOT OUR FOREIGN ADVERSARIES' () -- A bipartisan effort in the Senate is underway to ban China and other hostile countries from manufacturing any American taxpayer-funded technologies. On Tuesday, Sens. Tammy Baldwin, D-Wis., and JD Vance, R-Ohio, introduced the Invent Here, Make Here Act of 2023 which requires all federal agencies that commercialize taxpayer-funded research to invent new products to license only to American manufacturers. "Taxpayer-funded innovations should benefit American workers and industry, not our foreign adversaries. For far too long, we've allowed American breakthroughs to be offshored to nations like China and Russia - this legislation will bring those abuses to an end," Vance said. "It's common sense: products developed with American taxpayer dollars should be manufactured by American workers on American soil." Read the whole Fox News article . ****WATCH SENATOR VANCE ON ' IF MERRICK GARLAND WANTS TO USE THESE OFFICIALS TO HARASS JOE BIDEN'S POLITICAL OPPONENTS, WE WILL GRIND HIS DEPARTMENT TO A HALT' () -- U.S. Sen. JD Vance announced Tuesday that he will delay U.S. Senate approval of all Justice Department nominees as a protest of "the unprecedented political prosecution" of former President Donald Trump by President Joe Biden's Department of Justice. Read Cleveland.com 's entire article WATCH SENATOR VANCE'S STATEMENT ' WE LIVE IN A THIRD WORLD COUNTRY WITH A TWO-TIERED JUSTICE SYSTEM' () -- The actions of the corrupt Department of Justice should stand as a warning to all Americans: if the leader of our great nation could fall victim to such an injustice the same can happen for anybody. President Trump's indictment further perpetuates the fact that we have succumbed as a nation to a banana republic, whose elite class decides the winners and the losers. It is a blatant, disgusting interference in the 2024 election and demonstrates extreme hypocrisy and attempted distraction from the allegations of Joe Biden's illegal activity revealed. President Trump has before and will again deliver real lasting policies for Americans while the woke Left continues its charade of sham indictments. Read Senator Vance's full statement . ' YOU DO EVERYTHING THAT YOU CAN' () -- All eyes are on the two-day NTSB hearing from around the area but also on Capitol Hill. "I don't think enough is being done for the people of East Palestine," Republican Sen. JD Vance said. "I think there are a lot of resources that should be going to the people there." "You do everything that you can," Vance said. "You try to shake every tree for resources, you try to get people on the ground to put together the coalitions." Meanwhile, the Rail Safety Bill they jointly proposed shortly after the Feb. 3 derailment faces a bit of a delay from the anticipated June Senate vote. Vance said: "I feel very confident we're going to get a vote in July, and then it's on to the House." Watch the whole story : "You had a bank that was terribly mismanaged, a CEO paying himself millions of dollars in bonuses, and yet when the taxpayers got put on the hook, they had no recourse...that's a problem we've got to fix," Vance said. Watch Senator Vance joining Neil Cavuto : ' WE SHOULD DO MORE TO PRESERVE THE REGIONAL BANKING SYSTEM OF OUR COUNTRY' () -- Sen. J.D. Vance's (R-OH) amendment to prevent megabank consolidations has advanced out of the Senate Banking Committee. The Recovering Executive Compensation from Unaccountable Practices (RECOUP) Act addresses executive accountability following recent bank failures by strengthening certain existing authorities regarding senior executives. The bill also requires banks to adopt forward-looking, corporate governance and accountability standards to promote responsible management and provides clawback authority in the event of a bank failure. Vance said of the measure: "One of the things that we learned from the SVB [Silicon Valley Bank] crisis and much of the fallout is that the big banks have a lower cost of capital. But if that leads to concentration and if we don't do anything to stop it, we're going to wake up in a country that has three or four massive banks and no small and regional banks for our financial system. "That's a disaster for our country. It's a disaster for our small businesses and our consumers. We should do more to try to preserve the regional banking system of our country. I think it's good for our people, it's good for our country, and we don't want to be like Europe, where they just have two or three massive national banks and no other alternatives for their consumers." Read Breitbart 's full article . " We can't have a situation where five years from now, ten years from now, the people of East Palestine still don't feel safe in their own homes. That's going to take a lot of work." - Senator Vance Watch more : Senator JD Vance continues to deliver for all of Ohio as a conservative outsider in the United States Senate. | Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc. subject: Stepping down as Lt. Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
Please see my full statement

| |
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661652%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0wKjx1KTOc3sv81yGmOYdQ&sysid=1)

**MARK ROBINSON RESPONDS AFTER RADICAL DEMOCRATS CALL ON HIM TO RESIGN**
---

In 2018 we made American history & humiliated the radical Democrats when I became the first black Lt. Governor of North Carolina.

**But because I’m a conservative that blows a hole in their sacred narrative, they called on me to step down before I was sworn in and they called for my impeachment after I took the oath of office. **

Those calls continue to this day- and that is all they will ever be.

And now I’m the leading conservative candidate running for Governor of North Carolina.

Every poll shows this is going to be the closest race in America.

But Joe Biden & the liberal elite are spending millions to permanently end my candidacy because of who I am & what I represent. My existence as a black conservative enrages them.

They hate that I was able to pick myself up by my bootstraps to pursue the American Dream & determine my own destiny.

**They hate that the first black Governor of North Carolina could be a Republican like me & with your support today, it most certainly will.**
**[SUPPORT MARK ROBINSON FOR GOVERNOR](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661653%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XMPBkWhqv0DXoxGB19ocjQ&sysid=1)**
---

I won’t beat around the bush a minute more- this is the most important battleground race in the nation & together we can deliver Joe Biden & the liberal narrative a humiliating & historic upset.

**So I’m humbly asking if you’ll support me with your kindness & generosity just one more time before my first quarterly deadline since we kicked off this campaign a few weeks ago. **
**[SUPPORT MARK ROBINSON FOR GOVERNOR](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c661653%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XMPBkWhqv0DXoxGB19ocjQ&sysid=1)**
---

This is the most important race in the nation & so is this first deadline of mine so I hope I can count on you one more time before it's too late.

THANK YOU.

-Mark Robinson

name: Monica Crowley
subject: The Sun puts the Times to shame
body:
The New York Sun needs us, and America needs The New York Sun.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zg6tr7kc4aevf10c2v0um867p87ktvu5u2p2k2qg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t75msrj8or4slrm1plh64q6at1kcsr3atpj6sqn8t9m6arjcd1gmpjr1pph6grjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3curm0pjhmsqj0ptmchj32c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhm1o75c3g60ob3c8iv0)

---
|
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zie8aertl4igu8ju98715t7guoo99lo0u30oktj8_rp22sh2s8i66o70slge0o31cdh2bs)
---
**FROM THE DESK OF MONICA CROWLEY** Throughout my career, I’ve been on both sides of the media equation. ** ** I’ve been honored to serve two presidents and to have seen the inside of newsrooms from Fox News to MSNBC. ** ** Bad journalism is everywhere. Most newspapers have chosen a side, and it's not yours. Instead of holding the corrupt and powerful accountable, they are protecting them. They are a menace to our republic. ** ** But good journalism still exists - and it's thriving at The New York Sun! Founded in 1833, 18 years before the New York Times, the Sun puts that paper to shame. ** ** The Sun is committed to "safeguarding liberty" and "speaking out the sentiment" of the American people. Principled and relentless, it’s a paper that fights for us. Its editors are some of the smartest and fairest in the business, including famed editor-in-chief Seth Lipsky. ** ** The Sun is making waves, but it’s up against the biggest and best funded media giants in the industry. ** ** The Sun has a secret weapon though: readers like you and me who are committed to joining the effort to build a better press. That’s how we do it in America. ** ** Membership starts at just 1c a day. You can't beat that! So please join me in this groundbreaking effort. ** ** The New York Sun needs us, and America needs The New York Sun.
---
[**Join the Sun Now →**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z13069dema3n1pkbf17307hb93fa9i76d4hro7r8_rp22sh2s8i66o70slge0o31cdh2bs)
---
**Sign up today and make a real difference.** ** ** **See you on the other side!**
---
---
**Monica Crowley** Subscriber, The New York Sun

name: Senator Hawley
subject: A slap in the face
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, After several whistleblowers exposed the “investigations” into Hunter Biden’s blatant tax evasion as a sham, we’ve lost even more faith than we already had in the FBI, the IRS, and the Department of Justice under Joe Biden. **Hunter Biden getting away with these crimes just because his dad is in the White House is a slap in the face to every American who follows the law and pays their taxes.** _With Joe Biden and his family getting away with blatant corruption and criminal activity, the rule of law is eroding more and more every day in this country._ **It’s time to do something to restore law and order.** **[We’re not asking for money today, we just need your signature. Will you sign our petition DEMANDING accountability for Hunter Biden’s crimes today?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=68ed99dd4539449e89678410b4a89af4&_e=gRUUOACCFlD_ILyoNR0_33pcuva3MUeXKQgrvk9GAykiDb7Vwlt5vuX1kBlDOHSqW1JaQn8VvV5CiSnHoiKGVrI33Jvsws_X3to7A79plA1pDjsXrJbHv9iQ-SenUuXg4yxlcUPyhFn2SQWGgGm1K-zOtvO57kpNdxzQhfzMv4mm41-BhTRXSX4k5sVeBWZGD-40TOkWXze1jV2otjlDngstXgHkeLprvJgOOlloNhsVN03wTiQMCvYAFAScHmx7QAx1r6KhCAZSjSqJhY_R7y1FkOI3zyl0Aj0IH9WOpAi9_IauQRyfIUnOjjEwaQ1IcuL1FSc-uLs2RCGJKt7qYKjnGZ64UylaRtyuoPjHz1xu4ckPY-AD4EJQyHwTQAWww9lecDYAOax81WAQesOtLQ%3D%3D)**

[**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=68ed99dd4539449e89678410b4a89af4&_e=gRUUOACCFlD_ILyoNR0_33pcuva3MUeXKQgrvk9GAykiDb7Vwlt5vuX1kBlDOHSqW1JaQn8VvV5CiSnHoiKGVrI33Jvsws_X3to7A79plA1pDjsXrJbHv9iQ-SenUuXg4yxlcUPyhFn2SQWGgGm1K-zOtvO57kpNdxzQhfzMv4mm41-BhTRXSX4k5sVeBWZGD-40TOkWXze1jV2otjlDngstXgHkeLprvJgOOlloNhsVN03wTiQMCvYAFAScHmx7x8o07l0hkEz6yQa82tVeCc91-Z8E_QHlF13ofl31F3EMVHqE9zZcwtg8165umbFDt036dC7tBdryHa5hP3INl3ikAxz6YgeYlJ3kluvCeujy_lbo8jytTJpzFnHKcYMxXWA-3W24qmDTKMycxoyv_A%3D%3D)

Peter, America was founded on equal treatment under the law.

But in Joe Biden’s America, we have a two-tiered justice system: high-ranking Democrats and their friends can get away with anything, while conservatives are silenced and thrown behind bars.

_If our founding fathers could see our political system today, they’d be SHOCKED and HORRIFIED at what the Left is doing._

We need _every single patriot_ to step up if we’re going to take back our country and re-establish the rule of law, and that’s why we’re asking you to sign on today.

[**Please, sign our petition to hold Hunter Biden accountable NOW and DEMAND action for his crimes.**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=68ed99dd4539449e89678410b4a89af4&_e=gRUUOACCFlD_ILyoNR0_33pcuva3MUeXKQgrvk9GAykiDb7Vwlt5vuX1kBlDOHSqW1JaQn8VvV5CiSnHoiKGVrI33Jvsws_X3to7A79plA1pDjsXrJbHv9iQ-SenUuXg4yxlcUPyhFn2SQWGgGm1K-zOtvO57kpNdxzQhfzMv4mm41-BhTRXSX4k5sVeBWZGD-40TOkWXze1jV2otjlDngstXgHkeLprvJgOOlloNhsVN03wTiQMCvYAFAScHmx7rtQjT3BtAuVCmqWUotVYcXGMrlxrNYoHYOmmFBVm-mfb2Xh5mCPgtnFujmWcP36u2fjB-EHx5TH-IH0Q4r_iNhkAYXbilXSmTPEgXEVRQYvyjfOrrB44cmDVdl3FU1yxc5_iUxgwSft6LIoaLQR9yA%3D%3D)
---
Thank you,

We just finished up our second end-of-quarter filing period, and I want to say THANK YOU for helping power our campaign forward.

This was a big moment for our campaign, and we met the moment. To take back the House majority, we must win in toss-up races like ours. Early investments make a big difference and will set us up for success.

While the race is still a ways away, I’m working hard in the House to deliver for Ohioans – as I’ve done my entire career. I’m grateful that you’re on my team along the way.

Thank you for everything,

Marcy Kaptur
---

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsLGy3ZDN0

Hillsdale College

Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its
National Referendum on the Administrative State.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osLGy3ZDN0

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

Hillsdale College has selected you to
participate in its National Referendum on the Administrative
State.

Do you agree that there is a double
standard for members of the administrative state-that the ruling
elite is not required to follow the same rules as other
Americans?

YES

NO

Responding will only take a few
minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right
away…because our country is facing a constitutional
crisis.

It's a crisis that involves a
fundamental political question: who rules whom?

The Constitution established a limited
government in which the people ruled through their elected
officials. Under this form of government, America became the
freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional
system is one that increasingly exists in name only.

The Constitution of "We the People" is
being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable
administrative state that rules without the consent of American
citizens.

This means we live in an era of growing
bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state
that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers,
and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

But we can't just TALK about the
problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION-to DO SOMETHING about it,
while there's still time to save our country.

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to
returning to the Constitution of "We the People"-before it's too
late.

To do that, I need your input. What are
your opinions on this topic-knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS
that will restore liberty?

Please let me know your thoughts today
by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State
using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61996145:sLGy3ZDN0:m:3:2532013465:8A38D228109703E9EAC6157EC28FD147:r

Thank you for being on the side of the
Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty
Since 1844

Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI
49242 USA

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isLGy3ZDN0

clean_body: Hillsdale College Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Referendum on the Administrative State. Please see a special message from our sponsor: Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Referendum on the Administrative State. Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state-that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans? YES NO Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away…because our country is facing a constitutional crisis. It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: who rules whom? The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history. Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens. This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations. But we can't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION-to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. That is why I'm writing to you today. Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"-before it's too late. To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic-knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty? Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link: Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty! Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. subject: drunk on power?

body:
We had to endure Oreweillian lockdowns and mandates because of this...
| | | [](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/46e795745e65a55b/e6973b6b6aa949f7c3d6b838967d376c/40933)

Friend, Since the day he took office, Gov. Andy Beshear has been a disaster, dismantling our constitutional rights and liberty – _right before our very eyes._ He imposed Orwellian lockdowns on Kentuckians, not because he was doing what he thought was best for the Commonwealth, but because he was drunk on power. **It’s time for a change in Frankfort, and it’s time for bold conservative leadership in the governor’s office to correct the course we’re on. That’s why I’m supporting Daniel Cameron.** Daniel has a record of defending conservative values and upholding the Constitution. His bold leadership will correct the dangerous path Andy Beshear has us on. Friend, if we’re going to protect our constitutional rights and freedoms here in Kentucky, it’s going to take all of us working together. **[_Will you chip in now to stand with me and support Daniel Cameron?_](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/46e795745e65a55b/7bfda56aac2ffa67c3d6b838967d376c/40933)**

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td6fc9f60-704f-4854-a30f-a84f8207354f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | After several tragic mass shootings over the past few days throughout the country which killed 9 people and injured dozens of others, President Biden is renewing his calls for stricter gun laws and common sense gun reform. Biden has promised to sign new gun legislation “immediately” – so we need Congress to get to work and send a bill to Biden’s desk ASAP. [Sign your name to demand they get it done >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1087baa2-b60a-4248-9caf-0493f2c56de6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Congress’ inaction after every mass shooting is unacceptable. The NRA has too many of our leaders in a chokehold and we need to fight back by demanding Congress act. We need stricter gun laws – our lives depend on it. We can’t afford to wait any longer. [Tell Congress: Send gun control legislation to Biden’s desk ASAP! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T56289bae-3998-4e9f-9cc9-af2909ecbf87/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Friend, During my time serving as Florida's 46th governor, we went through one of the most pivotal moments in our nation's history: the Covid crisis. It fell upon the shoulders of our nation and tested every one of our elected leaders. And that test was about more than just getting the policy right--_**it was about demonstrating true leadership. **_

Before, during, and after the pandemic, I've led Florida my own way--**bucking Fauci,** **bucking the establishment,** and **bucking the media. **
---
| [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=d3b7db762b3a4819ae58b4252f5b0968&_e=QaUJY3ImUOW6zmC7OICtkSXTTUbnTQZOpgmSYQDMRuJzx0BJzWwdHaaw8sQXh855OTT4MFEBh2cefzPYFv2y2D0QUTJAFtWqrBzZabMSaDbcI1kR84qhzmt8VWwOVrskpwUppL_oHd4QHc32q_bvN1YVCo1e7FJhOMPpaWPsoY7jVk6Uh4xj_3Dj8RjtbWshadprFJIfyHot8an_kGiiXUDlE10E0FFPEbiPXKVB8Pf2MXnkoTsM3llcoufTfJqG4QXwTWEHYl9zryWTeAm8jxaRTEEugQ6kwxhzT6f97gFMyUjFexWycDHfjn4LEX4kOUg8-DD2ADxvNnbd2mSd-WNuODMWx8yprvyxquwQArty4Ish9ryYKPeUiRU0y9y9TdcQgzJKpiooxPSujtlvne4snxn_8Clx2nymUj-zYc8Dm7v7gPVQu1dVUJtd4ZIg)
---

Unsurprisingly, this refusal to back down, my unwillingness to waiver, has brought on incoming daily assaults and smears like no governor has ever faced while many supporters have warned me to change course so I can remain in politics.

But, Friend, a leader does not put his own short-term political calculation ahead of the greater good. Leadership is not about entertainment. It's not about building a brand. It's not about virtue signaling. _**Leadership is ultimately about producing results for the people that you represent --the people that you serve.**_ To produce these results, we must defeat Biden, restore energy to the executive, and reinstate common sense as a common virtue across our nation.

This starts with:
* Swiftly and completely securing our Southern border

* Rebuilding the post-Covid economy in a way that supports our working families and our seniors hardest hit by inflation

* Ensuring our school systems are designed to focus on educating our kids--NOT indoctrinating them

In Florida, even my most significant political adversaries have acknowledged that when the governor says he's going to do something, he is going to do it.

Friend, you can take that to the bank.

As I lay out my vision for America, you can rest assured that I WILL follow through. I do not make campaign promises that I do not mean or cannot achieve.

I pledge to you, Friend, that as President, I will be an energetic executive who will go on offense to take the big issues head-on. I will never shy away from a fight because the media or the Left doesn't like it. We are going to reverse Biden's disastrous policies. _**And we are going to start on DAY ONE. **_

As the campaign heats up and the Left begins to pour even more money into attack tactics to cripple our Great American Comeback, I'm going to need your support to stand up and stand strong. **[Will you join me?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=d3b7db762b3a4819ae58b4252f5b0968&_e=QaUJY3ImUOW6zmC7OICtkSXTTUbnTQZOpgmSYQDMRuJzx0BJzWwdHaaw8sQXh855OTT4MFEBh2cefzPYFv2y2D0QUTJAFtWqrBzZabMSaDbcI1kR84qhzmt8VWwOVrskpwUppL_oHd4QHc32q_bvN1YVCo1e7FJhOMPpaWPsoY7jVk6Uh4xj_3Dj8RjtbWshadprFJIfyHot8an_kGiiXUDlE10E0FFPEbiPXKVB8Pf2MXnkoTsM3llcoufTfJqG4QXwTWEHYl9zryWTeAm8jxaRTEEugQ6kwxhzT6f97gEdBUxZT3-gTe_VXode557qgi8QBc14Bg6eS6KSgvUuOzdWWCQ0_uEqhecva-pxLlmiYGds2gj6tMsN_sYB86f2PBNQb0isQoX6mwnKm0Y16LDRZwBpXvMqQN_mdqjjOKbKT0xWPkJ2nYKr3x8mt8hM "Will you join me, FNAME?") **

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

As the campaign heats up and the Left begins to pour even more money into attack tactics to cripple our Great American Comeback, I'm going to need your support to stand up and stand strong. "Will you join me, FNAME?" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Let's prove to the Left that we have the strength to defeat any adversary. Success is attainable. Decline is a choice. And freedom is worth fighting for. Are you ready to join the team? In Freedom, | Ron DeSantis Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. – But top Republicans are raising STAGGERING sums — [**$50 million in just three months**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65968717/415025607/-1810142053?refcode=20230705_em_fr_b1_raja_30_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWMxZDhiMi00NDFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XKnBipccSvDli2sqKVJRNAHMBEe13FxAP1h4Ua6Utpo=) — to crush our momentum and buy themselves another two years in power. Peter, let me be clear: [_**_I hate asking hard-working folks like you for money — but if we want to compete with MAGA Republicans’ deep pockets, it’s absolutely CRITICAL we step up our game. I’m running a people-powered campaign and your support will determine my campaign’s ability to reach out to every last voter, combat right-wing lies with the truth, and stop McCarthy’s MAGA extremists from ever holding power again. That’s why I’m personally asking, Peter — will you rush $15 to help me restore our House Majority? I know this grassroots movement can stand up to the GOP and win back the House, but I need you on board to do it. >> _**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65968718/415025608/-1810142053?refcode=20230705_em_fr_b1_raja_30_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWMxZDhiMi00NDFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XKnBipccSvDli2sqKVJRNAHMBEe13FxAP1h4Ua6Utpo=) | | _****[Chip in $15 immediately>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65968719/415025609/-1810142053?refcode=20230705_em_fr_b1_raja_30_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWMxZDhiMi00NDFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XKnBipccSvDli2sqKVJRNAHMBEe13FxAP1h4Ua6Utpo=)****_

name: Replace Sinema
subject: PETITION: Tell Congress to pass the Equality Act
body:
Sinema’s filibuster stands in the way of the rights of millions of Americans | | | Peter – The LGBTQ+ community is under relentless attack, yet we’ve heard nothing but crickets from Kyrsten Sinema. Meanwhile, the main reason the Equality Act isn’t already law is because of the filibuster – the filibuster that Kyrsten Sinema teamed up with Republicans to save, and which also blocked abortion rights and voting rights legislation. LGBTQ+ people face discrimination across the country even with laws in place – but in 29 states there aren’t even anti-discrimination laws on the books to protect them. The Equality Act is needed to fix that – and make sure that no one is discriminated against just because of who they are or who they love. Why does Sinema think the rights of 41 Republicans to filibuster majority-supported legislation is more important than the fundamental human rights of millions of Americans? clean_body: Sinema’s filibuster stands in the way of the rights of millions of Americans | | | Peter – The LGBTQ+ community is under relentless attack, yet we’ve heard nothing but crickets from Kyrsten Sinema. Meanwhile, the main reason the Equality Act isn’t already law is because of the filibuster – the filibuster that Kyrsten Sinema teamed up with Republicans to save, and which also blocked abortion rights and voting rights legislation. LGBTQ+ people face discrimination across the country even with laws in place – but in 29 states there aren’t even anti-discrimination laws on the books to protect them. The Equality Act is needed to fix that – and make sure that no one is discriminated against just because of who they are or who they love. Why does Sinema think the rights of 41 Republicans to filibuster majority-supported legislation is more important than the fundamental human rights of millions of Americans? This is an issue of basic, constitutionally protected freedoms and protection from direct, discriminatory attacks against those freedoms. Sinema promised to ensure those basic rights were protected–not to do the bidding of rich donors and uphold a racist procedural relic. That’s why we’re participating in this joint petition to demand that Congress pass the Equality Act and stop the denial of our freedoms. We’ll be blunt: when Sinema was elected as the first openly bisexual Senator in U.S. history, the LGBT community – including us – were thrilled. We had no idea how quickly she would sell us all out. She prioritized cutting deals with Republicans over her own community – just as she has prioritized her Wall Street donors over her Arizona constituents. Shameful. So the next time Sinema tweets in support of the LGBTQ+ community, or waves the Rainbow Flag, never forget that she put the filibuster above the basic rights of millions of Americans. Thanks for all your help, -Change for Arizona 2024 PAC | | Sent via . # **Happy 4th of July 🇺🇸**
It was a full day in the district yesterday, cross-crossing Arizona’s 6th district celebrating our nation’s independence! I am truly grateful we live in a country that allows us all to achieve our American Dream.

>From parades to parks, there was no better way for our family to celebrate the 4th of July!

name: Colin Allred via Blue Amp Action
subject: re: Ted Cruz and Book Bans
body:
we have a real chance to win this thing
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T29b156b8-c2d2-414b-941e-c2705bf2c386/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T36bf10f7-88c8-42e2-8beb-111194816130/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**Donate $5 now!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4216a72b-81b8-47b3-ab7a-c26fbbdfc622/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I've always been a big reader, Peter. Growing up, my world was pretty small. I used to treat our local bookstore like a library, sitting there for hours, reading books cover to cover because I didn't have the money to buy them. Reading opened my eyes to new perspectives, far-off places, and different career opportunities – it helped me dream big. Our kids deserve the same opportunity to learn and grow through books, but Ted Cruz and the GOP are fighting to ban books about anything that doesn't align with their far-right agenda. [That's part of why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz – to stop the Republicans' outrageous censorship and attacks on our kids' education. But I have to raise $50,000 every single day to power this campaign against Ted Cruz. Will you please split a donation of $5 today between our campaign and Blue Amp Action to help send me to the Senate? →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfa662bcf-41ff-4889-a405-8070d21bbb18/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
