---
|
---
| Experts agree we have a real chance to win this thing: CNN says Ted Cruz is the most vulnerable Republican senator on the ballot, and we're just five points down in the polls. I know in my bones Texans are sick and tired of Ted Cruz and ready for change. [But this is already on track to be one of the most competitive and expensive races in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots Democrats like you to be by my side every step of the way. So please, before midnight, will you split a donation of $5 or more between our campaign and Blue Amp Action to help me defeat Ted Cruz and flip Texas blue? →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T45e3757a-69c9-43f3-9ece-052c2b0ef7c1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T031c5239-468d-4cff-95fd-643ec15e6afb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: John James
subject: Nobody's Token
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Congress, Inc
body:
The situation is more dire than we could’ve anticipated.

---
| | | | | | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27124%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1Z%2bzijrV7w5Xw4JdG1yvHg&sysid=1)
---
|

** ** I need you, Friend. The situation is more dire than we could’ve anticipated.

**If you don’t know me: I’m John James. I’m a Christian, Combat Veteran running for a 2nd term to protect the House.**
**[STEP UP NOW PROTECT THE HOUSE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27135%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B3DzCaTcQgYr9Sa%2b0RV9PQ&sysid=1 "STEP UP NOW PROTECT THE
HOUSE")**
I volunteered to fly Apache helicopters in Iraq because I wanted to defeat the enemy. After serving one term in Congress, I am volunteering AGAIN to TAKE OUR COUNTRY BACK.

This is a crucial time, Friend.

The failed Leftists in D.C. will spend RECORD AMOUNTS this cycle to keep their power. They are going to spend MILLIONS to silence me, all because they know that this is a battle that I won’t back down from. This is why I’m **[humbly asking for your support.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27136%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PU3Mv8QQNrMUE%2b63EmY2lg&sysid=1 "humbly asking for your
support.")**

**I’ve been told by my team that we’re at risk of MISSING our CRUCIAL fundraising deadline by just $225.**

**[If just 75 more America First Patriots step up in the next hour by chipping in just $3, we will have the support we need. However, without grassroots support from Patriots like YOU, Friend, we are going to lose the House for good.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27137%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kaSNzG204%2bxJoq8ZXPFL8Q&sysid=1 "If just 75 more America
First Patriots step up in the next hour by chipping in just $3, we will have the
support we need. However, without grassroots support from Patriots like YOU,
Friend, we are going to lose the House for good. ")**

**[RUSH $3 HERE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c27138%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TIcxPFeMQ%2fVXQJOH18X1xA&sysid=1 "RUSH $3 HERE")**

| | |

| | **REPRODUCTIVE RIGHTS ALERT:
Trump Brags About Killing _Roe,_ Says He "Would Look At" a Federal Abortion Ban**
---
Team Murray is speaking out to condemn Trump's anti-choice extremism, and we need you to join us by completing this rapid-response poll before midnight. **Please, use your voice now:**

|
---
Peter, this is horrifying.
Since _Roe_ __ was overturned,**24 states** have moved to ban nearly all abortion, but that's not enough for Donald Trump.
Trump and the Republican Party want patients in all 50 states to be refused potentially lifesaving abortion care – that would include here in Washington state. They want to arrest doctors across the country for providing necessary health care. And, they want the government to make personal reproductive decisions for us.
**We will not stand idly by as Trump encourages GOP politicians to take away women’s fundamental right to make their own decisions about their bodies and their futures. We hope you won't either, Peter.**
**We need every member of this team to speak out in this dire moment, but you're running out of time to answer our poll before it closes at midnight tonight. Please, lock in your response now:**

name: Doug Mastriano
subject: Let's Help Danny Gokey!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DOUG MASTRIANO**
body:
Will you step up, Peter?
| | |
---
Peter,
Following Independence Day, Danny Gokey and his foundation **Better Than I Found It** thought it would be the perfect time to surprise someone who has served our country with a little encouragement. Next week they're headed to St. Louis to help **TJ Tutson, a US Naval veteran** , who runs an organization called ‘Haircuts 4 the Homeless’ and we want **_you_** to play a part!
| [ ](https://link.nucleusemail.com/f/a/yE1cd2ID6-VdCiWwtO1ONA~~/AATY9gE~~)
---
**TODAY** , Wednesday, July 5th we are going to do **A DAY OF GIVING**. One day. _24 hours_. Let’s see how much we can raise to help ‘Haircuts 4 the Homeless’ expand their ministry further in the city of St. Louis! **Every dollar given on July 5th will go to ‘Haircuts 4 the Homeless.** ’ And even if you can’t give, it would mean so much if you could please SHARE SHARE SHARE the post to help maximize our reach - and impact.

**Listen to Danny Share!**
[https://youtu.be/rvZ2J83dMXo](https://link.nucleusemail.com/f/a/qVfqtduoGYqK7r-OPnu9CA~~/AATY9gE~~)

**To donate, text "BETTER" to 345345**.

|

clean_body: Will you step up, Peter? | | | Peter, Following Independence Day, Danny Gokey and his foundation Better Than I Found It thought it would be the perfect time to surprise someone who has served our country with a little encouragement. Next week they're headed to St. Louis to help TJ Tutson, a US Naval veteran , who runs an organization called ‘Haircuts 4 the Homeless’ and we want you to play a part! | ~ TODAY , Wednesday, July 5th we are going to do A DAY OF GIVING. One day. 24 hours. Let’s see how much we can raise to help ‘Haircuts 4 the Homeless’ expand their ministry further in the city of St. Louis! Every dollar given on July 5th will go to ‘Haircuts 4 the Homeless. ’ And even if you can’t give, it would mean so much if you could please SHARE SHARE SHARE the post to help maximize our reach - and impact. Listen to Danny Share! ~ To donate, text "BETTER" to 345345. | Thank you, Team Mastriano | | | ~~ PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DOUG MASTRIANO ~~

I’ve dedicated my life to public service. But my run for Congress isn’t about me. [**I’m running for my parents.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65972475/415041538/1698358150?refcode=20230705_em_fr_b1_tony_rem_v1&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzYxNmYyYS00ZjFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G8SCDj5ss2Kp4Z94JPigUFyt8rISeAKm4lndEM7BbxY=) They worked night and day on factory lines to give my brothers and me a shot at the American Dream. [**_Now I’m running to make sure all Americans -- our families, our workers, our small businesses -- can have the same opportunities I did. That’s why I’m reaching out and asking you personally on the first day of this race: Will you rush in $15 before midnight to help me kick off my campaign strong? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65972476/415041539/1698358150?refcode=20230705_em_fr_b1_tony_rem_v1&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzYxNmYyYS00ZjFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G8SCDj5ss2Kp4Z94JPigUFyt8rISeAKm4lndEM7BbxY=) [**I’m running for my kids, Ava and Luca.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65972477/415041540/1698358150?refcode=20230705_em_fr_b1_tony_rem_v1&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzYxNmYyYS00ZjFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G8SCDj5ss2Kp4Z94JPigUFyt8rISeAKm4lndEM7BbxY=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65972478/415041541/1698358150?refcode=20230705_em_fr_b1_tony_rem_v1&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzYxNmYyYS00ZjFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G8SCDj5ss2Kp4Z94JPigUFyt8rISeAKm4lndEM7BbxY=)

But Don Bacon is in Congress fighting for cheap political points rather than families like mine and yours. [**_I’ll be honest: We need a voice in Congress fighting for our families, not corporate CEOs. That’s why I need to kick off this campaign with a massive show of support -- $50,000 in my first 24 hours -- to get my message out and flip this seat for Nebraskans. Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. **Are you there? I still haven 't heard back from you...**

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Biden isn’t wasting any time
body:
His ad claims it’s all about freedom, but his actions show the opposite.

| [ ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl9ljrl88k2k7usg5qqtcocbapmirlmvdn1k0ung_rp22sh2s8i66o70slge9o36c1h2bs)
---
Friend,

Five seconds.

That's how long it took President Biden to endorse abortion in his latest campaign ad. It's what he's running on. It's what he stands for: Taxpayer-funded abortion on demand up to birth.

His ad claims it's all about freedom, but his actions show the opposite.

Since coming into office, the Biden administration has worked to:
* Illegally force American taxpayers to fund abortion with their hard-earned dollars.
* Ignore violent threats and attacks on pro-life organizations and individuals.
* Trample on the rights of parents and healthcare providers.

Just six days after being sworn in, Biden signed an executive order to repeal the Global Protect Life policy--forcing American taxpayers to fund groups promoting abortion overseas. But he didn't stop there.

Within months, he rolled back President Trump's Protect Life Rule, funneling taxpayer dollars to abortion businesses through Title X. And he forced Americans to fund abortion in his Covid-19 relief package!

On top of all this, the Biden administration has been weaponizing the DOJ against the pro-life community. They put a target on anyone how dares to tell the truth that abortion takes the life of an innocent child--all while ignoring violence against peaceful pro-life organizations and individuals.

This is not only outrageous--it's dangerous.

But that hasn't stopped President Biden from going all-in on a radical pro-abortion agenda to fire up his base going into 2024. He is determined to rewrite all the rules--including the U.S. Constitution--to get his way.

That's why I'm emailing you today.

SBA Pro-Life America is fighting back against the Biden administration and its radical abortion agenda every single day. Our team is working around the clock to advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns. And we are fighting to end abortion by electing national leaders who advocate for laws that save lives--with a special calling to promote pro-life women leaders.

**[But in order to do this critical work, we need your help.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcro1b3cv4k8pam1724lpthst5379q0tdb7a5sug_rp22sh2s8i66o70slge9o36c1h2bs)**

Your gift today will allow us to expand our policy research efforts to further educate lawmakers across the country. And it will help us to grow our voter education initiative to ensure that pro-life Americans know the truth about where the Biden administration and other pro-abortion leaders stand on abortion.

You can make your gift right now using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stand-up-to-biden-harris](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd2959o478st8kgkfs2munr7v0q9dgoeq1tjfr70_rp22sh2s8i66o70slge9o36c1h2bs)**

But please remember that time is of the essence. As President Biden ramps up his campaign efforts, we must be prepared to counter him every step of the way.

That's why your gift is urgently needed now.

Make your gift today to fight back against the Biden administration using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stand-up-to-biden-harris](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjjpsm295fb3k97k8hirmlvkfmi8e76qanu65mr8_rp22sh2s8i66o70slge9o36c1h2bs)**

By doing so, you will help advance a culture of life that protects unborn children and their mothers from abortion.

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

name: Dr. Debby Burnett
subject: Peter, it truly means the world to me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burnett for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=img_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=img_logo]
Peter, I was raised in Greeley, Colorado, by a stay-at-home mom and a water engineer dad. Growing up in a Democratic household, I cast my first vote as an 18-year-old against the construction of a new shopping center that was wrong for our town — and I’ve been fighting for what’s right ever since.
I’m so grateful to everyone who stepped up for our campaign over the past month to help me continue that fight. It truly means the world to me. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=img_thanks [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2300_db_email?refcode2=img_thanks]People from across our district, state, and country are helping build the movement to flip this seat and replace right-wing extremist Lauren Boebert once and for all. Everyone who took action — from watching, liking, and sharing our viral launch video [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_video-em] to sharing their thoughts through a survey or chipping in what they could — is an essential part of this campaign.
That’s because unlike Lauren Boebert, I’m counting on folks like you — not big corporate PACs or dark-money groups — to win this.
I know this will be a hard-fought primary, but I also know that our campaign is up to the challenge. I’m a veterinarian, a mom, and a small-business owner. Over 59% of primary voters are women, and the majority live in rural or working-class communities. The right candidate with rural roots who can speak to our district’s values can gain the traction needed to turn the seat blue.
While my primary opponent got close to defeating Boebert last cycle, he failed to get the job done. And here’s the truth — of the fifty-six rematch races in 2020, only five had a different outcome than in 2018. A fresh nominee has the best chance of winning what will be a competitive and targeted race in the general election.
It’s going to take a truly people-powered campaign to flip this seat and give Western and Southern Colorado a representative who understands their struggles and matches their values. If you’re ready to see Lauren “Ultra MAGA” Boebert go, then I hope you’ll help expand our digital organizing today by following our campaign on social media:
Facebook » [https://www.facebook.com/DebbyBurnettForCO3]
Instagram » [https://www.instagram.com/BurnettForCO3/]
Twitter » [https://twitter.com/BurnettForCO3]

clean_body: [] Peter, I was raised in Greeley, Colorado, by a stay-at-home mom and a water engineer dad. Growing up in a Democratic household, I cast my first vote as an 18-year-old against the construction of a new shopping center that was wrong for our town — and I’ve been fighting for what’s right ever since. I’m so grateful to everyone who stepped up for our campaign over the past month to help me continue that fight. It truly means the world to me. [ from across our district, state, and country are helping build the movement to flip this seat and replace right-wing extremist Lauren Boebert once and for all. Everyone who took action — from watching, liking, and sharing our viral launch video [] to sharing their thoughts through a survey or chipping in what they could — is an essential part of this campaign. That’s because unlike Lauren Boebert, I’m counting on folks like you — not big corporate PACs or dark-money groups — to win this. I know this will be a hard-fought primary, but I also know that our campaign is up to the challenge. I’m a veterinarian, a mom, and a small-business owner. Over 59% of primary voters are women, and the majority live in rural or working-class communities. The right candidate with rural roots who can speak to our district’s values can gain the traction needed to turn the seat blue. While my primary opponent got close to defeating Boebert last cycle, he failed to get the job done. And here’s the truth — of the fifty-six rematch races in 2020, only five had a different outcome than in 2018. A fresh nominee has the best chance of winning what will be a competitive and targeted race in the general election. It’s going to take a truly people-powered campaign to flip this seat and give Western and Southern Colorado a representative who understands their struggles and matches their values. If you’re ready to see Lauren “Ultra MAGA” Boebert go, then I hope you’ll help expand our digital organizing today by following our campaign on social media: Facebook » [] Instagram » [] Twitter » [] TikTok » [] Thank you so much for doing your part, Debby Dr. Debby Burnett is running to represent Colorado’s 3rd District in Congress. As a veterinarian for 20+ years, she’s worked with farmers and ranchers across our district to improve their lives and their livelihoods. As the mother of a 16-year-old, she knows how to get 20 things done at once. And as a rural Coloradan who owns a small agricultural business, she understands what the people of Western and Southern Colorado need — and that’s why she’s stepping up to give them a real voice in Congress. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I first came out in college, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
Can I share something with you?

| |
---
Peter, can I share something with you? When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public service, but I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65973768/415046410/-733050151?refcode=urd-em-230705-split_baldwin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJiNTM1MWEtNTQxYi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NmqzEKVRgN2ZVQJyR9JSkZGTfw9BIQbuCvoIE5cmOqc=) Seeing others in the LGBTQ community demonstrate acts of courage by coming out, being themselves, and being public about who they are and who they love — I came to realize that I could do both. **I could run for office and be honest about who I am. And that’s exactly what I did.** When I became the first openly gay Senator in our nation's history, I understood that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity to make a difference in people's lives. And from lowering prescription drug prices to protecting same-sex marriage through the Respect for Marriage Act, I’ve worked hard every day since to do just that. That's why I ran for office in the first place — not to make history, but to make a difference. And folks like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too. Now, I'm asking you to keep going: [**Will you help me continue to make a difference by splitting a donation between my reelection campaign and United Rural Democrats today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65973769/415046411/-733050151?refcode=urd-em-230705-split_baldwin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJiNTM1MWEtNTQxYi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NmqzEKVRgN2ZVQJyR9JSkZGTfw9BIQbuCvoIE5cmOqc=) Over the years, we have made incredible progress in the fight for equality. But Peter, we cannot mistake that progress for a total victory. Republican-led state legislatures across the country continue to pass harmful legislation, especially targeting the transgender community and LGBTQ youth. And when the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, Justice Clarence Thomas called for Obergefell v. Hodges — the case that established nationwide marriage equality — to be “reconsidered.” [**For all of the progress we have made, there is still a LOT more to be done. I’ll keep up the fight as long as I can, and I’m hoping you’ll support our important work by splitting a donation between my reelection campaign and United Rural Democrats today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65973770/415046412/-733050151?refcode=urd-em-230705-split_baldwin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJiNTM1MWEtNTQxYi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NmqzEKVRgN2ZVQJyR9JSkZGTfw9BIQbuCvoIE5cmOqc=) $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65973771/415046413/-733050151?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=urd-em-230705-split_baldwin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJiNTM1MWEtNTQxYi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NmqzEKVRgN2ZVQJyR9JSkZGTfw9BIQbuCvoIE5cmOqc=)** **[Contribute **[Contribute $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65973775/415046416/-733050151?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=urd-em-230705-split_baldwin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmJiNTM1MWEtNTQxYi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NmqzEKVRgN2ZVQJyR9JSkZGTfw9BIQbuCvoIE5cmOqc=)** Thank you for your ongoing support. Let’s recommit ourselves to work towards the day when all LGBTQ Americans can live in a world where they feel safe, accepted, and loved. — Tammy

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Book bans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
I am on a bit of a road-trip with the family over the 4th of July holiday

Friends -
I am on a bit of a road-trip over the 4th of July holiday, but one of the several stops we made was in Idaho where I attended an event for the Idaho Democratic Party and heard about their work to push back against the GOP and build a bottom-up approach to gain seats.
I also stopped at Rediscovered Books in Boise where they are doing everything they can to push back against insane book bans happening across the country.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2731?t=1&akid=1487%2E4767699%2ElrOftv)
Stick it to the ban.
Gavin Newsom
* * *
**⚠️ To my fellow Democrats - PLEASE don't scroll past this important message. ⚠️**
Before you go, Gavin Newsom us humbly asking you to support the Idaho Democratic Party where they are doing work to push back against a far-right Republican Governor who criminalized out-of-state abortion assistance with no exception for rape or incest.
Even a small contribution will go a long way for Idaho Democrats who don’t get the national assistance of other so-called “swing states.” So please, support them with a contribution of $20 or whatever feels right to you today.

**I wanted you to see a few examples of how the All On The Line and its affiliates make a difference.**
Last year, the Supreme Court heard arguments in _Allen v. Milligan_ , a case in which Alabama voters challenged the state’s congressional map for diluting the voting power of Black communities. Pundits predicted the Court’s ruling would dismantle key provisions of the Voting Rights Act. Instead, the Court reaffirmed the Voting Rights Act’s role as an important tool for making our democracy fairer.
Then, last week, the Supreme Court firmly rejected the fringe independent state legislature theory, a decision that protected the very foundations of our democracy. This momentous ruling strikes down the far-right attempt to undermine our cherished system of checks and balances, sending a resounding message that legislators are not shielded from accountability when they violate voters’ rights.
**On these two decisions, the Court got it right. These victories represent a powerful affirmation that our democracy is too important to be dismantled for one party’s political gain. Victories like these couldn’t happen without the work of Attorney General Eric Holder, All On The Line, its affiliates, and[** _most importantly_ , people like you.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65974428/415049213/1606310495?refcode=20230705_AOTL_P_POTUSJuly_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0ZTlhZjc4LTU1MWItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NVt4cYkh86zSv2QF85-q6V_gRVyY95ZbPWd5vWca_tk=)**
Even when the cynics said the cause was hopeless, we never wavered in our commitment to fight for fair maps, fair representation, and a strong democracy. That tenacity has fueled our grassroots efforts to help secure the fairest congressional map in a generation. And we’ve got to keep it going for the battles ahead.
[**All On The Line’s efforts have always been powered by grassroots activists like you. If you’re ready to do your part to strengthen democracy, then please, donate today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65974429/415049214/1606310495?refcode=20230705_AOTL_P_POTUSJuly_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0ZTlhZjc4LTU1MWItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NVt4cYkh86zSv2QF85-q6V_gRVyY95ZbPWd5vWca_tk=)

\-- President Barack Obama

Dear Fellow Conservative,

The Heritage Foundation is working to understand the impact of Ranked Choice Voting on our democratic process, and we value your input.

**Will you take a few moments to share your thoughts on Ranked Choice Voting and complete the survey by clicking the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/national-ranked-choice-voting-survey](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTg2LTRiNDBhZmQwOTk4MTQyZThiNzFhMmI5YjFhMTM3YjQ0IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL25hdGlvbmFsLXJhbmtlZC1jaG9pY2Utdm90aW5nLXN1cnZleS8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJhbmtlZGNob2ljZSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QV9BRV9TUE80MDY2MyJ9/zuV7BZpCMcbcgy0IF-nCTg)**

By participating, you'll help contribute to an informed discussion on RCV and its potential effects on our elections. Once you complete the survey, you'll also receive a copy of our RCV fact sheet, which provides valuable insights into this controversial voting system.

Thank you for your time and for helping us create a better-informed America.

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

name: Sepi Shyne
subject: irreparably broken
body:
Team, the Supreme Court is irreparably broken.

The devastating rulings last week will leave a scar on our democracy and harm the lives of countless LGBTQ+ people, people of color, and millions of working-class people burdened by the weight of student debt.

**Like you, I am _enraged_ by the cruelty, the shamelessness, and the blatant hypocrisy of these decisions.** With every ruling, the Supreme Court makes this country look more and more like an oligarchy run by billionaires than a democracy run by the people. It’s starting to look more and more like the fundamentalism in Iran from which my family escaped.

But I’m never giving up fighting for the rights of all us, court or no court. The six extremist justices, their billionaire benefactors, and their GOP enablers want nothing more than for us to concede in despair and hopelessness. But we won’t — **we will _never_ let them have the final word on our rights, our lives, or our freedoms.**

We’ll fight back by building political power for all marginalized voices the Supreme Court is trying to silence. We’ll expand representation in the House with LGBTQ+ leaders and congress members of color, take back our House majority, and expand our Senate majority in 2024. [**Chip in $5 or any amount you can to help me fight back against tyrannical SCOTUS decisions and build a democracy that works for all of us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65975241/415052023/1120139897?refcode=em23_230705_SCOTUS_fndd_gq_act___ss_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230705_SCOTUS_fndd_gq_act___ss_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=ae1e8eb7-561b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWUxZThlYjctNTYxYi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=44it-WNTAApgxZ_czFXszIoAdIDbvu2qJ8l_TSNSMNM=)

At the same time the six extremists were weighing their decision to eviscerate our fundamental rights, Justice Clarence Thomas and Justice Samual Alito were accepting lavish gifts, trips on yachts, and direct financial contributions from billionaires with business on the court — without any system of accountability or code of ethics.

We can reign in the Supreme Court, restore our rights in federal law, restore balance to the court, and salvage our democracy. But we need to take back the House in 2024 to get it done.

clean_body: Team, the Supreme Court is irreparably broken. The devastating rulings last week will leave a scar on our democracy and harm the lives of countless LGBTQ+ people, people of color, and millions of working-class people burdened by the weight of student debt. Like you, I am enraged by the cruelty, the shamelessness, and the blatant hypocrisy of these decisions. With every ruling, the Supreme Court makes this country look more and more like an oligarchy run by billionaires than a democracy run by the people. It’s starting to look more and more like the fundamentalism in Iran from which my family escaped. But I’m never giving up fighting for the rights of all us, court or no court. The six extremist justices, their billionaire benefactors, and their GOP enablers want nothing more than for us to concede in despair and hopelessness. But we won’t — we will never let them have the final word on our rights, our lives, or our freedoms. We’ll fight back by building political power for all marginalized voices the Supreme Court is trying to silence. We’ll expand representation in the House with LGBTQ+ leaders and congress members of color, take back our House majority, and expand our Senate majority in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- At the same time the six extremists were weighing their decision to eviscerate our fundamental rights, Justice Clarence Thomas and Justice Samual Alito were accepting lavish gifts, trips on yachts, and direct financial contributions from billionaires with business on the court — without any system of accountability or code of ethics. It doesn’t get much more corrupt than that, folks. Unelected justices with lifetime appointments should never have this amount of unchecked power or ability to make decisions that deeply impact the lives of all of us. This is a true crisis of our democracy, which is why we need to build a MASSIVE, diverse movement by and for the people to fight back. We can reign in the Supreme Court, restore our rights in federal law, restore balance to the court, and salvage our democracy. But we need to take back the House in 2024 to get it done. = This is OUR country, and with your help, I’m going to fight like hell to take it back. With gratitude, Sepi Shyne #WomanLifeFreedom Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today. = = Sepi Shyne For Congress 8149 Santa Monica Blvd #280 West Hollywood, CA 90046 United States

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

Trump and some of the other candidates are trying to divide us further. That is why we need Chris Christie on the debate stage to stop this teenage food fight. | Why Chris Christie: Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. body:
Sign our official petition to BAN Chinese land buys >>

| |

---
| | | **BREAKING RIGHT NOW:
Biden's Justice Department files LEGAL ACTION to allow Chinese purchases of U.S. land**

_**[Sign our official petition to BAN Chinese land buys>>](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=1ec5695acfa74c7a8b4c2620bad52a20&_e=JMpCNuUEmPEj2L6E1n38WiLFNPM0mXXg562-iJ4qZP7hyY0TcuF1v4cbN4AeUuwUGuiaPWUm30fzP5sO4jOigOlEyg7Xy4d8Ny4ZZlfbKWh5VkwqDPTfBy8yJuE3PrZAvXGv2THM-eR0JsakqVenHx9s-8DtcUfwt8SxDfbF9JAa83tRTxc_H4evghhni3S9vsPoWEzuIOVlvtcPiOUgY7GvmBcsfWK7xn8lIpbug8V7lwlpufJA1Z3YDr6k5GRtDwR4ZjhjjC4t6kBgoZeTGNpRemptgN5xFOu9epeC4QEXielShSqVmHq17XxVxrfWMcoPORP5y024EKrpo4-bJ06qa_a65mxTa3FceX7hj7Oi3lLZGt_hKBShBd5VcPv0_ZY6eVBz3ea8xE9hGwIKnGrgwFfEEuHvWSOE6B6C930%3D "Sign our official petition to BAN Chinese land buys >>")**_

_Please don 't close out of this email...

Please don't check Facebook...

Please don't ignore this shocking news..._

Joe Biden is mobilizing the Federal Government to empower Chinese nationals to buy up property here on American soil. _Just imagine your neighborhood being carved up by millionaire and billionaire foreign nationals!_

**The Biden Justice Department is in court right now so this is our LAST CHANCE to speak up and help stop them._[Do your part before closing out of this email and sign our official petition to BAN Chinese land buys.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=1ec5695acfa74c7a8b4c2620bad52a20&_e=JMpCNuUEmPEj2L6E1n38WiLFNPM0mXXg562-iJ4qZP7hyY0TcuF1v4cbN4AeUuwUGuiaPWUm30fzP5sO4jOigOlEyg7Xy4d8Ny4ZZlfbKWh5VkwqDPTfBy8yJuE3PrZAvXGv2THM-eR0JsakqVenHx9s-8DtcUfwt8SxDfbF9JAa83tRTxc_H4evghhni3S9vsPoWEzuIOVlvtcPiOUgY7GvmBcsfWK7xn8lIpbug8V7lwlpufJA1Z3YDr6k5GRtDwR4ZjhjjC4t6kBgoZeTGLfy9kM0mNO6XBU-quCej5sh1xO4X36gEjYhswvru7maK2cVG_Pvw35X7PvdOe__GPbhfj0cWMVs8SYWVqOh4Po8RVpFkbkjmgY9JlyLBvxt9El3fcxxYwxyI98a8dqTDV2ZNtzT4_GJtTCoCwbIvew%3D "Do your part before closing out of this email and sign our official petition to BAN Chinese land buys. ")_**
---
| | | [SIGN THE PETITION](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=1ec5695acfa74c7a8b4c2620bad52a20&_e=JMpCNuUEmPEj2L6E1n38WiLFNPM0mXXg562-iJ4qZP7hyY0TcuF1v4cbN4AeUuwUGuiaPWUm30fzP5sO4jOigOlEyg7Xy4d8Ny4ZZlfbKWh5VkwqDPTfBy8yJuE3PrZAvXGv2THM-eR0JsakqVenHx9s-8DtcUfwt8SxDfbF9JAa83tRTxc_H4evghhni3S9vsPoWEzuIOVlvtcPiOUgY7GvmBcsfWK7xn8lIpbug8V7lwlpufJA1Z3YDr6k5GRtDwR4ZjhjjC4t6kBgoZeTGJkaPjvCge6VgMTFg_HUXbJpJaBgOUEIbSFlpv9XOAo70V3K0zaZrWtye5OJRPwo9p0RUSuJ--VIlTDL7q8nDlHwQj6FOKxkGOkDRzUbx9AXPRy1vA7HHyO2tYzGLb6fNdNgbM46ooDHsjcMa3B0AK4%3D "SIGN THE PETITION")
---
You may have signed similar petitions before but this is a brand new issue, so we really need your help right away.

We're not only taking on China buying up U.S. farmland, now we're also standing up to the Federal Government. It's going to take an OVERWHELMING response to come out on top. **We set a goal of collecting at least 1,000,000 signatures before the end of the day today.**

So can we count on your support before midnight? Your signature is very, VERY important.
---

Thank you,
House Republicans

name: Peach State Update
subject: A GOP onslaught
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65975677/415053505/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWUzMDViMy01NzFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=asCNglA0_YyVmN62VVEmUr7hKYU2L1tCrd7tvmHacD0=&emci=88945c91-351b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=9ae305b3-571b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | If you’re like us and watching the news like a hawk, you’ve probably seen the slew of devastating Supreme Court decisions this past week.

You’ve probably watched in horror as the Supreme Court sanctioned anti-LGBTQ discrimination, eliminated affirmative action meant to fight racial inequity in education, and struck down student debt relief for low-income borrowers working hard to earn their way into the middle class.

The truth is: **_all of this is the result of elections._**

Mitch McConnell held an Obama appointee hostage for months after we lost the Senate, refusing to bring his nomination to the floor for a vote.

Donald Trump appointed the majority-making right-wing Justices who have wasted no time dragging us backwards on racial equity, civil rights, reproductive freedom, and more.

Today’s extreme Supreme Court is a reflection of today’s extreme GOP. A party that’s hell-bent on using every avenue possible to roll back our fundamental rights – including the Supreme Court. Today’s GOP has launched an onslaught against our rights, and if we don’t do something, they _**will_** succeed.

[**_We need your help. If we can win in Georgia and defeat the GOP at every level, then we can win back our rights and build a future where we ALL can succeed.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65975678/415053506/710125701?refcode=20230703.1_PSU_7C&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWUzMDViMy01NzFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=asCNglA0_YyVmN62VVEmUr7hKYU2L1tCrd7tvmHacD0=)_

Are you with us? Will you support our work as we fight to defeat the extreme GOP here in Georgia?

We’re counting on you,

– GA Dems
---
|
---

---

P.O. BOX 89202

However, If you wish to unsubscribe you can do so [here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/502xl98alkm3J5MS-c04xA2?unsubscribedata=9PouX0aiHOG9k3%2BdFZcATtvEO4OSbTdhIYpnEs1oK5JEjYkhPYUeo74gvCq7UCEVCJR7OjYlI4bptV%2Fez4wJDyF6J405iNBaB7wi0nSeNjaocU%2BbExxbl9YYd3TuwxRfU2Eet4sJ8a4hgAtussV7UPvvwGf5fljgBixODJqy3Jclrgwd5NlFF2ZBgoEGDjvDvm5aFQmF0u65wYJK0zREui46jtgcP%2FeYw%2BCOJMFy%2BpK6gImdFeuaVJUwE69Mj2YjC6WGbTOcMlfwZ92kXsicxU%2F%2FZMQG056Ennpe1vNUlldKRupgiVty5brrjads0z4bDs%2FBqszbRedyQDMujS%2BADSud9gEPE9CsNjwigPcHJg7ROY33kSgy4AM617XO1Cbmfaa3lceVnBZO9YKiuFTviN2j6%2BIjw5jFdmRl1zweDb2nRW0UBbA5IetV5ju1m%2FSD).

name: Sean Feucht
subject: WATCH: Times Square Revival
body:
WATCH: REVIVAL IN TIMES SQUARE | | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=93cd9b99e3994eb4b11c81b252664981&_e=9H0ro0G3i7hyuxWOKi-cvXiXejLSOawWfmNN2WxWKb3JKTV9v-oYQXpgRAa1mnivfzwo2588pZOBUpKvOrKM7Je0NIo2Bw9pMJR5ZQ1RTahDBKjZ74ZGYPAqXoq-UAV-bV2B5VAPjvAnT6q58d36mZXuauY7QSIPZL7HWXPu8xIlBTxrcCs86XsAwTmGOt2l3QnGOLAFsuyyffRSn4AQaYfplrhsiF7RqiLDLMph9SiWvThRLkWTMfqxLnIDT0v7hp2QevOMn85Spg6z3XFlAzQ4zp_jgSKWqlOdRhXOuZ57AF0ILwZPiutvqfLZitCY)
---
Dear Friend,
---
In Matthew 18, Jesus says, "For where two or three gather in my name, there am I with them.” Yesterday, there were a whole lot more than three gathered in Times Square. Thousands of Believers came together to celebrate ALL God has done! We prayed, we worshiped, and we felt the POWER of the Holy Spirit come down!! [**WATCH THE RECAP ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=93cd9b99e3994eb4b11c81b252664981&_e=9H0ro0G3i7hyuxWOKi-cvXiXejLSOawWfmNN2WxWKb3JKTV9v-oYQXpgRAa1mnivfzwo2588pZOBUpKvOrKM7Je0NIo2Bw9pMJR5ZQ1RTahDBKjZ74ZGYPAqXoq-UAV-bV2B5VAPjvAnT6q58d36mZXuauY7QSIPZL7HWXPu8xL2-NtTU60rn8bn3ByLNVWZOcqpmEoSuFMpfOXklURuqGysi6KzRfKCEzWm2oajBqjVH-v1K7M1ciwrmcDq5P-P0yLbkgo3pl57LII2RslUC1t4cL9PNiunlN-eOm0wKb-yBif6OVTxo5TwKlp1MgYG)
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=93cd9b99e3994eb4b11c81b252664981&_e=9H0ro0G3i7hyuxWOKi-cvXiXejLSOawWfmNN2WxWKb3JKTV9v-oYQXpgRAa1mnivfzwo2588pZOBUpKvOrKM7Je0NIo2Bw9pMJR5ZQ1RTahDBKjZ74ZGYPAqXoq-UAV-bV2B5VAPjvAnT6q58d36mZXuauY7QSIPZL7HWXPu8xJK7sy9w26ci2py7cxuseOkAaegvgViURJafdadFSoUm74-AumxGaADN556fUAn_a8LUGIFk6EFlhpy6CE9UryGpXZawPZ75INMn9B42s0OfU_ri3_ME35_uMjZBc6xSIWA0gNAx6P-nnkG_IYvvmvD)
---
On the 4th of July, there certainly were fireworks in Times Square, but we didn't have to wait for the sun to set! Luckily, the cameras were rolling— you won't want to miss it!
---
[**DONATE TO LET US WORSHIP >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=93cd9b99e3994eb4b11c81b252664981&_e=9H0ro0G3i7hyuxWOKi-cvXiXejLSOawWfmNN2WxWKb3JKTV9v-oYQXpgRAa1mnivfzwo2588pZOBUpKvOrKM7Je0NIo2Bw9pMJR5ZQ1RTahDBKjZ74ZGYPAqXoq-UAV-bV2B5VAPjvAnT6q58d36mZXuauY7QSIPZL7HWXPu8xLXBdbNg35eBm_Xy_Ye0qQxyR6X9xK9OyqVIEB37SlQNQNltMYP6OqGIO0MaXf_pEKqGXNGaZIONYGqJFhjN_U27I3XB48aMbfxGKkDq3uSef7yhsTp8DkaEYzhYbZz6pVtuMbE8L0HbwJyxj1qZB-H)
---
Till all hear,
---
---
Sean

body:
This race remain tight. We have just four months until Election Day, Peter, and this race is tight.

**A Republican firm released a poll that shows Andy and his opponent are tied.** We knew this was coming – Andy won by just over 5,000 votes in 2019 and election experts are calling this the most competitive race in the nation this year.

We'll be frank: in a race like ours, we know it's going to be close until the very end. Every single day counts, and we're working in overdrive to reach Kentuckians across the Commonwealth to share why we need to re-elect Andy – but the work ahead won't be easy.

**[That's where you come in, Peter. Will you make a donation right away to help ensure our team has the resources to spread Andy's message across the Commonwealth so we can win this tough race? The dollar amount isn't as important as the donation itself — this is a grassroots campaign, and the number of folks showing up to support us is what really [#VeteranOfTheDay Air Force Veteran Terry Berg](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsquhrfj0t85aiotu056pdk1l8umf0m5td61tjb8_rp22sh2s8i66o70slie2ob6cph238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnk9g64pj7k1jmf835cuhnacbl69q37dtj65obac9k6jqq8d5iemhjfcjm6kqq6t9hekp78ctlk5qj4sjkumh3acjn6uh2bs)
Terry L. Berg was born December 13, 1946, in Boise, Idaho. He was an only child. He enlisted in the Air Force in 1965 and served four years, until 1969. He trained in Texas and then was sent to Vandenberg Air Force Base in California. He chose to go to Vietnam from there with the 377th Combat Support Group and served at Tan Son Nhut Air Base, outside Saigon, in South Vietnam. As a dog handler who went out on patrols at night, he saw combat on his second day.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65977837/415059953/-531765509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGJmMjE2ZC01ZTFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UMtyXQn3iGVTjloFHjVYTHvKzrUcxhs9oM9qtJqABbw=&emci=66edb765-5e1b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=f8bf216d-5e1b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249) [**Philadelphia Inquirer: State court rejects GOP challenge to Pennsylvania mail voting law**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65977838/415059954/-412144306?refcode=email_070523_mailvoting_t1&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGJmMjE2ZC01ZTFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UMtyXQn3iGVTjloFHjVYTHvKzrUcxhs9oM9qtJqABbw=) Team,

A Pennsylvania state court rejected yet another MAGA Republican effort to repeal Pennsylvania’s mail-in voting law — a law that overwhelmingly passed with bipartisan support and is used by millions of Pennsylvanians in every election since.

We dodged the bullet this time, but without a battle-tested Attorney General willing to fight future attacks, our right to vote is still in very much peril.

Since Donald Trump lost the 2020 election, we’ve seen an unrelenting surge of attacks on our right to vote.

Trump objected to a free and fair election, refusing to admit he lost, and it led to a deadly insurrection on the U.S. Capitol. And that was just the beginning of the many attacks to come our way.

**The Big Lie has infiltrated Pennsylvania.** Even now, Trump loyalists and MAGA legislators are working to gut mail-in voting and make it harder for Pennsylvanians to vote. They are sowing seeds of doubt in the way our elections are run. They stoke chaos and confusion among voters – all in an attempt to suppress your right to vote.

Let’s be clear, team:**Election security was not a problem in 2020 – or any election thereafter. In fact, as Pennsylvania’s Auditor General, I made sure we have a secure voting system.** There is no widespread fraud, no matter how many wild claims are made or lawsuits are filed (and eventually dismissed).

The right to vote is a pillar of American democracy and should never be a partisan issue. As your next Attorney General, I will protect our voting rights and fight any attempts to overturn the will of the people. name: Jules Bailey
subject: OLCV welcomes Lindsey Scholten as Executive Director
body:
| | | Dear Peter, We are pleased to announce Lindsey Scholten as OLCV’s Executive Director. She has been serving in the role as interim since April. With increasing threats to Oregon’s environment, the work of OLCV has never been more important, and we are thrilled to have Lindsey leading the organization forward at this critical time. Lindsey has helped lead OLCV’s biggest political successes for almost a decade and brings a wealth of experience to her role leading the organization forward. During her tenure as OLCV’s deputy director, and prior to that as political director, she led OLCV’s political work to many significant victories, culminating in the largest-ever political program in 2022. With over $1.8 million invested, OLCV helped elect Governor Tina Kotek and protected the pro-environment majority in the Oregon Senate. When she served as the political director and oversaw the political program, OLCV also helped re-elect Governor Kate Brown, flipped the state senate to have a pro-environment and pro-climate majority in 2014, protected pro-environment majorities in the state senate and house, and elected several key climate and environmental champions. I have known Lindsey for over ten years, and I am certain that we’ve found a passionate, innovative, and experienced leader in her. Her sharp political strategy, effective leadership, and vision will build upon past victories to reach even greater wins to protect our clean air and water, the health of our communities, the stability of our climate, and the state of our democracy. “I am truly honored to be given this opportunity to lead OLCV forward into our next chapter. OLCV’s mission – electing pro-environment and pro-climate candidates to office, educating voters on where candidates stand, and holding all our elected officials accountable for how they vote – is unique and incredibly important," said Lindsey. "With recent changes of leadership in the governor’s mansion and the state legislature, along with climate impacts hitting home the urgent need for more action, we have both great opportunity and responsibility to ensure a safe and stable climate for today and for future generations.” Please join me and the Board in welcoming Lindsey as Executive Director of OLCV. We are so grateful to have you by our side and thank you for your continued support and partnership as we begin this new chapter. Sincerely, Jules Bailey
Chair, OLCV Board of Directors |

name: Colin Allred
subject: Inside Elections just downgraded Ted Cruz's chances
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, a lot of folks told me not to run against Ted Cruz.
They said a Democrat can't win a statewide election in Texas and that I should stick with my "safe" seat in the House after winning with 66% of the vote last year. But I'm not one to play it safe when our rights and values are in danger.
And listen, this team raised more in the first 24 hours of our campaign than Cruz did in the entire first quarter of 2023 – and the experts are taking notice.
Already, the Cook Political Report upgraded our chances of winning, and both Roll Call AND Inside Elections officially moved Texas from "Solid Republican" to "Battleground"!
Friend, all of these experts are putting Ted Cruz on notice because of the early strength of our grassroots campaign – but you know that GOP donors are taking notice, too. So please, will you chip in a split donation between my campaign and Serve America to help fight back against the GOP, beat Ted Cruz and flip Texas blue? I need to raise $100,000 today → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
I've never felt better about our chances. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Texas may be Democrats' best pickup opportunity next year, CNN is calling Cruz one of the most vulnerable incumbents on the ballot and, if we win in Texas, Democrats will hold the Senate Majority.
But CBS News says this could be one of the most expensive races in the country, and with Senate control hanging in the balance, national Republicans are pouring money into Cruz's war chest. They've already launched their first attacks, and if we miss our fundraising goals, I won't have the resources to fight back.
That's why I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation of $15 or more between my campaign and Serve America? Every dollar helps as we work to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Let's do this.
Colin Allred
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]

name: DLCC Special Elections Team
subject: We’ll be blunt
body:
We’re heading into what’s known as the “summer slump,” the time in the cycle when fundraising slows dramatically. But we still have elections to win and investments to make. | | |
---
| | With the help of donations from grassroots supporters this year, we’ve made a lot of progress. Our team has secured **18 wins for state Democrats in special elections.** Now, we’re gearing up to win even more races in key states like New Hampshire. **But we’ll be blunt:** We’re heading into what’s known as the “summer slump,” the time in the cycle when fundraising slows dramatically. But we _still_ have elections to win and investments to make – there are no off years in the states! [Can you donate $7 or more right now as we gear up for critical special elections across the country?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURtxM-7M6lx0tBvbL0QK0PU4udxK0cRdenDur1TMwNxYq7XzhKUubqM8dtUWgvj5ynmFElX4aXIpf7f5CGhhwmuPoiCwlC9bjOlCy-46snJzzEUYT42wB9NZ7vKZ6HfmlB9r4jWLR8R-MdgRb8RBiijM0pwXDpq7IknokgZkDAjAQvqwtDnkLtYfX4HqAjRt5GtCdeNZUtdZpa4qFnRDUOp15JJ9YLGaltvGcwCrZSp4UVDqJhpDhWUyUCY7WtSav1r6i1zH70n5fXWaWwg2FJfZnu-euQqXOQBhwtUx7pQcXodnyrtL6LJrF7OF7dnEtfhzi7U6O80sPqSbsY2PdRK8cqRtT_dm-srKVB4tFstvVU/3xm/Pvvn5VpNSxayLC4yv0c-og/h0/kVjwVVTaeSkKzEDIHDV8ImpCzIVMMbgkKEBCFkKrwHs) **If we don’t make up for lost ground now, state Democrats could _lose_ upcoming special elections like these:** | **Date** | **State** | **Seat**

State Democrats face special elections all year round. **That means we need to be constantly raising money for Democratic candidates _every day._**
Here’s why:
**→** State legislators are the elected officials who most impact your day-to-day life
**→** State legislative races are overlooked and underfunded
**→** Special elections often come down to just a handful of votes
**If we fall short, Democrats could lose to their Republican opponents in states like New Hampshire, where Democrats are just _three seats away from flipping the House._** [So what do you say? But we still have elections to win and investments to make. | | | | | With the help of donations from grassroots supporters this year, we’ve made a lot of progress. Our team has secured 18 wins for state Democrats in special elections. Now, we’re gearing up to win even more races in key states like New Hampshire. But we’ll be blunt: We’re heading into what’s known as the “summer slump,” the time in the cycle when fundraising slows dramatically. But we still have elections to win and investments to make – there are no off years in the states! If we don’t make up for lost ground now, state Democrats could lose upcoming special elections like these: | Date | State | Seat ---|---|--- 7/18 | Wisconsin | A-24 8/3 | Tennessee | HD-52 8/3 | Tennessee | HD-86 8/22 | New Hampshire | Grafton-16 9/19 | New Hampshire | Rockingham-1 State Democrats face special elections all year round. That means we need to be constantly raising money for Democratic candidates every day. Here’s why: → State legislators are the elected officials who most impact your day-to-day life → State legislative races are overlooked and underfunded → Special elections often come down to just a handful of votes If we fall short, Democrats could lose to their Republican opponents in states like New Hampshire, where Democrats are just three seats away from flipping the House. subject: We have lost our way.

body:
This is a photo of me at graduation back in the day and why its exsistence for someone like me is improbable today.
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/49OadBCZq/c?w=prjVhPY0BwLpT_7l5wsKzC1kkCfBvx2ADQCheqdnmys.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudm90ZWRyYm9iLmNvbS9zby80OU9hZEJDWnE_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)_**

| | |
---
| | Friend As a poor, rural student who grew up on the other side of the tracks, social mobility programs were invaluable in making my education affordable. Under our current system, my story is improbable. My education would've cost $300,000 in today's dollars, a far-fetched reality for lower middle class families. Post-secondary education should not be exclusively reserved for the privileged. [A contribution from you today will help me continue to fight for post-secondary education equity.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/49OadBCZq/c?w=bo13_4WVInisgwJ9X4kYU2O7mXalXo-t-s3kpnGdMaw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2Fib3V0LWJvYiIsInIiOiI1YjRhY2FlYi1lOTI2LTRjNzktODI5MC03YThhNWZkNzAxZmIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ) We can do this, together. v/r \- Dr. Bob

---
| | |
---
| | My education was only made possiblethrough social mobility programs
---
| | The bigger problem regarding SCOTUS's student debt relief decision — education is grossly inequitable.
---
| |
---
| | We have strayed from our path in prioritizing education, and it is time to set things right. I was fortunate to pay only 20% of the costs, with state and federal aid covering the rest. Things have changed dramatically. Today, students are burdened with covering 80% of the expenses, as postsecondary training and education costs skyrocketed beyond inflation. As someone from a lower-middle-class background, I cannot help but question whether I would have been able to pursue my dream of becoming a family doctor in this current system. Sadly, the answer is a resounding no. Beyond my bachelor's degree, I worked my way from community college to medical school and achieved three advanced degrees. My a financial situation couldn't support this endeavor without assistance, and the exorbitant cost of this path today keeps it accessible almost exclusively to the privileged — increasing the divide between the haves and the have nots. The crux lies in America's failure to recognize that education is the cornerstone of our middle class. Educated individuals not only bolster our democracy, but also earn higher incomes and contribute significantly to our nation's revenue. Other countries understand the value of education and ensure it is accessible to all by shouldering the entire cost through government funding. We, on the other hand, have lost our way. Education and healthcare are key priorities for our nation's future. Do not let anyone convince you otherwise. And avoid falling for the notion that we cannot afford to invest in these areas. Quite the contrary, we simply cannot afford not to take action.
---

---
| | HELP ME TAKE ACTION.

clean_body: We have to be ready to FIGHT BACK | Peter, As we come back from a long holiday weekend celebrating July 4th and our great country, I’m asking for your help. Kamala Harris is set to visit Arizona tomorrow where she will be touting the Biden Administration’s so-called “accomplishments.” With her and D.C. Democrats more determined than ever to take back the House majority next year, we can also expect her to launch an onslaught of lying attacks in their attempt to FLIP this all-important seat. After we paused our fundraising for the holiday weekend we’ve fallen behind and that’s why I need your help to make sure we have the resources to FIGHT BACK! As 1 of the 5 seats that gave Republicans the House majority, we’ve become the Left’s top target. With Kamala coming to our state to campaign for Biden and fellow Democrats, we have to be ready for anything. I’ve dedicated my career to defending the American Dream and the Left can’t stand that. They know that the American Dream is a threat to their power and control. That’s why I’m counting on my army of grassroots supporters to help me prepare for Kamala’s visit and attacks to ensure we defend this critical seat. Thank you, Rep. clean_body: | | | | You’re being fined for simply saying the words he or she. Hey Peter Willis, did you see this? I can’t believe this is real news, but check this out. . . This is completely deranged– Not only is this unconstitutional, but it’s also an incredibly dumb and silly idea – I’m sorry to be so frank with you, but that’s the truth. Anytime anyone wants to cause trouble or get in the news, they can pick some obscure pronouns for the day and then start fining and suing others left and right. What has this country come to? China is silently taking our country down from the inside out, we’re facing an unprecedented cost of living and inflation crisis, opioid overdoses have reached record highs, and our southern border remains wide open. And this nonsense is what the Michigan House is most concerned about? It’s time we elect representatives who will focus on the issues that actually impact EVERY American – and not representatives who play partisan games in order to pander to the 1%. | | | | | | Thank you, Michael Markey Republican for Congress, MI-03 | Michael Markey P.O. Box 492, Spring Lake, MI 49456

name: Josh Harder
subject: 1 in 8 kids
body:
We need to tackle child hunger. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65979566/415066410/657127102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg1YWU5ZTQtNjQxYi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GlvK3r-v5RT84UTiE1jCCmoV45eyswJLIAwXOcHifZ4=) | Peter, I believe in the wealthiest country on Earth, no child should go to bed hungry. **But the truth is 1 out of every 8 kids in America are at risk of child hunger - and it’s even higher for Black and Latino communities. ** That’s why I’m so concerned about Republican-led efforts to take away access to free and reduced lunch at school from millions of kids. Nearly 2 in 3 students in my community qualify for and rely on these programs to get enough to eat during the school day - that’s literally thousands of children right here in the Central Valley who will be hungry if the extremists in the GOP get their way. Usually it’s a bully who steals your lunch, not the government. That’s why we have to take back the House from Kevin McCarthy to make sure these cuts never see the light of day. The solution to child hunger is complicated, but it revolves around making sure our child nutrition programs continue to run - even when kids aren’t attending classes in-person. It also means giving families certainty that these programs aren’t just going to evaporate overnight as school budgets get hit. I’ve already passed two bills with Republican colleagues to try to tackle this issue from a multitude of lenses. My _Fresh Produce for Kids in Need Act_ helps farmers bring fresh produce to low-income kids and my _EATS Act_ specifically targets combating hunger on college campuses. **Childhood hunger is a stain on our country. We have to put a spotlight on this crisis and pass real legislation that is going to make a difference. I’m going to keep using my platform in Congress to make sure our kids are getting the food they need. clean_body: We need to tackle child hunger. | = | Peter, I believe in the wealthiest country on Earth, no child should go to bed hungry. But the truth is 1 out of every 8 kids in America are at risk of child hunger - and it’s even higher for Black and Latino communities. That’s why I’m so concerned about Republican-led efforts to take away access to free and reduced lunch at school from millions of kids. Nearly 2 in 3 students in my community qualify for and rely on these programs to get enough to eat during the school day - that’s literally thousands of children right here in the Central Valley who will be hungry if the extremists in the GOP get their way. Usually it’s a bully who steals your lunch, not the government. That’s why we have to take back the House from Kevin McCarthy to make sure these cuts never see the light of day. The solution to child hunger is complicated, but it revolves around making sure our child nutrition programs continue to run - even when kids aren’t attending classes in-person. It also means giving families certainty that these programs aren’t just going to evaporate overnight as school budgets get hit. I’ve already passed two bills with Republican colleagues to try to tackle this issue from a multitude of lenses. My Fresh Produce for Kids in Need Act helps farmers bring fresh produce to low-income kids and my EATS Act specifically targets combating hunger on college campuses. Childhood hunger is a stain on our country. We have to put a spotlight on this crisis and pass real legislation that is going to make a difference. I’m going to keep using my platform in Congress to make sure our kids are getting the food they need. It’s the least we can do. — Josh = *

body:
From the Desk of Senator Amanda Chase
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D0odk-rKA5p0Yzln_rIYdJ-eHYsj5eawSCNpimGUM8IBBHuHi0X1KTtXy7lOJXqtRHByS1rzDHA8uTeXCD-ASR11h4oncl9-0QOlWtAxFR0sb-9ekGhLOA66IfA1MSAfa9bftSJz8ptkn291FrAfSk14Nr_9ZjZZZmG5Kc4_C3Q=&c=3YGM36IzVbMEIQ60V7eDsZlBErWS3_xfGumxvDGMTGfSusnQMtAcxA==&ch=R5K_wyUzZDnxECL_KarowY_5X9V85aR4tIOVhHke4HeRKuxjyFRCeQ==)
---
---
| |
---
|
OFFICIAL NOTIFICATION SUBMITTED
Request for a Hand Count of Absentee Ballots and Full Forensic Audit of Voting Equipment Used in Early Voting in Senate District 12 Submitted

Today, we officially filed a complaint with the Virginia State Board of Elections. First, by email at 7am this morning. We emailed this complaint out this morning in a press release.
Second, my husband and I personally hand delivered a physical copy of the complaint to the Virginia State Board of Elections this afternoon and before the 5pm deadline. They didn't make it easy and initially they refused to give us a receipt. You know me. I wasn't leaving until I got a receipt. We walked away with a receipt. It was clearly a reasonable request.
It was at that time, that we were informed that the Virginia State Board of Elections had already certified the election results. Note this was done prior to today's 5pm deadline.
Why did the Virginia State Board of Elections certify the election results prior to the 5pm deadline?
Friend we will not give up. We will not concede. If the Virginia State Board of Elections fails to address our justified concerns, we will then consider other strategies.
Many have asked me to run as an independent. I will not. In fact, the deadline to run as an independent candidate expired at 7pm on Tuesday, June 20.
Some have said they are going to write my name in. Delegate Nick Freitas successfully ran several years ago. This would force a hand count as they could not rely on voting computers to count the vote in November 7.
You know me. I'm a fighter. And I will fight to make sure you have a voice, even if we have to force a hand count with a write in campaign.
Stay tuned as we pray for guidance.
For God and Country,
---
|
---
|
---
| Virginia Senator, Senate District 11 Republican Candidate for Senate, District 12

clean_body: From the Desk of Senator Amanda Chase | | | | == | | | OFFICIAL NOTIFICATION SUBMITTED Request for a Hand Count of Absentee Ballots and Full Forensic Audit of Voting Equipment Used in Early Voting in Senate District 12 Submitted Today, we officially filed a complaint with the Virginia State Board of Elections. First, by email at 7am this morning. We emailed this complaint out this morning in a press release. Second, my husband and I personally hand delivered a physical copy of the complaint to the Virginia State Board of Elections this afternoon and before the 5pm deadline. They didn't make it easy and initially they refused to give us a receipt. You know me. I wasn't leaving until I got a receipt. We walked away with a receipt. It was clearly a reasonable request. It was at that time, that we were informed that the Virginia State Board of Elections had already certified the election results. Note this was done prior to today's 5pm deadline. Why did the Virginia State Board of Elections certify the election results prior to the 5pm deadline? Friend we will not give up. We will not concede. If the Virginia State Board of Elections fails to address our justified concerns, we will then consider other strategies. Many have asked me to run as an independent. I will not. In fact, the deadline to run as an independent candidate expired at 7pm on Tuesday, June 20. Some have said they are going to write my name in. Delegate Nick Freitas successfully ran several years ago. This would force a hand count as they could not rely on voting computers to count the vote in November 7. You know me. I'm a fighter. And I will fight to make sure you have a voice, even if we have to force a hand count with a write in campaign. Stay tuned as we pray for guidance. For God and Country, | | | Virginia Senator, Senate District 11 Republican Candidate for Senate, District 12 | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | | == | | == | | | == | | | | | | | | | == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | | | | Senator Amanda Chase | P.O. Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

name: Madeleine Dean
subject: with gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
I wanted to reach out to talk about last week. First, I want to thank you – with your help, we hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, and I’m confident our upcoming report will show everyone watching that momentum is on our side. **** Hi Peter —

I wanted to reach out to talk about last week. First, I want to thank you – with your help, we hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, and I’m confident our upcoming report will show everyone watching that momentum is on our side.

This past week also saw incredibly troubling decisions come out of the ultra-conservative Supreme Court. I stand with the marginalized communities affected by these rulings, and to prevent further erosion of hard-earned victories, we must win important elections both in 2023 and 2024 (for example, this year’s open seat for PA Supreme Court).

Despite these rulings, my team and I found a bright spot by marching in the Glenside 4th of July parade yesterday. It’s one of the nation’s oldest consecutively run parades (1904 was its first year!) – and it’s the same parade I enjoyed as a little girl growing up in Glenside! To get to march representing the communities I’ve called home my entire life is a great honor. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65979820/415067560/-466451790?refcode=07052023_md_eoqty_soc_1&refcode2=aec07d3b-661b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWMwN2QzYi02NjFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ttr7ccNrIy92ivm_cklBkxFlFE-VYgAy-Lw-aGetmnY=&emci=be3a5268-571b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=aec07d3b-661b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569) Each year we hand out at least 100 pounds of candy to children along the parade — but this year was a little different (140 pounds!). I do my best to make sure each child gets candy, and that often means zig-zagging the route, taking longer than it should to walk 1.5 miles!

The Glenside parade is just one of the many events I plan to hit while on the campaign trail this year and next. **[Be sure to stay up-to-date with Team Dean and me by following my campaign on Twitter.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65979821/415067562/-466451790?refcode=07052023_md_eoqty_soc_1&refcode2=aec07d3b-661b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWMwN2QzYi02NjFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ttr7ccNrIy92ivm_cklBkxFlFE-VYgAy-Lw-aGetmnY=&emci=be3a5268-571b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=aec07d3b-661b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569)**

I hope you had a wonderful 4th of July, and thank you again for helping us close the quarter with strength.

With gratitude,

– Madeleine [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65979822/415067563/-466451790?refcode=07052023_md_eoqty_soc_1&refcode2=aec07d3b-661b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWMwN2QzYi02NjFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ttr7ccNrIy92ivm_cklBkxFlFE-VYgAy-Lw-aGetmnY=&emci=be3a5268-571b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=aec07d3b-661b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=36373569)
* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_ _We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. First, I want to thank you – with your help, we hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, and I’m confident our upcoming report will show everyone watching that momentum is on our side. ** Hi Peter — I wanted to reach out to talk about last week. First, I want to thank you – with your help, we hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, and I’m confident our upcoming report will show everyone watching that momentum is on our side. This past week also saw incredibly troubling decisions come out of the ultra-conservative Supreme Court. I stand with the marginalized communities affected by these rulings, and to prevent further erosion of hard-earned victories, we must win important elections both in 2023 and 2024 (for example, this year’s open seat for PA Supreme Court). Despite these rulings, my team and I found a bright spot by marching in the Glenside 4th of July parade yesterday. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Controlling other people’s lives has become Hawley’s family business
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We’re going to make him pay for it in 2024.
#
Peter,
**To Josh Hawley, controlling other people’s lives has become a family business.**
And we’re going to make him pay for it in 2024.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34782?refcode=em20230705-3363&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3363%2E614464%2EfOw41J)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34782?refcode=em20230705-3363&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3363%2E614464%2EfOw41J)**
**I’m the 13-year Marine veteran and Democrat running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.** Tens of thousands of people like you have already helped us build a record-breaking grassroots movement to take back power from corrupt elites like Hawley — but we can’t afford to slow down now.
If we’re going to hold Josh Hawley accountable, protect abortion access in all 50 states, and give everyday Americans the freedom to make decisions about their own bodies, families, and lives... **I still need your help.**
**[So Peter, will you chip in $10 or whatever you can afford to my grassroots campaign today? I don’t take a cent from corporate PACs in this race, so you know I’ll always be committed to fighting for real people like you — not shady special interests or mega-donors.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34782?refcode=em20230705-3363&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3363%2E614464%2EfOw41J)**

| | Peter, 2023 has been a landmark year for school choice, one that will be remembered for generations.
