name: Team Schiff
subject: We want you to know first, Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2860%2E5257348%2EjRn5HL ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Incredible news,
Derek! Our campaign just published
our Q2 fundraising numbers and because of the strength of this team, we
were able to do great things this quarter and will be able to do great
things moving forward.

Just take a look at what we accomplished together:

+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|✅ $8.1 million raised. |
|✅ 233,000 Contributions. |
|✅ With an average contribution of $34. |
|✅ $0 from corporate PACs. |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------+

The strength of our campaign depends on every single one of us, and each
contribution makes all the difference. We can’t thank you enough for all
you’ve done to join our grassroots movement to build an economy that works
for everyone, to protect our democracy, and to save our planet.

Q2 brought its own share of challenges — including the sham vote to
censure Adam as political retribution for leading Donald Trump’s
impeachment trial and heading the January 6th Committee. But through these
ceaseless right-wing attacks, you’ve had Adam’s back. And he is proud to
share the badge of honor he wears with you.

We don’t know what MAGA extremists have in store for Adam or this campaign
in the next quarter, but he will always focus on what matters:

Creating new jobs.
Building affordable housing.
Combating the climate crisis.
Achieving universal health care.
And, of course, protecting our democracy.

Democracy isn’t a spectator sport. Adam is not giving up the fight for
truth and justice and with you by his side, he never will.

Simply, thank you.

— Team Schiff

name: Matthew Diemer via ActionNetwork.org
subject: Happy Fourth of July! Update on "Cuyahoga Today" Podcast and Important Election Information
body:
| | | Dear Peter, I hope this email finds you well, and I hope you all enjoyed a wonderful Fourth of July celebration with your loved ones. As we commemorate this special day and celebrate the birth of our nation, I wanted to take a moment to share some exciting news and important updates.
First and foremost, I am thrilled to announce the launch of a new podcast in collaboration with the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party called "Cuyahoga Today." This podcast aims to inform our community about critical issues, legislation, initiatives, and inspiring candidates who are making a difference in our region. I invite you all to tune in and be a part of this informative journey.
One particular episode I highly recommend is "Cuyahoga Court System 101: A Comprehensive Guide," featuring Judge Michael John Ryan. This episode provides valuable insights into our court system, its workings, and how it impacts our lives. [You can watch it by clicking on the link here!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOJPR4Z5lDybbWIPhQSOR8E6UFfiykdVEL93vg6jnXlYmeX8vG6NWL9ld6qU8hv_6u98JXDR2BbgjcCBVtMp2cqIz0GWhFQ9yD_KO8F0Fzx6sKKzCl-0DRZL04wbSMuUh0hSg7SGymW9uIyJCoXGkeVXrZl4-l51Xn_WgCc0W6EGT5OFzxGkhO4q80DLh4JM-cb8wZXnyyV166uDFWky-PE3SCQwGy-wmkdpprEp8dgpbRmb4_xl8vSvNpYjOoAxL0lPB4A6QK4gU2JuiDhazUz0GgAojZdpjsP2gXuca-MuFknhtBJjt3GHDYEvtklzvAChw6zTrSqSW2jsRnLUfIeNScRW-yaGCY3jA6SXs-sk/3xm/_f1Qei7SQZSI4odyZ7lZgg/h0/Z35wWSSQJdS-9Wt-cILFi87TodXazD0T9EvSOyK8yko)
As many of you are aware, Ohio finds itself at a democracy crossroads, and it is crucial that we stand together to protect the values we hold dear. I have always deeply loved Ohio and believe in the strength and promise of the United States of America. In these challenging times, it is essential to actively safeguard our democracy. Together, we can make a difference, and I promise to fight passionately to protect the principles that make our nation great.
There is an upcoming special election in Ohio on August 8th, and it holds immense importance for the future of our state. I strongly encourage you all to get engaged. [Please find detailed information about the election and the issue at hand by visiting this link here!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEmZfMpm7rlvUWjhVUbCwIX-gUhVNrDgvIiscSghe0cIwc3CH_edilSeRHxZohGtggsWB8wavLud7ZSwTyVULdsf2dOc5iV4WwHWgXwKGhqUiBb9x2-NgHNzFjcoBI3leSIOr6byedGxayJN34LeoYSckc9v4ohYswHpGvNdlznMlHsJa0Yj_vuRubps-uJJONBiYcWric8TNx44TtQDfquKqb5A5MuYxujmND81zs2qVZpqkJkyo4uD8uk6bSn3tbOcd-qXiJ0kGCO-P2A-3ahVE6FPnklcEh0mq8-fZgBljH5cIUHWdEo3In1iCxAiG3kc7G3vgsIc6zE7ABbLgOHkYdW-X4DCWE_WpdHu4k5zUzELYABeuS-vgDVQGAYzwg/3xm/_f1Qei7SQZSI4odyZ7lZgg/h1/Xixzqjtzlb53_AmqEpufZmMq1TIpVZh8HQDm7dGpjDI)[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEmZfMpm7rlvUWjhVUbCwIX-gUhVNrDgvIiscSghe0cIwc3CH_edilSeRHxZohGtggsWB8wavLud7ZSwTyVULdvNu4-RWlNExYUgldH1WoimFEMQ7USErQVD43xHAqH7XjUl_Ft2kdovuTjRa_iXnOb2Fp6M5fMW47NJnkrOFfKNs7HJ1l9CNmx_BANyWracqM5MpYqTI2cG4NfKnOWLHYIm-MhKfoV6b-ml8qXOzRbHXCIXY-tg_vGe4rdUbFNvdhmsqqdzOGpKLZPegt1M_DT74EcLl1t3KbNtYCbibmb6Z7BC5Nh87WgpR2XSl0043OQhmnFKLMutTJ1WkSDEdKgrqMdqUnMFIIYbWZmNgch_Q5jJcMnDOCBC2NoE9gWsYA/3xm/_f1Qei7SQZSI4odyZ7lZgg/h2/OG9niPc3mHcPguXyLwoGBasy0fpR1ZeRaqD8PKxL3nA)
On August 8th, I urge all Ohio residents among us to vote "NO" to protect Ohio's democracy and preserve the power of the people. The future of our state is in our hands, and together, we can shape a better tomorrow.
Once again, I wish you all a happy Fourth of July, filled with joy, reflection, and unity. Let's embrace the spirit of our founding fathers and continue working towards a more perfect union. Thank you all for your support and dedication to our shared goals.
Warm regards,Matthew Diemer
* * *

name: Working Families Party
subject: SIGN ON: The Abortion Justice Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
The Abortion Justice Act is a clear vision for a nation where abortion care is normalized and easily accessible for anyone who needs it. | | | Peter, In the year since the extremist, out-of-touch Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade,_ 25 states have banned or restricted access to abortion. But for the far right, that’s still not enough. Their goal is to eliminate the freedom to receive abortion care nationwide — and we need to fight back with a bold vision and a plan of our own. Last week, WFP champion Rep. Ayanna Pressley introduced **the Abortion Justice Act,** legislation which would affirmatively legalize abortion and miscarriage care for every state in the nation, and provide the infrastructure that would get us to true universal access — especially for people of color, immigrants, LGBTQ+, and low income people who so often face barriers to receiving care. **[Join us in supporting the Abortion Justice Act, Ayanna Pressley’s plan to ensure that everyone in this country has the freedom to receive abortion care without fear, shame, or systemic barriers. Click here to sign the petition today.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlMt4cxn0OolCoyXreppPcfvbKoxtqnAPsnf2tCz2VnR8JbeYLl-qZ8ZpQVsCJwBcVqVma08jVBgdXM9p-GkDi8CdWPNYVMilGc6NRDGoAEYomZA0-5cP6lcVFTqspJjSnngeEnFpqcJ-gJkjxthJvGPyYYIZPrdu1NhragD8VAw8KrgYj11eliD5IySOoxiYk45FFfiTv4ta15N3LPmPaUOlXW53IkupPJvNUV8SYAJOx3r5ih2FuAA0U1Ftd0JvRMjw6Dw3kFmsDDjNqxZysuuWPToDse9auMM-s_Jx8D0ouQ7kQWMcKmb4GqixjLbYtdNtj6A7y9OfEk0rie4Rqru1_nICimLyIycEfNoYPxhWuUluUBlJJK9fO89AIObu9cT3XdWvb9ZMJqcWNWAQhWmDm-2UMDJSN5_4MtiQT88PaWg9m_mC1PT0ZS1ISVy-goHRSYSHuEtmsKNfE009xzlgxxm-HL9j4r65Tal5lIsg/3xm/AsmV0OYtRGWCX6mJZmK0dg/h0/y8XWBDtZrrokKV7eCnTs1F5yo_iECSgjtA4qiuHWF-Q)** **[Sign the petition »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlMt4cxn0OolCoyXreppPcfvbKoxtqnAPsnf2tCz2VnR8JbeYLl-qZ8ZpQVsCJwBcVqVma08jVBgdXM9p-GkDi8CdWPNYVMilGc6NRDGoAEYomZA0-5cP6lcVFTqspJjSnngeEnFpqcJ-gJkjxthJvGPyYYIZPrdu1NhragD8VAw8KrgYj11eliD5IySOoxiYk45FFfiTv4ta15N3LPmPaUOlXW53IkupPJvNUV8SYAJOx3r5ih2FuAA0U1Ftd0JvRMjw6Dw3kFmsDDjNqxZysuRLmul7sRM8Jtm0_p4gTXFyunS04j4eIYS1plyUAEJjVDCDEq-sC5Axn4gL3-gsuazSu3rM3eXHj6fj2DA23bn1PH0g7TcKgg_z4dugI4XObLS58WGi8DBdeFPwQe_mvPKyOpDtqorGxgseM5dJw8BHds_0TCQiKuI-nUTBX2_MXj79D1YJxcLVVAFLZJ8qpHO7Gb8Qb65ZjVI1bPH8sgKA/3xm/AsmV0OYtRGWCX6mJZmK0dg/h1/euNYjTBMF7Vv_mZzicwMNHIe96y2metvd4xYWDRAA0Y)** **The Abortion Justice Act is a clear vision for a nation where abortion care is normalized and easily accessible for anyone who needs it. The bill would:**
* Affirm a legal right to abortion and miscarriage care
* Require insurance coverage to include abortion care
* Protect patients and providers from criminalization
* Call for necessary federal investments in abortion care, including training, research, outreach, doula care, and innovation
* Remove systemic barriers to care including for immigrant families
* And address disparities and systemic racism in the healthcare system

While we continue to fight back against state abortion bans across the nation, we need to go even bigger to make this a country where anyone needing an abortion or miscarriage care can get it — regardless of their race, class, gender, nationality, disability status, or the makeup of their state legislature. **[Ayanna Pressley’s proposed Abortion Justice Act would transform this country for the better and affirmatively secure the crucial freedom to receive an abortion. Sign the petition now to show your support.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlMt4cxn0OolCoyXreppPcfvbKoxtqnAPsnf2tCz2VnR8JbeYLl-qZ8ZpQVsCJwBcVqVma08jVBgdXM9p-GkDi8CdWPNYVMilGc6NRDGoAEYomZA0-5cP6lcVFTqspJjSnngeEnFpqcJ-gJkjxthJvGPyYYIZPrdu1NhragD8VAw8KrgYj11eliD5IySOoxiYk45FFfiTv4ta15N3LPmPaUOlXW53IkupPJvNUV8SYAJOx3r5ih2FuAA0U1Ftd0JvRMjw6Dw3kFmsDDjNqxZysuWNCVQLA7D4N-GAKirFA5OK5o8KuKdLo48dw4ylli0mIFFsSCF-rYpoxNpCxoggBkA07MVXfXSiNyAK7I_OLNBILTAqIHplEx2kGzou-sdktsJUJqgNHa2H2ZxJhpUrz9bsp_BzWhrKPr8dtAWq6vnesMhicVxAQQMKkotxWh5_9YrssznIW5E2Cj1pc8qtlLkZdYw_bLxxqqjXh7nbp0_A/3xm/AsmV0OYtRGWCX6mJZmK0dg/h2/wJyv-UQrpGIPV6zJ0K3RFIUk9i1UBtajHxJpceNZkIg)** clean_body: The Abortion Justice Act is a clear vision for a nation where abortion care is normalized and easily accessible for anyone who needs it. | | | Peter, In the year since the extremist, out-of-touch Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, 25 states have banned or restricted access to abortion. But for the far right, that’s still not enough. Their goal is to eliminate the freedom to receive abortion care nationwide — and we need to fight back with a bold vision and a plan of our own. Last week, WFP champion Rep. Ayanna Pressley introduced the Abortion Justice Act, legislation which would affirmatively legalize abortion and miscarriage care for every state in the nation, and provide the infrastructure that would get us to true universal access — especially for people of color, immigrants, LGBTQ+, and low income people who so often face barriers to receiving care. The Abortion Justice Act is a clear vision for a nation where abortion care is normalized and easily accessible for anyone who needs it. The bill would: Affirm a legal right to abortion and miscarriage care Require insurance coverage to include abortion care Protect patients and providers from criminalization Call for necessary federal investments in abortion care, including training, research, outreach, doula care, and innovation Remove systemic barriers to care including for immigrant families And address disparities and systemic racism in the healthcare system While we continue to fight back against state abortion bans across the nation, we need to go even bigger to make this a country where anyone needing an abortion or miscarriage care can get it — regardless of their race, class, gender, nationality, disability status, or the makeup of their state legislature. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: What independence means for our work together:
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
I hope you had a happy and safe Fourth of July! I was glad to spend it with friends and family and to watch the beautiful fireworks in #TX07. I also had a chance to think about the principles and promise that we celebrate on our Independence Day—which of course leads me to think about why our work together is so important.
On Independence Day, we celebrate the founding principles and highest aspirations of our country, memorialized in the Declaration of Independence. Since that time, generations of Americans have worked and fought to make our union of states a more perfect one, and to expand the rights reflected in our Declaration to all, with its principles as their guide. And that is what everyone on #TeamLizzie is fighting for—today and every day.
Whether it’s voting rights or reproductive rights or LGBTQ+ rights, our efforts to win our race in TX-07 and to help candidates across Texas and our country win their elections is all about making the vision and promise of our country a reality for all Americans. We know there is still work to do, but we also know how much we can accomplish when we work together.
I’m so grateful to you for being part of #TeamLizzie and your generous contributions to our work in the past, in 2024, and beyond.
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie_signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

_A celebration of the greatest country on Earth, this holiday symbolizes everything I fought for while in the Army and what I will continue fighting for in Congress – _**freedom, liberty, and independence.**_ _

But while true patriots were out celebrating America, D.C. Democrats continued to fundraise and launch attacks, helping them surge ahead at the start of the month.

After graduating from West Point, I became an Apache helicopter pilot in the Army so that I could fight to defend this great country from our enemies.
---
In my immediate family, we have a combined 60 years of military service fighting to protect freedom.
---
We understand and value the importance of freedom and the opportunities this country provides – _because only in America could the great-great-grandson of a slave become a member of Congress._
---
**I ran for Congress so I could continue to serve my country and defend the freedom and liberty given to us on that July 4th so long ago.**
---
_But now we are under attack from a different enemy, the radical Left, as they try to destroy American values and the very foundation of this country._
---
I can promise you that I will **NEVER** stop fighting to Save America, but I need your help.
---
We can’t let the Left widen this fundraising gap and surge ahead to take back the House and destroy this country.
---

Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2900 for the primary election, $2,900 for the primary run-off election, and $2,900 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

clean_body: I need you to help close the gap after pausing for July 4th. | Friend, After last week’s push to reach our end-of-quarter deadline, I decided to pause fundraising over the holiday weekend to truly celebrate our great country's birth. The 4th of July holds a special place in my heart. A celebration of the greatest country on Earth, this holiday symbolizes everything I fought for while in the Army and what I will continue fighting for in Congress – freedom, liberty, and independence. But while true patriots were out celebrating America, D.C. Democrats continued to fundraise and launch attacks, helping them surge ahead at the start of the month. I am calling on my army of grassroots patriots to help us close the gap so we can continue the fight to Save America from the radical Left. After graduating from West Point, I became an Apache helicopter pilot in the Army so that I could fight to defend this great country from our enemies. In my immediate family, we have a combined 60 years of military service fighting to protect freedom. We understand and value the importance of freedom and the opportunities this country provides – because only in America could the great-great-grandson of a slave become a member of Congress. I ran for Congress so I could continue to serve my country and defend the freedom and liberty given to us on that July 4th so long ago. But now we are under attack from a different enemy, the radical Left, as they try to destroy American values and the very foundation of this country. I can promise you that I will NEVER stop fighting to Save America, but I need your help. We can’t let the Left widen this fundraising gap and surge ahead to take back the House and destroy this country. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Congressman (TX-38) U.S. Army Captain Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch. Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2900 for the primary election, $2,900 for the primary run-off election, and $2,900 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

name: Andrei Cherny
subject: I’m so grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona
body:
What this is all about

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65983563/415074181/1272516037?refcode=em_XX_XXXX.XX.XX_XX_XX_header_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjJkODBkYTktNmMxYi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r1jhEkN6zzTWtSOgYywKMRTo730CoTVFm4GxTqUUiR0=) Friends, thank you!

I am so deeply grateful to all those who have stepped forward to offer your support in this campaign thus far. With your support, we finished our first fundraising period in the race strong: over 1,000 contributions in less than three months.

Amid the flurry of texts and emails you get from our campaign (and probably from others), it’s easy to forget what this is all about. I’m not running to raise money; I’m running to do my part in lifting up America and Americans.

On July 5, 1861, 162 years ago today, Congress sat to listen to a message from President Abraham Lincoln summing what was at stake in the Civil War that had recently begun.

President Lincoln told us, “It is a struggle for maintaining in the world that form and substance of government whose leading object is to elevate the condition of men; to lift artificial weights from all shoulders; to clear the paths of laudable pursuit for all; to afford all an unfettered start and a fair chance in the race of life."

**We’re not at war, but we are fighting for the same ideals. “An unfettered start and a fair chance in the race of life” for all Americans is still what we’re striving for.**

That’s what all those emails and texts we send are all about. I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs, so our campaign relies on the generosity of thousands of individuals like you who share these ideals and want to see positive change in our community and country. Your support means we can wage this campaign for a more equitable and prosperous future for all.

And your support means the world to me. Thank you!

– Andrei _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$3 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65983565/415074182/-1902212844?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.05_b1_ac_all&amount=3&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjJkODBkYTktNmMxYi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r1jhEkN6zzTWtSOgYywKMRTo730CoTVFm4GxTqUUiR0=) | [$30 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65983568/415074183/-1902212844?refcode=em_fr_2023.07.05_b1_ac_all&amount=30&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjJkODBkYTktNmMxYi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r1jhEkN6zzTWtSOgYywKMRTo730CoTVFm4GxTqUUiR0=)

clean_body: What this is all about = Friends, thank you! I am so deeply grateful to all those who have stepped forward to offer your support in this campaign thus far. With your support, we finished our first fundraising period in the race strong: over 1,000 contributions in less than three months. Amid the flurry of texts and emails you get from our campaign (and probably from others), it’s easy to forget what this is all about. I’m not running to raise money; I’m running to do my part in lifting up America and Americans. On July 5, 1861, 162 years ago today, Congress sat to listen to a message from President Abraham Lincoln summing what was at stake in the Civil War that had recently begun. President Lincoln told us, “It is a struggle for maintaining in the world that form and substance of government whose leading object is to elevate the condition of men; to lift artificial weights from all shoulders; to clear the paths of laudable pursuit for all; to afford all an unfettered start and a fair chance in the race of life." We’re not at war, but we are fighting for the same ideals. “An unfettered start and a fair chance in the race of life” for all Americans is still what we’re striving for. That’s what all those emails and texts we send are all about. I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs, so our campaign relies on the generosity of thousands of individuals like you who share these ideals and want to see positive change in our community and country. Your support means we can wage this campaign for a more equitable and prosperous future for all. And your support means the world to me. body:
It goes without saying that this decision is an enormous step backward in a decades-long fight to ensure a more equitable society.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65984882/415077148/-344990004?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230705-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDQyNTU5Yi02ZTFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LBnmjeHkmKYx8YP01oUv7rI44Eu1WZc3Vx6lyUF1pDw=)
---
| Peter,

Last week, the Supreme Court voted to end affirmative action, effectively dismantling efforts to ensure higher education is accessible to all, regardless of race.

It goes without saying that this decision is an enormous step backward in a decades-long fight to ensure a more equitable society. In a case that would have reaffirmed the value of diversity in our nation’s institutions, SCOTUS has chosen to side with those who question those values.

Let’s be clear, diversity is one of our nation’s greatest strengths. Taking affirmative action off the table will strip the next generations – especially Black students and students of color who are historically disadvantaged – of equal opportunity to quality education.

I am beyond disappointed in their decision, but I’m not backing down.

[_**I hope you will join me in expressing your support for affirmative action by adding your name below.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65984883/415077149/-1327596756?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDQyNTU5Yi02ZTFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LBnmjeHkmKYx8YP01oUv7rI44Eu1WZc3Vx6lyUF1pDw=&emci=f3559aa1-531b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=9d42559b-6e1b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=799895)

clean_body: It goes without saying that this decision is an enormous step backward in a decades-long fight to ensure a more equitable society. | = | Peter, Last week, the Supreme Court voted to end affirmative action, effectively dismantling efforts to ensure higher education is accessible to all, regardless of race. It goes without saying that this decision is an enormous step backward in a decades-long fight to ensure a more equitable society. In a case that would have reaffirmed the value of diversity in our nation’s institutions, SCOTUS has chosen to side with those who question those values. Let’s be clear, diversity is one of our nation’s greatest strengths. Taking affirmative action off the table will strip the next generations – especially Black students and students of color who are historically disadvantaged – of equal opportunity to quality education. I am beyond disappointed in their decision, but I’m not backing down. | Onward, Valerie * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5f7309a6035e4e54a652e765b27b05ae&_e=gH6kAnJmr1YxnU0MN_iQeS6piAlZh0U9kKQYGXRLlDM1__EmbrYsMledss_4FUBQW11t4eEhMbG7nrlY0rPK27R_GWDT72VK_FyebmHfszEljFhJGHN3buPsstLCch88UtqoQunnAHMCuLCVOr50vCkLbsDIhny5yoh6v6hIffpKOf3dkvrOTPNS51gamFqyjWR3SOE2jOOhtisGyii7QL1elJsJxpqJ1GyXPZsY44WGIPuu6WCrjT5juwqya8OlFJLqNGoIoIrbSotXE2kcIYd5dh7sTfb1iBOh5qYT6Xg9qcd6DsXtrWJJFTL90h7f40T0XoEKXYSwtzDc7GoCEVUSGuoFheUdZ9BQQBau_Q3NC6PHLCghoiD4UAEJ1SWW540YYpFq6LbF6hwY2OJRfB11yaW6d_gwYtqEZejEPek%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5f7309a6035e4e54a652e765b27b05ae&_e=gH6kAnJmr1YxnU0MN_iQeS6piAlZh0U9kKQYGXRLlDM1__EmbrYsMledss_4FUBQW11t4eEhMbG7nrlY0rPK27R_GWDT72VK_FyebmHfszEljFhJGHN3buPsstLCch88UtqoQunnAHMCuLCVOr50vCkLbsDIhny5yoh6v6hIffpKOf3dkvrOTPNS51gamFqyjWR3SOE2jOOhtisGyii7QL1elJsJxpqJ1GyXPZsY44WGIPuu6WCrjT5juwqya8OlFJLqNGoIoIrbSotXE2kcIU_1Zv_j573uWVRa-ygHQRon14FH5k_gOBFqWsxj1LQ1Qu9xXrWFiVFEui2mfH7Q1aldJeWwwd-gi0zBOFiZ7Rer_eNil6jp9zwAluAFUp_X6VK33lPOTygDBi05pZHGKxb_pz96s0gt58JG2ZV4LIA%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5f7309a6035e4e54a652e765b27b05ae&_e=gH6kAnJmr1YxnU0MN_iQeS6piAlZh0U9kKQYGXRLlDM1__EmbrYsMledss_4FUBQW11t4eEhMbG7nrlY0rPK27R_GWDT72VK_FyebmHfszEljFhJGHN3buPsstLCch88UtqoQunnAHMCuLCVOr50vCkLbsDIhny5yoh6v6hIffpKOf3dkvrOTPNS51gamFqyjWR3SOE2jOOhtisGyii7QL1elJsJxpqJ1GyXPZsY44WGIPuu6WCrjT5juwqya8OlFJLqNGoIoIrbSotXE2kcIShNH77bkABA5zwlEfQ_OMzP4vzOW19QsxGXVHPqPWJANKJ1ieElRU-eyWjEH6Oa6XjZa0Eo8-xWOFknNZ_VjXTFyXpdp-8EN_1YtkDM3h9TiiL8gVsjdHvEw17mNmraI5uPEYxHHwy2dKUuPxYt_M0%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5f7309a6035e4e54a652e765b27b05ae&_e=gH6kAnJmr1YxnU0MN_iQeS6piAlZh0U9kKQYGXRLlDM1__EmbrYsMledss_4FUBQW11t4eEhMbG7nrlY0rPK27R_GWDT72VK_FyebmHfszEljFhJGHN3buPsstLCch88UtqoQunnAHMCuLCVOr50vCkLbsDIhny5yoh6v6hIffpKOf3dkvrOTPNS51gamFqyjWR3SOE2jOOhtisGyii7QL1elJsJxpqJ1GyXPZsY44WGIPuu6WCrjT5juwqya8OlFJLqNGoIoIrbSotXE2kcIYmg79vFiaTwzLHbZdNirA2z5mIaWJ8Sqs_ru6YjKy_tf1MFadSsYxc13pCnB3UoWN37KHH_Bte00B921ihe5VB0UTqPh-guFXjtmOyB1S_Ym8M0gPe6wNFnOxTPPHyp57-fC27CqBUl_jdOZ2ShewE%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

---

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75bedf5b401e41a894f26dc76d037f89&_e=WNrazjPos-6-KaM0e3ttUSfqQegFm7yVjg_OI31KCQisJY_V2s_A7WqZgWZzChoCYOX6-NS0jHhsiCqOmlBsJNSUV8bMIy4D6mxALUR86xLwKIsd6AacwQAf66WcNC_M3lVDQBcY2Uw_ffJiy9vmBCW1v5jsWluDNFX-Cv_yhX-Yc39K-tUkx632TcGMjLv7-C0UxCmc6_uU67Ee-vjKdHnGQBtm1p3AP-ywZRVYfQ3lie1cst23cQok4OGduRD7o3MlFLBh_t8DciUp7yPD0linJgMtlGfRvWX594i8x-dKtSm6LE99RfP6pcvfqsYFHjaAT81Kag5jHjQCEsqArNNHrENyfP18YA-7tmVocsr1oSt8FMsYL9hLN338r5zX0OYVEwp7NtTUCn_23VH1hQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75bedf5b401e41a894f26dc76d037f89&_e=WNrazjPos-6-KaM0e3ttUSfqQegFm7yVjg_OI31KCQisJY_V2s_A7WqZgWZzChoCYOX6-NS0jHhsiCqOmlBsJNSUV8bMIy4D6mxALUR86xLwKIsd6AacwQAf66WcNC_M3lVDQBcY2Uw_ffJiy9vmBCW1v5jsWluDNFX-Cv_yhX-Yc39K-tUkx632TcGMjLv7-C0UxCmc6_uU67Ee-vjKdHnGQBtm1p3AP-ywZRVYfQ3lie1cst23cQok4OGduRD7sAGEnoMFrvGT7Xjr2pwU2fAYNFuuIqvj5FyjvfsXpIcCecM3Dzi3tXes4bkMPwxLyFwx2T7F-itRu8l1838d7mGZFamfJOetuulGmd23oRJyZXlZtsH-NWjsu2CvnGhlncNCOGrO2cKUPIVhFveYZg%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75bedf5b401e41a894f26dc76d037f89&_e=WNrazjPos-6-KaM0e3ttUSfqQegFm7yVjg_OI31KCQisJY_V2s_A7WqZgWZzChoCYOX6-NS0jHhsiCqOmlBsJNSUV8bMIy4D6mxALUR86xLwKIsd6AacwQAf66WcNC_M3lVDQBcY2Uw_ffJiy9vmBCW1v5jsWluDNFX-Cv_yhX-Yc39K-tUkx632TcGMjLv7-C0UxCmc6_uU67Ee-vjKdHnGQBtm1p3AP-ywZRVYfQ3lie1cst23cQok4OGduRD7ZAqgBM2F4a44_afuAiK40v0Ks34od4bkdR7x_IKc5b5iTW-ILXUM-986gXwYSZkIULg53hk_1kPDTQOCdpFpSWdmo3B85CD89886km2JJLNYAw0cIxp7HAD4jU6MutpIBcb3I_EA9F-MKVGNKhcLxQ%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Freedom Nation Today
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: EMERGENCY ALERT 2024
subject: Brett Kavanaugh STEPS DOWN?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
body:
The liberal media is going ballistic & Democrats have just called for Justice Kavanaugh's removal days before major SCOTUS opinions to be issued.

| |
---
| | | | | _**BRETT KAVANAUGH STEPS DOWN?**_

clean_body: A moment like this requires swift action!| | | Friend, It was recently revealed that President Trump has an INCREDIBLE 50-POINT LEAD among young voters in the primary. But why stop at the primary? Why not the general election, too? After all, even CNN is reporting on Biden’s failure to connect with younger voters: “ It’s a hard sell’: Gen-Z activists warn Biden over frustration among young voters” So, in honor of this 50-POINT LEAD, President Trump set an ambitious goal to register 50,000 new young voters who are eager to Make America Great Again! And we’d love YOUR help to build up our Voter Registration Fund to get them registered and mobilized to vote for President Donald J. Trump! | Thank you, Team Trump \---------- Forwarded message ---------From: Donald J. Trump Date: Tue, July 3, 2023 Subject: This will give you hope!To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | | Friend, With everything going on in our country right now, it would be easy to lose hope in the future of America. But today, I want to give you a very good reason to have hope... ...A new poll shows that our campaign is winning with young voters. In fact, young Americans favor our campaign by 50 POINTS in the primary. You read that right – 50 POINTS! Our America First message strongly resonates with the NEXT GENERATION of Americans. “America First” appeals to ALL red-blooded Americans – of all walks of life. That’s the beauty of our movement. Nobody in their right mind can disagree with a plan to put the forgotten citizens of our country FIRST! So, as you celebrate the Fourth of July tomorrow – do not let Joe Biden’s destruction bring you down. You have every reason in the world to have hope in America. As I so often tell you, Friend – THE BEST IS YET TO COME. Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Protect Your Bank Account with THESE 3 Simple Steps
body:
Discover these 3 simple steps here.

| | | | | Dear Reader, Starting as soon as a few months from now, the United States government will make a sweeping change to bank accounts nationwide. It will give them unprecedented powers to control your bank account. They could closely track every transaction. They could even freeze it. Unless you protect yourself today. Fortunately, there are [3 simple steps](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f75c5eca511a4f7c92647232401ca764&_e=Dw4MtNLfA7VGw_oToswm85PAd0ogugnQikAlMpiq3Uq15BunZedlVFSeZuIE4dPVJRN2PjdygyC_OVTMGf3AhJWzIUnYSaxS45mbXpyBb5PBLI2fISoO-aq1NiKNaO09-vLKCLx1RTi8NtzdAHuuiC23NTYwbjAkt2b35iGNiNOuerOY2uptGRVZG8ZjNCEKOSUTqcStsjGPbFrRbeobeTC6RUUpk5pWtz9MH98LUMEBPsVTwF9aArZ8Ep03MU_8e-Rxo5_t6XxKJoBtCRCVLg%3D%3D) you can take to safeguard your savings. [Discover these 3 simple steps here.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f75c5eca511a4f7c92647232401ca764&_e=Dw4MtNLfA7VGw_oToswm85PAd0ogugnQikAlMpiq3Uq15BunZedlVFSeZuIE4dPVJRN2PjdygyC_OVTMGf3AhJWzIUnYSaxS45mbXpyBb5PBLI2fISoO-aq1NiKNaO09FzY7VltxtYhN_sRfiUocSlzTFBN81m_qc1A-MzxWHCoM02pV6KS7xy881x4K83dl7K6ssCS2Pi4u1IS_TagQvCy_0Lup6ZGP9R9DsbIq9Sp_sHRG96vAtzIfTxPuoKPNegHDgEMMdLxjPAM0Wzpyig%3D%3D) Good luck and God bless! |

name: GIFFORDS
subject: No one is free from the threat of gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This July 4th weekend, there were at least 22 mass shootings across our country
#

Friends -
July 4th should be a time for friends and family to gather, celebrate, and relax together. But instead, holiday celebrations for people across our country were cut short this weekend due to mass shootings—at least 22 of them.
This is not normal.
We have made progress in the movement to end gun violence, but we still live in a nation where the threat of gun violence looms over us daily—even on days that should be filled with joy and celebration. This is a uniquely American problem, and we can’t give up in the fight to keep our country safe.
July 4th should be a celebration of freedom. But no one is free from the threat of gun violence. We won’t rest here at GIFFORDS until a future free from gun violence in America is a reality.
[**So please, if you’re with us in this lifesaving fight, consider making a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230705-1-15&t=1&akid=6096%2E3935704%2ErLMbEK)
Thank you for standing with us,
The team at GIFFORDS
* * *

**GIFFORDS PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. A contribution to GIFFORDS PAC goes directly towards our work to save lives.**
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july23.pfB_59&refcode=em230705-1-15&t=2&akid=6096%2E3935704%2ErLMbEK)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=6096%2E3935704%2ErLMbEK) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb0407be64f9470fa2613a8716026299&_e=AiTPUlNC3gRzFPE1_1Y-62ynSyfu7jQz0TDwxRs7f7WvQa-GDya_rQkdL2GGMshpXa58YVafzKtANPMxmmDr5M21J8DNnceJy7kuUjwL4G9n7nDoscfC1b_LYbCYtcVS17ROHyyIUD_kQObxYU9Rxojs3-xVBx8fnEayLrep0KIKvQR8s66KaCQsEeaET9gat-W9RP1LVMHkvNrLjb8sh5CjlQ0doNpiWig4CLFj0Ym_2YMRJRay8_Lms972xlySl3p__vpHOh_0LDPEodWae8LoMVog6jxCY5t2fsOu2ugQcB71BeITc5D9xotS8notLdcgddaThSqnVkOWX9-eYqNqjCbn1eaeGNq-opXArvg%3D)
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb0407be64f9470fa2613a8716026299&_e=AiTPUlNC3gRzFPE1_1Y-62ynSyfu7jQz0TDwxRs7f7WvQa-GDya_rQkdL2GGMshpXa58YVafzKtANPMxmmDr5M21J8DNnceJy7kuUjwL4G9n7nDoscfC1b_LYbCYtcVS17ROHyyIUD_kQObxYU9Rxojs3-xVBx8fnEayLrep0KIKvQR8s66KaCQsEeaET9gahcm6uZmkZyIykFOHyivuzk-oOj15hAhhCB9Bteev9nQAycIP_XLOtydsvzr6JllDNb49UMS_IfTO_6KmgFYguLTc3D64U7gC8fjuvabZ4xBWEHcMkkuBc4rbdAParUxVN79IWtPKinMZ_pyEtoxzNrqMw-FI_4sXQZq29T2AFTE%3D)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You've seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I've chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**."

I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb0407be64f9470fa2613a8716026299&_e=AiTPUlNC3gRzFPE1_1Y-62ynSyfu7jQz0TDwxRs7f7WvQa-GDya_rQkdL2GGMshpXa58YVafzKtANPMxmmDr5M21J8DNnceJy7kuUjwL4G9n7nDoscfC1b_LYbCYtcVS17ROHyyIUD_kQObxYU9Rxojs3-xVBx8fnEayLrep0KIKvQR8s66KaCQsEeaET9gaaaB34Zdb5_2g8MBxAu49JCEDIYLSZnEy-ReNm8nW6KP1MYoBxrPNhfNU6ONv_XpLF8RIpOKTI1vM0ZdQ1qFkEt_XKsrZNqmGYJV-Q_O81AD7HabXGHWGbW0mFbnzSyPwDIkjPkMvnaxWwA1d091sQA3rViU4FP0GGPxCeyKXIZo%3D)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb0407be64f9470fa2613a8716026299&_e=AiTPUlNC3gRzFPE1_1Y-62ynSyfu7jQz0TDwxRs7f7WvQa-GDya_rQkdL2GGMshpXa58YVafzKtANPMxmmDr5M21J8DNnceJy7kuUjwL4G9n7nDoscfC1b_LYbCYtcVS17ROHyyIUD_kQObxYU9Rxojs3-xVBx8fnEayLrep0KIKvQR8s66KaCQsEeaET9gaSxTGabXo4hOeaKPgJJHfkld4eed6qtPZNnBlr8pi-1Mb2WGyaKN0dESfcKRJgHHGKvNNoWfng6lcgvHgLynfAkWbS3zQk1TlfnbIa7nsh1O_NnBbGpSwjq7pjD7YQT-i20OoZtmQnMjkTjPen5qqg_SUMLPJpAwc43OlzmTgexg%3D)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That's where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb0407be64f9470fa2613a8716026299&_e=AiTPUlNC3gRzFPE1_1Y-62ynSyfu7jQz0TDwxRs7f7WvQa-GDya_rQkdL2GGMshpXa58YVafzKtANPMxmmDr5M21J8DNnceJy7kuUjwL4G9n7nDoscfC1b_LYbCYtcVS17ROHyyIUD_kQObxYU9Rxojs3-xVBx8fnEayLrep0KIKvQR8s66KaCQsEeaET9gayvPdRFFdlMb_Py7-BWWTFKGIvXo85o8KzoVMYbSSvM0d4EOTADPlXVkkN-AxgT-OXV3Py7dLGypGw9F0r2PcGg_tfETe4tITUnFU-btOtnqCz7sXr2Xs5QesG3KqhbFmFGu5C1tdQlvGXF-tfCW63ynsG2kLcrPdtK5yynPQshQ%3D)?**

When you do, I'll be following up as the case progresses but I'll also keep you informed of the great work I'm doing at OMG . . . and it's exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I'll admit is thrilling. And I'm starting armed with all of the lessons I've learned to avoid the pitfalls I've experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we're more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I'm asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb0407be64f9470fa2613a8716026299&_e=AiTPUlNC3gRzFPE1_1Y-62ynSyfu7jQz0TDwxRs7f7WvQa-GDya_rQkdL2GGMshpXa58YVafzKtANPMxmmDr5M21J8DNnceJy7kuUjwL4G9n7nDoscfC1b_LYbCYtcVS17ROHyyIUD_kQObxYU9Rxojs3-xVBx8fnEayLrep0KIKvQR8s66KaCQsEeaET9gadyv0afdTMWQSUe3gJ5nQlavUMbirK1E0oWXaaJ6fzHL6nnLce8IKKdV_HgDuK0jSonvqnx5t0BESFMW_QS1Hl7IzFCTa82r8QdFuyIoU6Cnc15a9xZf3QeP77Z9xmTpaUuNdmAeJOpyKZITbAqskyfjVCTOoMEe6KAXLkpL9Nwk%3D)**. And I'll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb0407be64f9470fa2613a8716026299&_e=AiTPUlNC3gRzFPE1_1Y-62ynSyfu7jQz0TDwxRs7f7WvQa-GDya_rQkdL2GGMshpXa58YVafzKtANPMxmmDr5M21J8DNnceJy7kuUjwL4G9n7nDoscfC1b_LYbCYtcVS17ROHyyIUD_kQObxYU9Rxojs3-xVBx8fnEayLrep0KIKvQR8s66KaCQsEeaET9ga8WFbT6Igly7VKd9L9CDAnVl8yDi1jj5WnsmqvgTeCHiDB3gOlnjGqVK_vuXn-TpZfqeOGBzoKFV5mjx1t95CWUFCVrrXX9ngwVYJeGcGomd1zNszPsokeE6hcRzr1GF-cKaIP6JKtC31zZetbFl8xkEdyZkpvRepSAQw8PPYZXM%3D)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eb0407be64f9470fa2613a8716026299&_e=AiTPUlNC3gRzFPE1_1Y-62ynSyfu7jQz0TDwxRs7f7WvQa-GDya_rQkdL2GGMshpXa58YVafzKtANPMxmmDr5M21J8DNnceJy7kuUjwL4G9n7nDoscfC1b_LYbCYtcVS17ROHyyIUD_kQObxYU9Rxojs3-xVBx8fnEayLrep0KIKvQR8s66KaCQsEeaET9gaY2HGlT9T3XUw7ZdWMmhh-CGTghs439gH5rtpqkFzqvDr_VTU9q7EBO1fguDSO164h5ouJZpi_wzjmnTUVo1ImwCLIV1c6pwKRneFFA5pC46dR0xR85l2ZlThF2bUJA8OxS_LZecKxRGdJeAyAKxixePM1jXCwE_xiacvtIBJYQU%3D)**.

Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming. . And I'll commit to you that I will NOT let you down. So please, . We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can. Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . and we cannot stop now! Respectfully, James O'Keefe P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, . Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Ro Khanna
subject: A blank check for defense contractors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

For decades, legacy military contractors have charged the federal government exorbitant amounts of money [https://www.cbsnews.com/news/weapons-contractors-price-gouging-pentagon-60-minutes-transcript-2023-05-21/] for everything from fighter jets to basic hardware. Lockheed Martin, for example, has used its monopoly on F-35 fighter jets to profit from maintenance only they can provide, and the work needed support and upgrade existing jets is expected to cost taxpayers over $1.3 trillion. TransDigm, another contractor responsible for supplying spare parts for the military, was found to be charging the Pentagon more than four times the market price [https://www.cbsnews.com/news/senators-urge-pentagon-investigate-price-gouging-military-contractors-60-minutes-report/] for their products.

And this latest defense budget only feeds this pattern. This defense spending proposal constitutes 56 percent [https://www.msnbc.com/opinion/msnbc-opinion/ro-khanna-house-military-defense-bill-rcna90653?cid=sm_npd_ms_tw_ma&taid=649cc29d25570b0001164e2a&utm] of our nation’s discretionary budget, and about half of that is allocated to defense contractors.

Keeping America strong starts at home. It means ensuring access to quality, affordable healthcare and education, strengthening our economy with good-paying jobs, and giving Americans the tools they need to pursue the American Dream.

Sign if you agree: Bloated military spending is not the answer. We must put our tax dollars to help working Americans at home. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-to-congress-say-no-to-a-nearly-1000000000000-pentagon-budget?source=2023DefenseSpending_RK&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdk-defense-budget-petition-swap]

Sign the Petition [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-to-congress-say-no-to-a-nearly-1000000000000-pentagon-budget?source=2023DefenseSpending_RK&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdk-defense-budget-petition-swap]

I was proud to be the sole dissenting vote on the $886 billion defense budget in the House Armed Services Committee recently. The decision was obvious to me: We can’t continue to sign a blank check to price-gouging defense contractors while Americans struggle here at home.

We have an obligation to invest taxpayer money in programs and policies that are designed to support the American public and move our country forward. It’s time for us to put our country’s needs before the profits of military contractors.

In solidarity,
Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ngp-email-footer?refcode=20230705-dk-defense-spending-petition-swap]

https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com] https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA [https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA] https://twitter.com/RoKhanna [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com]

Ro for Congress
P.O Box 3513
Santa Clara, CA 95051
United States

Paid for by Ro for Congress

Peter, we count on feedback from community members like you to help fuel our winning strategy: to elect bold, Democratic women at every level and turn our country around. **That’s why I’m surprised to see that your survey response hasn’t come in yet.**
---
**Our response deadline is midnight tonight, so please: Will you take just two minutes to add your input to our Emerge Community Survey now?**
**Click here to get started:** **[http://surveys.signforgood.com/emerge-2023-future](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65993663/415084413/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1248-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzY2ZkNDkzLTc1MWItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MUgzhTTq6hFXSFrITidctsYv8LG3bwz2V28Lqx4o2ek=&emci=2506e8b9-6417-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=83cfd493-751b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)**

Sandra Bishop
Chief Development Officer, Emerge

Date: Mon, Jul 3, 2023
Subject: we really need your opinion
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65993664/415084414/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1248-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzY2ZkNDkzLTc1MWItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MUgzhTTq6hFXSFrITidctsYv8LG3bwz2V28Lqx4o2ek=&emci=2506e8b9-6417-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=83cfd493-751b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)

Peter, we need to hear from you ASAP.

We’re now halfway through 2023, and Emerge women across the country are gearing up for the critical fights ahead.
2022 was a huge year for trailblazing Democratic women, and we’re not slowing down now. This spring, our Emerge alums achieved a whopping 91% win rate in state and local elections! And with a 75% win rate in the primaries overall, **more than ****100 Emerge women will be on the ballot this November!**

But we MUST seize every opportunity we can to empower more Democratic women who will fight for our communities – from school boards to the U.S. Congress – and we can't do it alone.
**That’s why we’re asking top supporters like you to take our Emerge Community Survey today. Right now, we’re still 137 responses short of our goal, and we need your input before our survey closes tomorrow at midnight.[Please: Will you take just two minutes to share your feedback now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65993665/415084415/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1248-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzY2ZkNDkzLTc1MWItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MUgzhTTq6hFXSFrITidctsYv8LG3bwz2V28Lqx4o2ek=&emci=2506e8b9-6417-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=83cfd493-751b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65993666/415084416/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1248-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzY2ZkNDkzLTc1MWItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MUgzhTTq6hFXSFrITidctsYv8LG3bwz2V28Lqx4o2ek=&emci=2506e8b9-6417-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=83cfd493-751b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)

The Republican attacks on our basic rights are staggering, Peter, but Emerge women keep stepping up to fight back, and they’re counting on our proven strategy and training programs to win. That’s why, as a member of our Emerge community, your input is so crucial.
**With your insights, we can keep building on our incredible win rate for community-driven candidates and empower more Democratic women who will put real people first.[So please, will you take our Emerge Community Survey now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65993667/415084417/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1248-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzY2ZkNDkzLTc1MWItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MUgzhTTq6hFXSFrITidctsYv8LG3bwz2V28Lqx4o2ek=&emci=2506e8b9-6417-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=83cfd493-751b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)**
Thank you, Peter. We look forward to reading your responses.
– Team Emerge
Emerge is a national organization working to recruit, train, and get Democratic women elected across the country, and we are so grateful to have you on our team. Our alums are strong voices for Democratic values — and they are running up and down the ballot to fight for working families. They are fighting for critical issues that affect our communities, such as the environment, accessible and affordable health care, social justice, and education equity. We need more alums fighting for us across the country.

You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support — that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our organization depends on thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our communities and across our country by building power through investing in Democratic women. **[If you’d like to donate, click here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65993668/415084418/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1248-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzY2ZkNDkzLTc1MWItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MUgzhTTq6hFXSFrITidctsYv8LG3bwz2V28Lqx4o2ek=&emci=2506e8b9-6417-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=83cfd493-751b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)**

clean_body: Peter, we count on feedback from community members like you to help fuel our winning strategy: to elect bold, Democratic women at every level and turn our country around. That’s why I’m surprised to see that your survey response hasn’t come in yet. Our response deadline is midnight tonight, so please: Will you take just two minutes to add your input to our Emerge Community Survey now? Click here to get started: Thank you for being a part of this movement, Sandra Bishop Chief Development Officer, Emerge \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Team Emerge Date: Mon, Jul 3, 2023 Subject: we really need your opinion | | | Peter, we need to hear from you ASAP. We’re now halfway through 2023, and Emerge women across the country are gearing up for the critical fights ahead. 2022 was a huge year for trailblazing Democratic women, and we’re not slowing down now. This spring, our Emerge alums achieved a whopping 91% win rate in state and local elections! And with a 75% win rate in the primaries overall, more than 100 Emerge women will be on the ballot this November! But we MUST seize every opportunity we can to empower more Democratic women who will fight for our communities – from school boards to the U.S. Congress – and we can't do it alone. That’s why we’re asking top supporters like you to take our Emerge Community Survey today. Right now, we’re still 137 responses short of our goal, and we need your input before our survey closes tomorrow at midnight. | | The Republican attacks on our basic rights are staggering, Peter, but Emerge women keep stepping up to fight back, and they’re counting on our proven strategy and training programs to win. That’s why, as a member of our Emerge community, your input is so crucial. With your insights, we can keep building on our incredible win rate for community-driven candidates and empower more Democratic women who will put real people first. Thank you, Peter. We look forward to reading your responses. – Team Emerge Emerge is a national organization working to recruit, train, and get Democratic women elected across the country, and we are so grateful to have you on our team. Our alums are strong voices for Democratic values — and they are running up and down the ballot to fight for working families. They are fighting for critical issues that affect our communities, such as the environment, accessible and affordable health care, social justice, and education equity. We need more alums fighting for us across the country. You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support — that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our organization depends on thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our communities and across our country by building power through investing in Democratic women. | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. [**July 5, 1859:** Captain N.C. Brooks sighted what is now known as the Midway Atoll while aboard the sealing ship _Gambia_. He named the islands the Middlebrook Islands and claimed them for the United States under the Guano Islands Act of 1856. The atoll was the first Pacific island annexed by the United States and was controlled by the U.S. Navy. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=52b4176fb1134087be29002e9312847b&_e=4Lo7BcpG1boxrNbyTe0fFTkYDBiR1fknXTTEr08P_58R_JKJIgh2WmG1vdK9rvvMYME6PtfJ6jUjof07pfPMovRvPTCsHT-x7Fzlok175NxgtrbPiehx6NOtWuRuoBsYj1xbJjCOciX8sAGx7MqyF7Hs9BBCQrACtNVLj2qEBRfU6Bm9VUo2WeIzMcmHkqFPpROmhYZfKw82q-VOkzN6SDruyGOxoa3PXohKT2_3QQI%3D) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=52b4176fb1134087be29002e9312847b&_e=4Lo7BcpG1boxrNbyTe0fFTkYDBiR1fknXTTEr08P_58R_JKJIgh2WmG1vdK9rvvMYME6PtfJ6jUjof07pfPMok6fa1VF3PvrENm4_Wk55bLBuyJbPOZ-oW3Hrz1Zi2co6T6tlOvriOnalg27T3LNQugQbV1xIXeElXO-Ud0QT5Ze3so1REK4Sz0SowuwqjTyhn2bO9Xh7iPxAmoGbYQ51k-3MuzcaeG4PzRRZF_vgnA%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

subject: there is still so much more to be done

Friend, We've accomplished a _lot_ in the Senate thanks to Democratic supporters like you. Here are just a few highlights: ✔️We took on Big Pharma and finally made it possible for Medicare to negotiate lower prices for prescription drugs. ✔️We made the largest investment in fighting climate change in our nation’s history. ✔️We took critical measures to safeguard our democracy by passing the Electoral Count Reform Act. Still, our work is far from complete. From protecting the right to vote to increasing access to affordable child care, there is still so much more to be done -- and that’s why I’m asking for your support. **Since I’ll be on the ballot next year it’s critical to hit my midnight fundraising goal so we can ensure we have the resources we need to keep the Senate blue. Here are just a few highlights: ✔️We took on Big Pharma and finally made it possible for Medicare to negotiate lower prices for prescription drugs. ✔️We made the largest investment in fighting climate change in our nation’s history. ✔️We took critical measures to safeguard our democracy by passing the Electoral Count Reform Act. Still, our work is far from complete. From protecting the right to vote to increasing access to affordable child care, there is still so much more to be done -- and that’s why I’m asking for your support. Since I’ll be on the ballot next year it’s critical to hit my midnight fundraising goal so we can ensure we have the resources we need to keep the Senate blue. body:
Just $5.
| | |
---
**$5.** This is what we're asking you to pitch in today, friend.
You might not think $5 is all that much. On any other day, maybe it's some spare change or what you'd put towards lunch and a coffee.
But it's not just your $5. It's your $5 combined with the $5 of thousands of other grassroots supporters who have joined us in the fight to reelect Sherrod, defend Democrats' Senate majority, and protect the Dignity of Work.

In the end, that's what a true people-powered movement is all about: folks like you giving what you can, when you can. And with experts saying Sherrod is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, your $5 could make all the difference in this race.
**So please, friend, can we count on you?****[Pitch in $5 right now to help us win in Ohio and keep Sherrod in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65998138/415088107/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk309-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2Y1NzY2NC03ODFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vJSHYjhTHs4lvCkBQvCPcSV41hfrYQIvdbA16qeCOJI=)**

– Sherrod Brown HQ
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Sherrod Brown:** Friend – thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement and for sharing our commitment to the Dignity of Work.

Fighting for workers means building an economy that prioritizes the needs of workers over tax breaks for billionaires and corporations. No matter who you are or what kind of work you do, I promise to fight for you. But I need your help: Experts say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection and Senate control could come down to Ohio. name: Crow for Congress
subject: [Survey for you]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Hello, we wanted to make sure you saw Jason’s note:

Will you take a minute to share your feedback in our new July Strategy Survey? We’re hoping for 8 more responses from your area:

BEGIN THE SURVEY [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-07-strategy-survey]

Happy July, folks —

I made a pledge during my first victory speech: As long as I have the honor of serving you in Congress, I will be there for you no matter what.

As a former Army Ranger, I’ve worked to bring servant leadership to the halls of Congress. My team and I are working to put the needs of our community ahead of partisanship and make this the most productive session yet.

As we’re entering the summer, I’m hoping to hear directly from you.

Will you complete my July Strategy Survey today? Here’s your personal survey link: [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-07-strategy-survey]

body:
While Republicans make disgusting remarks to rile up their bigoted base, Cori is showing real leadership. | |
---
Peter, When Republicans are in disarray, what do they do to distract from their own chaos? **Attack Cori.** As the first Black woman to represent Missouri in Congress, Cori has a deep understanding of America’s historical relationship to independence and equity. She understands the long term, generational impact felt by families of the formerly enslaved that continues today. That’s why she used July 4th to highlight her call for reparations with the facts of our nation’s founding. **She was immediately attacked by Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, the National Republican Senatorial Committee, and former Fox News host and right-wing media personality Megyn Kelly:** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yQHHrfvrophGWyy919VZTw5HH-g5yrlK0RXzE9KBCKVUCO2mha-54GKOW_0tbIsTtjRwcwAlOf9cnEJ5-rY-tyAdtj_5nc4MxeqWPCQ4RPcmZsKf6LVto20ky5_2k_5JMdA3OTRsNs6iuVSsKsml0C-Ubmf6XvXtlFUPojl17z0avfyLIMM2630MrPfPVarEqQZG-rQVDs0kpHaNQsxhdXd0ev8aNWEZjVDfWSMZJqUNt0ZSLe8F7RrbX1-P-iMsmqO0a4RwrX1NydD5hvTNH3ATaZ0KK6jLczTd_EzQ8j7i19f3AvDm2e5tycxfCtk20FdS6XMeOXTXZgjlcqfvTeQ3AWk-sdKXiFja7vypXuTQ/3xm/HLUuUozhSdSQXbFDAg9avw/h0/bSDn0nuV8Qqup_sBTZ7c7jAfX4o_jPBNTDMu2CXcWJo) [**We love knowing that the truth “triggers” MAGA Republicans like Megyn Kelly, but as easy as it is to just laugh at these kinds of attacks, the reality is these attacks have impact. name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Banking Nightmare
body:
During and after the Great Financial Crisis of 2008, 485 U.S. banks went under.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, During and after the Great Financial Crisis of 2008, 485 U.S. banks went under. We warned about 484 -- an accuracy rate of 99.8% Now, I have a new warning. But this time, it's not just about a few hundred banks. It's about nearly every single bank in America, whether large or small. A veritable banking nightmare! [See what it is here](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c9f92ac589834a808aa8364196ed2541&_e=sLYrANK8uAY_EAeTTRzJnouI1JdxmLJsY0Pg2GZCMg83vBmBBXYx8fUTmWg5-ClNPWBoymrbaMk4htvX3XNO1B6c6qdZcLeAWx5ZhwtwS8UG4R7_BtNvU7Uia1RJsG3vw6SUb6-7GJAjxkxav7Xt8wEwe1viwZYLY2m5mm4qYBvZE9qmIxzUHUC3fHwy46K1Tbe_1wG7DpasIq6TRalaQPQ31ViCPWKJlsX01qu8XnsXYUNB7PpiatqmNjvBA_POiiMR-kkdUxpbAMXeqgE1nA%3D%3D). name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: because of you
body:
Because this team is so committed, so dead set on getting this teacher, veteran, and proud science nerd elected in 2024...
| | |
---
We did it, Derek!

Because this team is so committed, so dead set on getting this teacher, veteran, and proud science nerd elected in 2024, **we just reached our end-of-quarter fundraising goal.**
My team and I set an ambitious target for this critical FEC deadline because it’s a major milestone for this campaign. It’s the day our fundraising numbers go public, and our opponents can see everything this movement has to offer **–****and thanks to you, Derek, we showed up big.**
I know Election Day still seems far off. But a solid foundation is essential for building anything – and reaching this goal shows me that, together, we’re building a winning movement for change that can win big for Pennsylvanians in 2024.
I’ve worn a lot of hats in my life, and had the honor of serving on so many different teams. But the incredible team we’ve built together fills me with so much hope for the future – and I’m so very grateful you’ve chosen to be a part of it.
There’s work to be done.

Chrissy

body:
Kyrsten Sinema could single-handedly DESTROY our majority

name: Team Tina
subject: $1 million to expand trash cleanup in Portland

body:
|
#
---
Peter, Tina recently announced a new $1 million investment to expand a program that gives people experiencing homelessness jobs helping to clean up trash in Portland. This is just a smart thing to do. Tina will always be focused on figuring out ways to solve problems and elevate the people, businesses, and communities that make Oregon such a special place. Her job as Governor is to take action, form partnerships, and make things work. **But here’s the difference, team:** My campaign doesn’t run on dark money contributions or wealthy mega-donors. **It’s built by hard-working folks like you.**

Supporters who come from families like mine. Families who want to leave their communities better than they found it. Everyday people coming together to build something greater than themselves.

And though $1 may seem symbolic, the movement it grows will be able to move mountains. **And it all starts with $1.**

clean_body: I have to ask, folks! | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Friend, Raul Ruiz here. | Look, I know it may seem odd to ask for just $1. In the grand scheme of things, it can be hard to see how a dollar can even make a difference. But here’s the difference, team: My campaign doesn’t run on dark money contributions or wealthy mega-donors. It’s built by hard-working folks like you. Supporters who come from families like mine. Families who want to leave their communities better than they found it. Everyday people coming together to build something greater than themselves. And though $1 may seem symbolic, the movement it grows will be able to move mountains. And it all starts with $1. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for standing with us!
