name: Brent Bozell
subject: BIG NEWS: First Amendment victory yesterday
body:
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=971e49abc7284bd5ba79120b6a29caf0&_e=B9pM28G7FJSyhEWVnOeqAm_-jinp0w6HLlhcGwRIzU-8fPl75vwPD4SHIPDxg7hLwTwwa24Hk4MkYQu4Y4baHkuSgvLl3c3uwjZpTm4AX6JZa_LP0oQTUHNDfE9Yl50_awq-V1QFzqvQiSTJJ1M4UjDBoQ82y5QeVR9hUzO-b1JFvLRp44BIraDYvSUjzzrPPgtIFtAaxKEsN8lKaPh98c7Zn8Mt5mu94fZEuhoYADLR4ckgQ1KC231oryfg5RrzCTOEK5gl_0l4JqP41jIW3g%3D%3D)

Hello Friend,

Media Research Center (MRC) won a huge victory for free speech this Independence Day!

A federal judge in Louisiana ruled the collusion between the Biden administration and Big Tech unconstitutional. Now, parts of the government, **including the FBI** , can no longer talk to social media companies for _" the purpose of urging, encouraging, pressuring, or inducing in any manner the removal, deletion, suppression, or reduction of content containing protected free speech."_

**This is a major victory for conservatives who have had their content censored on social media and our First Amendment rights.**

The plaintiffs in this court case used MRC's CensorTrack project to prove that Big Tech companies were targeting conservative content on the orders of the government.

Our CensorTrack project documents censorship on conservative content in real time while our news team exposes Big Tech's efforts to the public.

I set a goal to raise $20,000 this week to continue our fight against conservative censorship. Will you support MRC and help us win more victories for free speech?

[You can help us celebrate this victory for our rights by donating $17.76 today. Your support empowers our CensorTrack project to expose conservative censorship in the media. Click here to give. >>>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=971e49abc7284bd5ba79120b6a29caf0&_e=B9pM28G7FJSyhEWVnOeqAm_-jinp0w6HLlhcGwRIzU-8fPl75vwPD4SHIPDxg7hLwTwwa24Hk4MkYQu4Y4baHkuSgvLl3c3uwjZpTm4AX6LBUUDVBMO_teMqyEhQUEAP2ugWOkg_BG719wfjQVeBiKpmz7SYdjpcyXFEn5MM_lqxwViVBJiGbVvS5nXJrvGgpyCIMjajDpbDiqzTsNA3Pci9Gyw7NpIO1dsCtO-yMBg1WGxb3F0sMdUiTI_Z9X6duTpwPjCXITMhDpzDpWWbuOPYpSt2SARr3E3oAK2i_Uo%3D)

[Donate >>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=971e49abc7284bd5ba79120b6a29caf0&_e=B9pM28G7FJSyhEWVnOeqAm_-jinp0w6HLlhcGwRIzU-8fPl75vwPD4SHIPDxg7hLwTwwa24Hk4MkYQu4Y4baHkuSgvLl3c3uwjZpTm4AX6LBUUDVBMO_teMqyEhQUEAP2ugWOkg_BG719wfjQVeBiF9W2ZROK-zjRtnfOKyW6oIngbWKIa76nAJEpIdew4IGYgUJ6TggQ00-4VBCsjLUFAmL5feskOdSpAeK5Ccg7nNbDrdVyadwRvsq_4QiDuwxZ1COO47BOzhtNYyrxAiBcd1Z9oCvLxhdu3nE48LUSWA%3D)

We had documentation proving that Facebook and YouTube coordinated with multiple government agencies to censor posts about COVID-19 and other topics.

Including White House Officials:
* Meta _(Facebook and Instagram)_ identified 32 additional federal officials who communicated with them.
* YouTube identified 11 federal officials who communicated with them.

**This isn 't the first time MRC's CensorTrack database played a critical part in exposing the collusion between the federal government and Big Tech to silence conservatives.**

Between March 10, 2020, and March 10, 2022, **we recorded 646 cases of anti-conservative censorship** in our CensorTrack database!

We've had _over 5,500 entries into Censortrack_ since we started doing it in 2020.

And unless we continue to expose their collusion, you can be sure there are more...

MRC has proven our CensorTrack project is effective at holding the government and Big Tech accountable for suppressing conservative voices. **Will you help us win more free speech victories by clicking below and donating today?**

[Donate $17.76 >>>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=971e49abc7284bd5ba79120b6a29caf0&_e=B9pM28G7FJSyhEWVnOeqAm_-jinp0w6HLlhcGwRIzU-8fPl75vwPD4SHIPDxg7hLwTwwa24Hk4MkYQu4Y4baHkuSgvLl3c3uwjZpTm4AX6LBUUDVBMO_teMqyEhQUEAP2ugWOkg_BG719wfjQVeBiIlMJ6cNX7SVRvcVoIvA36Q_iirzw-yCrpDk3WXcjNlmY0fHzOFIuO06RVhZfALGtuSBYL4-eiJZFdkG0YV7iU4m8m3_21NsC0AFiOhgFng60y7xzrorEV54MzLJVykdxxFDfkWfVK_ZEQeSbmGmWc0%3D)

clean_body: Hello Friend, Media Research Center (MRC) won a huge victory for free speech this Independence Day! A federal judge in Louisiana ruled the collusion between the Biden administration and Big Tech unconstitutional. Now, parts of the government, including the FBI , can no longer talk to social media companies for " the purpose of urging, encouraging, pressuring, or inducing in any manner the removal, deletion, suppression, or reduction of content containing protected free speech." This is a major victory for conservatives who have had their content censored on social media and our First Amendment rights. The plaintiffs in this court case used MRC's CensorTrack project to prove that Big Tech companies were targeting conservative content on the orders of the government. Our CensorTrack project documents censorship on conservative content in real time while our news team exposes Big Tech's efforts to the public. I set a goal to raise $20,000 this week to continue our fight against conservative censorship. Will you support MRC and help us win more victories for free speech? We had documentation proving that Facebook and YouTube coordinated with multiple government agencies to censor posts about COVID-19 and other topics. Including White House Officials: Meta (Facebook and Instagram) identified 32 additional federal officials who communicated with them. YouTube identified 11 federal officials who communicated with them. This isn 't the first time MRC's CensorTrack database played a critical part in exposing the collusion between the federal government and Big Tech to silence conservatives. Between March 10, 2020, and March 10, 2022, we recorded 646 cases of anti-conservative censorship in our CensorTrack database! We've had over 5,500 entries into Censortrack since we started doing it in 2020. And unless we continue to expose their collusion, you can be sure there are more... MRC has proven our CensorTrack project is effective at holding the government and Big Tech accountable for suppressing conservative voices. Will you help us win more free speech victories by clicking below and donating today? While this victory is huge, our work is far from over. Big Tech companies will find new ways to violate our First Amendment rights on the government's behalf. But MRC is ready to expose its collusion to the American people. Defending conservative speech online and exposing Big Tech's efforts to silence conservative voices is a huge job. And MRC is the only organization doing it! But this isn't a fight we can win alone... Thank you, Brent Bozell Founder & President of MRC The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. The MRC is a research and education organization operating under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code, and contributions to the MRC are tax-deductible. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:

## **Happy Wednesday!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amjlo-trhiujldw-y/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amjlo-trhiujldw-j/) **Emergency Response** A suspicious substance found at the White House West Wing**[has reportedly been determined to be cocaine.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amjlo-trhiujldw-t/) **_Can't wait to hear the Press Secretary try to deflect this one._ **1st Amendment and Election Interference** A federal judge has **[ordered the Biden administration to limit its contact with social media platforms](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amjlo-trhiujldw-i/)** because they violated the First Amendment by working to censor political viewpoints. **Another Expensive Holiday** The American Farm Bureau Federation's cost tracker **[showed the price for a holiday BBQ remains elevated](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amjlo-trhiujldw-d/)** as a result of inflation triggered by what the White House now likes to call "Bidenomics." **Five SCOTUS Cases to Watch** Following a series of landmark Supreme Court rulings, all eyes have turned to the 6-3 **[conservative majority bench as they prepare for their next term](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amjlo-trhiujldw-h/)**.

**Supporting 2A** Data from the FBI shows that **[1.1 million background checks](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amjlo-trhiujldw-k/)** were conducted in June for likely gun purchases and transfers. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amjlo-trhiujldw-u/)!**

* The next group to be**[canceled.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-amjlo-trhiujldw-c/)**

name: Bob Casey HQ
subject: Here's why we're asking:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
There’s no other way to say this.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=255%2E552475%2EvEifPl)
Peter, there is no other way to say this — Senate campaigns these days are _expensive_ , particularly in states like Pennsylvania.
Mitch McConnell is targeting our race in Pennsylvania, so we know we’re going to see millions upon millions of right-wing dark money flooding into our Commonwealth.
We need to make sure we have the resources to fight back — and from traveling across the state, to putting TV ads on the air, to even buying pens and clipboards, campaign expenses add up fast.
**[That’s why we are working hard to ensure we build a campaign that is ready to take on whatever the GOP throws at us. Will you make a contribution of any amount to fund our campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230705-1?refcode=em20230705-1&refcode2=255_552475_vEifPl&akid=255%2E552475%2EvEifPl)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230705-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230705-1&refcode2=255_552475_vEifPl&akid=255%2E552475%2EvEifPl)**
Among the Senate battleground states, Pennsylvania is a historically expensive state. With over $381 million dollars spent in the Commonwealth’s 2022 U.S. Senate race, strong grassroots support is critical to our success in 2024.
We’re building our campaign early so that we’re prepared for the long road ahead. (Remember — it wasn’t even 24 hours after Senator Casey launched his re-election campaign that Republicans released attacks!)

clean_body: There’s no other way to say this. Peter, there is no other way to say this — Senate campaigns these days are expensive , particularly in states like Pennsylvania. Mitch McConnell is targeting our race in Pennsylvania, so we know we’re going to see millions upon millions of right-wing dark money flooding into our Commonwealth. We need to make sure we have the resources to fight back — and from traveling across the state, to putting TV ads on the air, to even buying pens and clipboards, campaign expenses add up fast. Among the Senate battleground states, Pennsylvania is a historically expensive state. With over $381 million dollars spent in the Commonwealth’s 2022 U.S. Senate race, strong grassroots support is critical to our success in 2024. We’re building our campaign early so that we’re prepared for the long road ahead. (Remember — it wasn’t even 24 hours after Senator Casey launched his re-election campaign that Republicans released attacks!) Thank you so much, Team Casey

|
Friend,
Our state government is on a quest to destroy the Second Amendment here in California, and here’s the **jaw-dropping anti-gun ideas they’ve floated in _just the past few weeks alone:_**
* Ban body armor
* Expand red flag laws,
* Make carrying a firearm next to impossible, and
* Expand the de facto new handgun ban.

Their plan is to throw everything at the wall, and see what sticks.
That’s why the **California Gun Rights Foundation is ready to take on _any and every_ Anti-Gun law Gavin Newsom signs into law.**
No one has the track record we do here in California, Friend.
But **we’re currently fighting 11 active lawsuits against Anti-Gun laws across the state**...and leading the charge against these proposals will stretch our resources to the breaking point.
The California Gun Rights Foundation is built and powered solely by and for patriots like you. **We need you to come through for us again today.**

name: The Long Run PAC
subject: We need just 2 minutes of your time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
We need to hear what issues and candidates matter to you most this upcoming quarter
#
Friends -
Last week, the Long Run faced its first-ever FEC deadline, and with the support of this team, we were able to surpass our goals and build the resources to continue funding changemaking candidates like Tammy Baldwin, Colin Allred, and Ruben Gallego.
Now, as we begin this next phase of The Long Run and choose which critical races we want to leave our mark on, we want to hear what issues, races, and candidates you would like us to prioritize. Because as much as we want to, we cannot fight for every candidate that needs support right away.
[**Team, can you take a moment to complete our official July priorities survey for The Long Run? Use this link to take our quick one-minute survey.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em230705_priorities_survey/?source=em230605-1-t1&refcode2=4620.196590.kqEtJ2&t=1&akid=4620%2E196590%2EkqEtJ2)
Mandela and The Long Run need to hear directly from you about the priorities you care about most because your authentic input is what makes this movement powerful and meaningful.
What you share today _will directly inform our decisions_ , so the more people who weigh in, the better Mandela and The Long Run can understand what's top of mind for people across the country.
We want to make sure your voice is heard, loud and clear, before making any key decisions. [**So please take 2 minutes to take our quick priorities survey today.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em230705_priorities_survey/?source=em230605-1-t1&refcode2=4620.196590.kqEtJ2&t=2&akid=4620%2E196590%2EkqEtJ2)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em230705_priorities_survey/?source=em230605-1-t1&refcode2=4620.196590.kqEtJ2&t=3&akid=4620%2E196590%2EkqEtJ2)
Thank you in advance for taking the time to share your input today.
The team at the Long Run

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=4620%2E196590%2EkqEtJ2). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=4620%2E196590%2EkqEtJ2)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=4620_196590_kqEtJ2&akid=4620%2E196590%2EkqEtJ2)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=4620%2E196590%2EkqEtJ2)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

name: Jessica Mackler, EMILYs List
subject: 2️⃣ Senate candidates you should know >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | Support these women now to protect open seats AND our Senate majority [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66008992/415093751/228261731?sourceid=1050413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWVlODBmMS04MDFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S23BFQrDZYcvdocs2-dA1LTiWu3ksnjLv5zHozADuPI=&emci=b80642ea-801b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=9aee80f1-801b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter, I wanted to highlight some startling numbers for you.

**Only 58 Black women have _ever_ been elected to Congress**, and just _two_ of those 58 have been elected to the Senate. As a member of this pro-choice community, you know Democratic pro-choice women often face tough races against well-funded opponents. When these pro-choice women are Black, the fundraising gap, which is a key indicator in campaign outcomes, only _widens_.

This cycle, EMILYs List is supporting Rep.**Lisa Blunt Rochester (DE-SEN)** and **Angela Alsobrooks (MD-SEN)** , two women who can SAVE open blue seats and bring badly-needed representation to our Senate. We need a government that reflects the American people, and that means electing more women of color _everywhere_. **[More on Lisa and Angela in a minute. Already fired up and ready to help elect more Democratic pro-choice women of color up and down the ballot? Donate now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66008999/415093758/228261731?sourceid=1050413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWVlODBmMS04MDFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S23BFQrDZYcvdocs2-dA1LTiWu3ksnjLv5zHozADuPI=&emci=b80642ea-801b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=9aee80f1-801b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**

Peter, if you haven't already met candidates**Lisa Blunt Rochester (DE-SEN)** and**Angela Alsobrooks (MD-SEN)** , allow me to introduce you:

Rep. **Lisa Blunt Rochester (DE-SEN)** is a devoted public servant who has served in the highest levels of Delaware's state government and currently represents Delaware's At-Large Congressional District. Lisa centers public safety and civil rights in her work in elected office, and has been a champion for women and families throughout her career.

Former Prince George's County state attorney and current county executive **Angela Alsobrooks (MD-SEN)** has used her positions in elected office to be an advocate and activist for accessible education, health care, and justice reform. We are thrilled she is running to bring her experience and expertise to the Senate floor.

EMILYs List is deeply invested in the fight to elect more Black women to every level of elected office. Both Lisa and Angela are proven Democratic pro-choice leaders that can help usher in a new era of representation in our government — and we're proud to give our full support to each of these incredible candidates. ****Donate now to help elect incredible Democratic pro-choice leaders like Lisa and Angela who are helping to change the face of representation in political office *everywhere*:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Elect-Women-This-July](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66009000/415093759/228261731?sourceid=1050413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWVlODBmMS04MDFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S23BFQrDZYcvdocs2-dA1LTiWu3ksnjLv5zHozADuPI=&emci=b80642ea-801b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=9aee80f1-801b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you,

Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers)
Senior Vice President of Campaigns, EMILYs List
** ** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66009002/415093761/228261731?sourceid=1050413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWVlODBmMS04MDFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S23BFQrDZYcvdocs2-dA1LTiWu3ksnjLv5zHozADuPI=&emci=b80642ea-801b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=9aee80f1-801b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** **** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66009003/415093762/2124073479?sourceid=1050413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWVlODBmMS04MDFiLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S23BFQrDZYcvdocs2-dA1LTiWu3ksnjLv5zHozADuPI=&emci=b80642ea-801b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=9aee80f1-801b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** ********

name: Greg Landsman
subject: Asking for $5

body:

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Record 853,955 Foreigners Overstay Visa Decades after Terrorists Did it to Execute 9/11
body:
More than two decades after Islamic terrorists exploited the U.S.
government’s inefficient system for tracking foreigners who overstay
visas, the problem is only getting worse with a startling 853,955 visa
overstays in fiscal year 2022.

[alt_text]

[*****]
July 05, 2023

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64021&L=29753&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZm9yZWlnbmVycy1vdmVyc3RheS12aXNhLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=be650d366faaf3dacf3bae20ad1e31e2a23da244aa95c85eeaa05bdc49b96579]

More than two decades after Islamic terrorists exploited the U.S.
government’s inefficient system for tracking foreigners who overstay
visas, the problem is only getting worse with a startling 853,955 visa
overstays in fiscal year 2022. A new report issued by the Department
of Homeland Security (DHS) tries to downplay the severity of the
situation by shining a light on the positive, that the overstay rate
is a mere 3.67% compared to 96.33% of over 23 million nonimmigrants
that departed the country on time in accordance with the terms of
their admission.

[alt_text] [*****] July 05, 2023 [article-image] [] More than two decades after Islamic terrorists exploited the U.S. government’s inefficient system for tracking foreigners who overstay visas, the problem is only getting worse with a startling 853,955 visa overstays in fiscal year 2022. A new report issued by the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) tries to downplay the severity of the situation by shining a light on the positive, that the overstay rate is a mere 3.67% compared to 96.33% of over 23 million nonimmigrants that departed the country on time in accordance with the terms of their admission. Hello,
Adam Frisch is running again to defeat Lauren Boebert – giving us our best chance ever to finally kick her out of Congress.
In 2022, Adam came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert. It was the closest race in the _entire_ country. It even went to a recount!
No one believed Adam could do it last time, but with your help now, we are going to defeat Boebert once and for all in 2024.

subject: Your voice has so much power.

body:
| | | Hi team -- It’s Diana, the Research Director at the DSCC.

**As one of our top Democratic supporters, your voice has so much power.**

Data from folks like you drives everything that we do here at the DSCC, and we rely on grassroots input to guide key decisions that can make _all the difference_ in an election.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. We just launched an in-depth President Biden Approval Questionnaire to help measure voter enthusiasm and nail down our strategy -- but **we need 1,029 more Democrats to respond by MIDNIGHT or we won't be able to confirm our results. Please, your input is invaluable to Democratic victory in 2024, so let us know:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/14453?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230705-Diana-DianaBidenInDepthApproval-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230705-Diana-DianaBidenInDepthApproval-ETG-sl1&akid=11214%2E9716520%2E-py1Bf)

name: Joseph Geevarghese, Executive Director @ Our Revolution
subject: midyear check in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

At the start of the year, we told you about
our inside-out plan to keep fighting injustices and corporate-built
inequity. Our goals are to organize the grassroots to 1) advance
progressive policies 2) elect more allies, and 3) grow our influence in
the party.

I’m reporting back halfway through the year with lots of exciting updates.
None of this work would be possible without your support. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8762?t=1008&akid=4426%2E5885482%2E0vUDuL ]Please
consider making a $25 contribution today so we can continue this important
work.

* To kick off the year our founder, Bernie Sanders, took over as
chairman of the Senate HELP Committee — a role that allows him to take
on corporate greed and corruption head-on while fighting for
healthcare justice and labor power.

* At the start of this Congress, nine new progressive members were sworn
into the US House. This is now the largest Progressive Caucus since
Bernie founded it in 1991 and we are still growing. Building power in
Congress is crucial as we hold the Judicial and Executive branches
accountable.

* In 13 states, we launched major campaigns to raise the wage and end
the subminimum wage. Working with our partners at One Fair Wage, we’ve
held dozens of rallies and press events and we will not rest until
workers are paid what they deserve.

* And of course, election season never ends. We’ve endorsed candidates
in races at the state and local level this year and celebrated some
major wins, including electing Brandon Johnson as the new Mayor of
Chicago. As we prepare for the 2024 midterms, we are building power at
all levels of government.

We have so much work left to do, and progress never sleeps. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8762?t=1009&akid=4426%2E5885482%2E0vUDuL ]Will you
chip in today so we can keep fighting for meaningful change?

Thanks for all you do,

Joseph

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230705_FR_mid-year-check_0_CST_joseph&akid=4426%2E5885482%2E0vUDuL _na_na_na&t=1001 ]Support Our Revolution →

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=4426%2E5885482%2E0vUDuL ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1003&akid=4426%2E5885482%2E0vUDuL ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1004&akid=4426%2E5885482%2E0vUDuL ][IMG]

Our Revolution is a national grassroots network of local groups dedicated
to organizing a political revolution powerful enough to challenge the
structural forces that threaten our survival as a society. From city halls
to the halls of Congress, our movement is fighting to win progressive
issue fights, elect progressive champions, transform the Democratic party
and get big money out of politics. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230705_FR_mid-year-check_0_CST_joseph&akid=4426%2E5885482%2E0vUDuL _na_na_na&t=1005 ]Help us achieve these goals by
donating today.

Join our movement by [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1006&akid=4426%2E5885482%2E0vUDuL ]following us on Facebook and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/738?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230705_FR_mid-year-check_0_CST_joseph&akid=4426%2E5885482%2E0vUDuL _na_na_na&t=1007 ]signing up here.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=4426%2E5885482%2E0vUDuL

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

From city halls to the halls of Congress, our movement is fighting to win progressive issue fights, elect progressive champions, transform the Democratic party and get big money out of politics. [ nanana&t=1005 ]Help us achieve these goals by donating today. Join our movement by [ ]following us on Facebook and [ nana_na&t=1007 ]signing up here. body:
Cutting Taxes. Creating Jobs. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66017936/415097980/17860314?refcode=ea.f1bdc1bf-871b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f1bdc1bf-871b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjFiZGMxYmYtODcxYi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SGqQCgWBenJmcfaEQayPeTgEnvLUIxMaz2MojPQrt9I=)

Peter, in case you haven't heard, Brandon is determined to prioritize working families and small businesses in Mississippi, and he’s ready to get to work. | _“Public Service Commissioner Brandon Presley unveiled the first plank of his ‘cutting taxes, creating jobs’ campaign, vowing to put money back into taxpayers’ wallets.”_ _— WXXV 25_
---
While politicians backed by big corporate lobbyists like Tate Reeves suck up to out-of-state billionaires, Brandon’s economic plan will put local businesses first and make sure that _every_ family has the opportunity to succeed in our great state.

The cornerstone of Brandon’s plan calls for tax cuts for working families, not just for the wealthy and well-connected, and would help most Mississippians. As Governor, he will:
✅ Eliminate the highest grocery tax in the nation
✅ Cut car tag fees in half for Mississippians
✅ Create a Public-Private Task Force on Economic Diversity
✅ Provide workforce training and scholarships
✅ Invest in infrastructure for a thriving Mississippi
✅ Ensure access to childcare
✅ Expand Medicaid
✅ Strengthen Mississippi's Equal Pay Law
And he’s just getting started.

But we need to know where you stand, Peter. **That’s why we’re reaching out to Brandon’s top supporters in CA to answer this one simple question before the end of today:**
Are you on board with Brandon Presley's bold economic vision for Mississippi? | [YES!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66017937/415097983/-2074907798?refcode=ea.f1bdc1bf-871b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f1bdc1bf-871b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjFiZGMxYmYtODcxYi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SGqQCgWBenJmcfaEQayPeTgEnvLUIxMaz2MojPQrt9I=&emci=d57a9aac-641b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=f1bdc1bf-871b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6059782) | [NOPE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66017942/415097985/-2074907798?refcode=ea.f1bdc1bf-871b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.f1bdc1bf-871b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjFiZGMxYmYtODcxYi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SGqQCgWBenJmcfaEQayPeTgEnvLUIxMaz2MojPQrt9I=&emci=d57a9aac-641b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=f1bdc1bf-871b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=6059782)

subject: Respectfully asking your opinion

body:
#

Hey there, its Alex.
As you probably know by now, my team and I like to send out an issue survey about once a month — it’s a way of getting to hear directly from you about the issues that matter the most.
**So I am respectfully asking you to use this link to share your thoughts with me and my team:[https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/Survey-July ](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/July-Issue-Survey-2023-em/?source=em230705-1-30&refcode2=1407.159979.h8VxzW&akid=1407%2E159979%2Eh8VxzW)**
Thank you again. Filling out our survey might seem like a small thing, but it really makes a BIG difference for me to be able to hear from you directly.
Sincerely,
Alex Padilla
**[DONATE](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/3021?refcode=em230705-1-30&t=1&akid=1407%2E159979%2Eh8VxzW)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=1407%2E159979%2Eh8VxzW)

name: Petitions Team @ HER Time
subject: This Court is corrupt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66021983/415099443/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230705_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTVmMzg0OGItOGExYi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QOXb_Mk6kPfbRE7MS0LSj2fBh8hb13rc8cOlSkMKl_c=)
---
Peter, In the past few weeks, the Supreme Court has shown us just how corrupt they really are. _They banned affirmative action practices in college admissions._ _They’re allowing discrimination on the basis of sexual orientation and gender identity in creative businesses._ _They struck down President Biden’s student loan forgiveness plan._ _And it was just over a year ago that they overturned Roe v. Wade._ This Court is sending our country backwards in every direction — that’s why we’re calling for Court reform before it’s too late. Our Supreme Court is broken. MULTIPLE seats were stolen by Mitch McConnell’s obstruction in the Senate. MULTIPLE Justices have been credibly accused of sexual misconduct. Clarence Thomas is allowed to accept (and lie about) obscenely expensive gifts from a Republican mega donor, while his wife helps organize a coup, with no consequence. **These are the people who have our rights in their hands.** We must not sit by as a corrupt Court takes away our rights. The time to reform the Court is now. [_**If you agree, please sign our petition calling for immediate reform of the Supreme Court. We need your voice on this important matter:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66021984/415099444/-220061698?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230705_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTVmMzg0OGItOGExYi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QOXb_Mk6kPfbRE7MS0LSj2fBh8hb13rc8cOlSkMKl_c=&emci=0bf3848b-8a1b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=15f3848b-8a1b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1720400) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/66021985/415099445/-220061698?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230705_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTVmMzg0OGItOGExYi1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QOXb_Mk6kPfbRE7MS0LSj2fBh8hb13rc8cOlSkMKl_c=&emci=0bf3848b-8a1b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=15f3848b-8a1b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=1720400)

Their latest decisions against student debt relief and LGBTQ+ Americans | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66023135/415099769/1093353214?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4NDlkMDg1LThiMWItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TIMtSJjdAs5gmrv2JeVdtU1pwDBidMdrNXEpARnup_0=) | Peter: The Trump-stacked Supreme Court just delivered two MASSIVE blows to our agenda: FIRST, they **granted businesses permission to discriminate against LGBTQ+ customers** by siding with a website designer who refused to work with same-sex couples. THEN, they **overturned President Biden’s plan to cancel up to $20,000 in student debt** for millions of Americans. [CONDEMN THE COURT](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66023136/415099770/-944525591?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4NDlkMDg1LThiMWItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TIMtSJjdAs5gmrv2JeVdtU1pwDBidMdrNXEpARnup_0=&emci=98847d05-521b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=4849d085-8b1b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=25540290) The integrity of the entire Supreme Court has already been called into question. This year, Justices Clarence Thomas, Samuel Alito, AND John Roberts are ALL facing ethics scandals for accepting lavish trips and gifts from billionaires, failing to disclose property sales, and more. **Now, this same Court – packed with Trump-appointed justices – are overturning our reproductive rights, rights for LGBTQ+ Americans, and critical student debt relief efforts.** [**Our democracy rests upon transparency, accountability, and the WILL of the people – not a few Trump-Justices hiding behind lifetime appointments. Sign on now to join us in CONDEMNING the Supreme Court and their decisions to slash student debt relief and LGBTQ+ rights.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66023137/415099771/-944525591?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4NDlkMDg1LThiMWItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TIMtSJjdAs5gmrv2JeVdtU1pwDBidMdrNXEpARnup_0=&emci=98847d05-521b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=4849d085-8b1b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=25540290) [SIGN ON](https://click.everyaction.com/k/66023138/415099772/-944525591?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4NDlkMDg1LThiMWItZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TIMtSJjdAs5gmrv2JeVdtU1pwDBidMdrNXEpARnup_0=&emci=98847d05-521b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=4849d085-8b1b-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=25540290) Thank you, Future Forum Democrats

clean_body: Their latest decisions against student debt relief and LGBTQ+ Americans | = | Peter: The Trump-stacked Supreme Court just delivered two MASSIVE blows to our agenda: FIRST, they granted businesses permission to discriminate against LGBTQ+ customers by siding with a website designer who refused to work with same-sex couples. THEN, they overturned President Biden’s plan to cancel up to $20,000 in student debt for millions of Americans. The integrity of the entire Supreme Court has already been called into question. This year, Justices Clarence Thomas, Samuel Alito, AND John Roberts are ALL facing ethics scandals for accepting lavish trips and gifts from billionaires, failing to disclose property sales, and more. Now, this same Court – packed with Trump-appointed justices – are overturning our reproductive rights, rights for LGBTQ+ Americans, and critical student debt relief efforts. Thank you, Future Forum Democrats Founded by Rep. Eric Swalwell, Future Forum PAC is a coalition of young Democratic Members of Congress focused on issues and opportunities for the next generation. =** = =

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: As we celebrated the 247th anniversary…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
We now find ourselves in a NEW quest for independence.
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGL2zAQhX-NfLORZyTZOfiwWxEKaUuhh3ZPQZEmySyW7NhyzfbXF4dkr997DO9jXBx7Pn90onkVAFcOswAQ-CIADur1zw9z-H2w5T8yt9IardYthS8CIH-M9Fl9XKkoOu432tgidOBb8L6grjZta6RUxhTXTiOBUbszygZbfdbBA6AkBB1M0C0U3IEElI3UgKqWWLVgGjw5ddIKFUAtlFw5VWFIrg_veVriWPkhFn13zXmc75P2AvYz-WWiauU0UdgaG3N_qXSRJvaufB845fK8pDA5njldSj_EyDkTCdgn37dGh9rvTq2vmwYIBe6XHI-RAi9RoH34mg3OwzJ5Emg9H92DeRdHx5ck0D6dnsmQMqUs0O40tgLMMfUcBNqXt_Hmv17MLdzh_SNo39bv4dd6-_azmLowrtz3PJtGKHnZFmxu_wMAAP__v0yMfw)
---
Friend,
Yesterday, we celebrated the 247th anniversary of our independence as a free nation.
We paid tribute to the great patriots who sacrificed everything so that we could have the chance to be free.
But sadly, our great nation is on the brink of falling victim to the dark forces of tyranny that our Founding Fathers fought so valiantly against.
**We now find ourselves in a _new_ _quest_ for independence.**
A cabal of unelected bureaucrats, often referred to as the Deep State, are attempting to amass total control over our country and stop you from having a voice in your own government.
There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor.
They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen...
**...But the cause of freedom proved to be the most powerful force on the face of the planet.**
Our Founding Fathers won their David-vs-Goliath battle for liberty and gave us the greatest nation on God’s green earth.
Now, our nation is engulfed in the final battle for America. If we win the 2024 election, we will reclaim our independence, our liberty, and our justice.
But if we lose, then our Republic will be gone for good.
Just as the patriots – who we honor today – refused to surrender, _neither can we._
Together, we will save our country and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
_If you are doing poorly because of Joe Biden’s policies, just stop reading the email here and hit the back button. Take care of your family and yourself first!_
But, if you can contribute to ensure we have the funds to counter all of our many, many enemies who are dead set on stopping us from making America great again, then please contribute.

clean_body: We now find ourselves in a NEW quest for independence. | | | Friend, Yesterday, we celebrated the 247th anniversary of our independence as a free nation. We paid tribute to the great patriots who sacrificed everything so that we could have the chance to be free. But sadly, our great nation is on the brink of falling victim to the dark forces of tyranny that our Founding Fathers fought so valiantly against. We now find ourselves in a new quest for independence. A cabal of unelected bureaucrats, often referred to as the Deep State, are attempting to amass total control over our country and stop you from having a voice in your own government. There were many times when the cause of our Founding Fathers looked bleak. The odds were certainly not in their favor. They were standing up to the largest empire the world had ever seen... ...But the cause of freedom proved to be the most powerful force on the face of the planet. Our Founding Fathers won their David-vs-Goliath battle for liberty and gave us the greatest nation on God’s green earth. Now, our nation is engulfed in the final battle for America. If we win the 2024 election, we will reclaim our independence, our liberty, and our justice. But if we lose, then our Republic will be gone for good. Just as the patriots – who we honor today – refused to surrender, neither can we. Together, we will save our country and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! If you are doing poorly because of Joe Biden’s policies, just stop reading the email here and hit the back button. Take care of your family and yourself first! But, if you can contribute to ensure we have the funds to counter all of our many, many enemies who are dead set on stopping us from making America great again, then please contribute. | | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: After Bernie 2016
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This email will probably be a bit longer than others you receive today,
but it’s really important and I hope you’ll read the entire message.

Justice Democrats was started by just a handful of Bernie 2016 staffers
and super volunteers. We had just worked on this inspiring campaign for
president. Bernie put a progressive agenda front and center for millions
of people for the first time — myself included.

In 2018, when Justice Democrats recruited AOC to run, she was working as a
bartender — she even worked as a bartender for many months while running
for office. Sometimes, that’s what it takes when you’re a working-class
candidate.

We helped AOC manage her team, run her organizing program, and make
everything we could of our small budget. Then, she won. We toppled one of
the most powerful corporate Democrats and elected the youngest woman ever
to serve in Congress in his place.

Money has always been one of the biggest things holding us back from doing
more. It’s the one thing that our establishment opponents have a seemingly
endless supply of and that we’re always working hard to raise just a
fraction of what they can raise.

Since January 2021, our fundraising has been in a slow but steady decline
and it really isn’t sustainable for us as an organization. Here’s a
screenshot from our actual ActBlue dashboard:

We don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so we rely on supporters like
you to power our work.

Thank you so much for being a part of our movement to challenge the entire
political establishment and elect more progressive change-makers.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135507?refcode=em20230705-29749&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=29749%2E1203867%2ElzojW4 ]→ Will you now dig deep and make your first contribution of
$3 right now to support our critical work?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135507?refcode=em20230705-29749&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=29749%2E1203867%2ElzojW4 ]Contribute $3

I know we can do amazing things together. I’m grateful to be in this fight
with you, thank you again.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=29749%2E1203867%2ElzojW4 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=29749%2E1203867%2ElzojW4 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230705-29749-footer&t=1024&refcode2=29749_1203867_lzojW4&akid=29749%2E1203867%2ElzojW4

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=29749%2E1203867%2ElzojW4

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Bring Katie Porter’s whiteboard energy to the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=26014%2E3422442%2EbjWZUZ)
Take a look at this Washington Post headline ⬇️
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230705-1?refcode=EMAJ05_1_SEN_20230705_V1_F&refcode2=26014_3422442_bjWZUZ&akid=26014%2E3422442%2EbjWZUZ)
**The Senate isn’t working for Americans.** The filibuster allows Senators to avoid tackling our country’s biggest issues, and too many Members are beholden to Wall Street and predatory corporations.
We need to send Katie Porter to the Senate to be a powerful voice for working people. As a single mom of three, she’s used to cutting through the BS to get things done.
[**Can you make a donation today to help send her to the U.S. Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230705-1?refcode=EMAJ05_1_SEN_20230705_V1_F&refcode2=26014_3422442_bjWZUZ&akid=26014%2E3422442%2EbjWZUZ)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230705-1?refcode=EMAJ05_1_SEN_20230705_V1_F&refcode2=26014_3422442_bjWZUZ&akid=26014%2E3422442%2EbjWZUZ)**
Thanks for being a part of our movement,
Team Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ05_1_SEN_20230705_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=26014_3422442_bjWZUZ&akid=26014%2E3422442%2EbjWZUZ)**

Katie Porter for Senate

Irvine, CA 92616
